programme.title: Tom's Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom the Tow Truck, the famous truck of Car City, also washes his friends, the cars of Car City ! Tom welcomes his cars and trucs friends into his brand new Car Wash and cleans them, they come out totally washed like brand new cars!

programme.title: Dino the Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dino the Dinosaur is an ideal educational TV show for toddlers and preschoolers. Everyday, Dino learns shapes, colors, numbers and letters with enthusiasm. Both boys and girls will enjoy this show and learn with fun !

programme.title: Tiny Trucks
programme.desc: Charlie, Billy and Ed are the ingenious Tiny Trucks. Those small but clever construction trucks assemble pieces of funny trucks and attractions. Ice cream trucks, giant slides, fire trucks, and so more. Learn and have fun with the Tiny Trucks.

programme.title: Tiny Town
programme.desc: Tiny Town is the where the world’s smallest cars live. It is a colorful place where tiny police car, ambulance and fire truck live and play happily together. Each episode is an excuse for us to see them doing something thrilling or not.

programme.title: One Zeez
programme.desc: The One Zeez are four kids who form a pop band. At least, that’s what they tell themselves in their dreams… In fact, they are four boisterous orphans who never want to go to sleep. Whenever the bedroom’s lights turn off, the little crew jump off their beds and travel to a magical land where they perform and use their own instrument like true-born musicians! Discover Original Songs for kids, Nursery Rhymes, Karaoke and Dance for Children & Many More !

programme.title: Tom the Tow Truck
programme.desc: Tom the Tow truck is an ingenious mechanic who is always there to help his friends. When accidents happen in Car City and vehicles get broken, Tom rushes to get them into his garage in order to repair them. Follow him in his important mission!

programme.title: Troy the Train
programme.desc: Troy The Train is the fastest train in the world! He makes sure that new vehicles arrive safely to Car City, and join the Car Team! Every day, Troy the train meets new friends, who follow him in amazing adventures.

programme.title: Tom's Paint Shop
programme.desc: Tom the Tow Truck, the famous truck of Car City, is also fond of painting . Tom welcomes his truck friends into his brand new Paint Shop and transforms them into their favorite character.

programme.title: Hotweels city
programme.desc: Welcome to Hot Wheels City, where there is never any shortage of mayhem. Cobras are on the loose, stealing valuable auto parts and fuel. Can our heroes Elliot and Chase rise up to the challenge and bring peace back to the city?

programme.title: Construction Squad
programme.desc: Ethan the Dump Truck, Edgar the Excavator and Charlie the Crane are the ingenious members of the Construction Squad ! When there is something new to build in Car City, it's the Construction Squad we call for! Edgar, Ethan and Charlie are always happy to improve this beautiful town and please its inhabitants!

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: Barbie and her little sister Chelsea travel through the whimsical worlds of Dreamtopia. Through the eyes of Chelsea's imagination, viewers explore delicious and delightful worlds and meet colorful characters who live there.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: Barbie and her little sister Chelsea travel through the whimsical worlds of Dreamtopia. Through the eyes of Chelsea's imagination, viewers explore delicious and delightful worlds and meet colorful characters who live there.

programme.title: Tom the Tow Truck
programme.desc: Tom the Tow truck is an ingenious mechanic who is always there to help his friends. When accidents happen in Car City and vehicles get broken, Tom rushes to get them into his garage in order to repair them. Follow him in his important mission!

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: The Monster Trucks live as one happy family in the colorful world of Monster Town, where excitement is never far away. A team of nine, they each belong to a different type of vehicle from speeding car to helicopter, with the personalities to match. Through every new challenge or adventure, the Monster Trucks team up to help their community and each other.

programme.title: Babies in Car City
programme.desc: Babies of Car City are the Cars and Trucks’ sons and daughters of Car City cars. They go to school, play at the playground and do all sorts of school-related activities. They like to spend time together and have fun! They each have created their own little world at the playground !

programme.title: Car Patrol
programme.desc: Mat the police car and the fire truck are the fearless detectives of the Car Patrol. Every time a vehicle in Car City gets into a trouble, the Car Patrol is there to make sure that everyone is safe. Join them in solving the mysteries of Car City!

programme.title: Super Truck
programme.desc: Super Truck is the most surprising truck of Car City. Whenever a vehicle is in danger and cannot do his truck job, Super Truck transforms himself and saves the day ! Follow Super truck, Car City's greatest hero in his amazing adventures.

programme.title: THOMAS & FRIENDS
programme.desc: This series follows the adventures of Thomas the Tank Engine and all of his engine friends on the Island of Sodor.

programme.title: AnimaCars Rescue
programme.desc: Welcome to Animaland, an Island populated by amazing creatures that are half animals, half vehicles: the Animacars. The only human around, the ingenious Jonny Toolbox, is a young engineer who can fix anything,

programme.title: Amber the Ambulance
programme.desc: Amber the Ambulance is the doctor of Car City, whenever a bulldozer, tractor, garbage truck, or bus needs to get healed, he goes to see Amber.

programme.title: THOMAS & FRIENDS
programme.desc: This series follows the adventures of Thomas the Tank Engine and all of his engine friends on the Island of Sodor.

programme.desc: Tom the Tow Truck, the famous truck of Car City, is also fond of painting . Tom welcomes his truck friends into his brand new Paint Shop and transforms them into their favorite character.

programme.title: Barbie Vlogger
programme.desc: Know Barbie like never before,she's a vlogger but not like any vlogger ,Barbie makes unique videos there are challenges ,Q&A and lots more

programme.title: Welliewishers
programme.desc: Based on the American Girl Doll, WellieWishers is about Willa, Camille, Emerson, Kendall and Ashlyn playing in Willa’s Aunt Miranda’s garden. for the animals by promising they'll work fast to beat an incoming storm. Sure enough, they get distracted, and the only way to salvage their fort is to make good on their broken promise.

programme.desc: Dino the Dinosaur is an ideal educational TV show for toddlers and preschoolers. Everyday, Dino learns shapes, colors, numbers and letters with enthusiasm. Both boys and girls will enjoy this show and learn with fun !

programme.desc: Pingu spends his days with his parents and his little sister Pinga. He finds himself in tricky and comical situations, but he always learns a lesson from them.

programme.desc: Welcome to Hot Wheels City, where there is never any shortage of mayhem. Cobras are on the loose, stealing valuable auto parts and fuel. Can our heroes Elliot and Chase rise up to the challenge and bring peace back to the city?

programme.title: Welliewishers

programme.title: Dino the Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dino the Dinosaur is an ideal educational TV show for toddlers and preschoolers. Everyday, Dino learns shapes, colors, numbers and letters with enthusiasm. Both boys and girls will enjoy this show and learn with fun !

programme.title: Tom the Tow Truck
programme.desc: Tom the Tow truck is an ingenious mechanic who is always there to help his friends. When accidents happen in Car City and vehicles get broken, Tom rushes to get them into his garage in order to repair them. Follow him in his important mission!

programme.title: Car Patrol
programme.desc: Mat the police car and the fire truck are the fearless detectives of the Car Patrol. Every time a vehicle in Car City gets into a trouble, the Car Patrol is there to make sure that everyone is safe. Join them in solving the mysteries of Car City!

programme.title: Jiu Jitsu - 10th Planet Eclipse 2019 Team Duel
programme.desc: Eddie Bravo has invited warriors from the top moons in the 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu system to the Headquarters in Downtown Los Angeles for a 5 on 5 team duel tournament. Check out this show highlight that showcases the most explosive moments at the 2019 Eclipse Team Duel Follow Eddie Bravo on Instagram @EddieBravo10p www.10thPlanetJJ.com Follow us on: Website: https://live.thegrapplingnetwork.com/ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/thegrapplingnetwork/ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@thegrapplingnetwork

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Grapplers Quest West Coast
programme.desc: Grapplers Quest was founded in 1996 and began the submission grappling fever throughout the martial arts world and set Grapplers Quest as the premiere submission grappling event. Check out these old school No Gi matches featuring UFC Champion B.J. Penn taking on Mike Cardoso- ADCC U.S. Trials Champion. Pioneering athletes like Marc Laimon, Dean Lister, Jeff ""Snowman"" Monson, Chris Brennan, Tony Desouza, Alexandre Dantas, Homer Moore, Alberto Crane, J.D. Penn, Garth Taylor and Sean Spangler. Don't miss the event that started a legacy in the sport of submission grappling and revoltionized ground fighting in the martial arts world."

programme.title: 10pQ 21 - The Featherweights
programme.desc: The best 10p athletes from around the world are here to test themselves against their teammates for a chance to get on the big stage; Combat Jiu Jitsu Worlds.

programme.title: Metal Snatchers- Ben Saunders- 10p UFC Training Camp
programme.desc: Ben Saunders spent part of his fight camp at 10th Planet HQ in downtown LA. In preparation for UFC ON FOX 13 he trains an unorthodox style of jiujitsu with an open mind akin to the Legendary Bruce Lee.

programme.title: HS Wrestling - 2024 California Championships
programme.desc: Today we’ll be checking out the 2024 CIF California State Wrestling Championships. These High School kids are the cream of the crop battling throughout the season to meet here in Bakersfield, CA. Checkout the championship final highlights from Birmingham Community Charter High School, Poway High School, Buchanan High School, Walnut High School, St. John Bosco High School, Newport Harbor High School, Santa Clara High School & Palm Desert high School.

programme.title: American Grappling - Seattle
programme.desc: American Grappling heads to Seattle, Washington. Coach Morgan heads to the world-famous Pike’s Market and get a taste of the Northwest. Our featured competitor is the black belt Nathan Orchard. Nathan is looking to make Team USA to tick the final box of his career…win a grappling world championship…but he’ll have to get past Eric Spence. Eric has wrestled his whole life and competed on a wrestling US World team. It’s the traditional clash of styles between wrestling and jiujitsu. Find out who’ll end up on top and secure their spot at the world team trials.

programme.title: Mat Made - Orlando
programme.desc: Kenny visits the University of Central Florida (UCF) to meet a Brazilian Jiu Jitsu icon, Ricardo Liborio. While Kenny is in Orlando, he finds an authentic Korean BBQ restaurant and takes on the Xtreme Ninja Challenge.

programme.title: Technique and Mindset featuring Rodolfo Vieira, Leandro Lo, Braulio Estima and Buchecha.
programme.desc: Rodolfo Vieira, Leandro Lo, Braulio Estima and Buchecha show some techniques, and discuss weight lifting, training and mindset.

programme.title: 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu - Team Duel 2020 Prelims
programme.desc: Eddie Bravo has invited warriors from the top moons in the 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu system to the Headquarters in Downtown Los Angeles for a 5 on 5 team duel tournament. This is the prelims. The winning team in this event goes on to compete in the following 10pTD, seen only on UFC Fightpass.

programme.title: ADCC - Denver Opens
programme.desc: The Opens make their way to the mile high city where the best martial arts from the US look to stake their claim for supremacy as the circuit heats up. In this heart-pounding instalment, we bring you all the action from the epic showdown held in the magnificent city of Denver. Former UFC Strawweight Champion of the World Rose Namajunas known for her exceptional martial arts abilities, Rose is now ready to put her skills to the ultimate test in the realm of grappling. Witness her transition from the cage to the mats, as she grapples her way through some of the most intense matches of her career. ADCC Opens superstar and prodigy 16-year-old phenom, Helena Craver, steps onto the mats to showcase her unparalleled talent. With her sights set on glory, she aims to conquer the teenage, adults, and absolute divisions a feat that has never been done before. In a clash of titans, long time elite grappler Ryan Aitkens, a formidable competitor in his own right, is set to go head-to-head against the multiple-time world champion, Mateus Lutes. Brace yourself for an explosive battle between these two grappling juggernauts, as they leave everything on the mats in pursuit of victory.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Tap Out Challenge - Oceanside
programme.desc: On October 15th at the picturesque Oceanside, CA, Charles Rials embarked on an incredible BJJ journey, challenging strangers from all walks of life to tap me out and claim $100. But there was a twist that none of them saw coming! Win or Lose, they got the MONEY!!! What they all shared was the courage to step up, the passion to engage, and the heart of a warrior. This video isn't just about BJJ or the challenge — it's a celebration of the human spirit, perseverance, and the unexpected twists that life (and jiu jitsu) can throw our way. Join Charles in this heartwarming, adrenaline-pumping journey where every challenge was met with respect, and every challenger was met with a surprise. Whether you're a BJJ enthusiast or someone who loves to witness genuine human moments, this video has something special for you.

programme.title: CPI - Sean O'Malley Recovers with Stem Cells
programme.desc: Anthony Kadel and Michael Plaster go to The Cellular Performance Institute in Tijuana, Mexico to cover the UFC's #1 ranked Bantamweight, "Suga" Sean O'Malley and his Coach Tim Welch. Spend a day with Sean and Tim as they embark on the road to recovery at the premier stem cell hospital. Presented by The Grappling Network.

programme.title: Mat Made - Orlando
programme.desc: Kenny visits the University of Central Florida (UCF) to meet a Brazilian Jiu Jitsu icon, Ricardo Liborio. While Kenny is in Orlando, he finds an authentic Korean BBQ restaurant and takes on the Xtreme Ninja Challenge.

programme.title: Dean Lister - Why Would You ignore 50% Of The Human Body?
programme.desc: In this video, Dean talks about when he first started using leg locks effectively in competition and submitting some of the biggest names in the sport. Plus, the 2012 Heavy Weight World Championships; Rodolfo Vieira vs Xande Ribeiro.

programme.title: Georges St-Pierre - Becoming a Better Martial Artist
programme.desc: Behind the scenes footage from Stuart Cooper of GSP training Jiujitsu and Wrestling with Roger Gracie and Braulio Estima who are 2 of the very best Grapplers on the planet. This footage includes an interview with GSP talking about how he approaches training in each discipline.

programme.title: College Wrestling- NWCA All Star Classic - Episode 1
programme.desc: Collegiate wrestling’s finest kick off their season. Alec Pantaleo vs B.J. Clagon, Matthew Kolodzik vs Max Thomsen, Nick Nevills vs Tanner Hall.

programme.title: Tap Out Challenge - Oceanside
programme.desc: On October 15th at the picturesque Oceanside, CA, Charles Rials embarked on an incredible BJJ journey, challenging strangers from all walks of life to tap me out and claim $100. But there was a twist that none of them saw coming! Win or Lose, they got the MONEY!!! What they all shared was the courage to step up, the passion to engage, and the heart of a warrior. This video isn't just about BJJ or the challenge — it's a celebration of the human spirit, perseverance, and the unexpected twists that life (and jiu jitsu) can throw our way. Join Charles in this heartwarming, adrenaline-pumping journey where every challenge was met with respect, and every challenger was met with a surprise. Whether you're a BJJ enthusiast or someone who loves to witness genuine human moments, this video has something special for you.

programme.title: El Coyote by Hook Thieves - Music Video Behind The Scenes
programme.desc: Follow 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu Founder Eddie Bravo as he shots his music video for his band- Hook Thieves, for their hit song “El Coyote”. Eddie partners with award winning music video Director Embryo at Studio 60 in Los Angeles to film a dramatic interaction between struggling migrants and border patrol agents. Check out the exclusive interviews and highlights from the music video, unexpected moments and stick around for the FULL music video.

programme.title: 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu - 20 Years in Orbit
programme.desc: Discover the pivotal moments that defined 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu's journey, a revolutionary evolution to the art of Jiu Jitsu that forever changed the landscape of martial arts that continues to shape the world of grappling. Join us as we celebrate this momentous anniversary, paying homage to the visionaries and pioneers who propelled this art form to new heights. Don't miss this must-watch documentary that will leave you inspired and in awe of the remarkable journey of 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu.

programme.title: Mat Made - Orlando
programme.desc: Kenny visits the University of Central Florida (UCF) to meet a Brazilian Jiu Jitsu icon, Ricardo Liborio. While Kenny is in Orlando, he finds an authentic Korean BBQ restaurant and takes on the Xtreme Ninja Challenge.

programme.title: Collegiate Grappling - Matador Madness
programme.desc:
Welcome to the 2024 Collegiate Grappling series here at Cal State Northridge with the 1st annual Matador Madness tournament.
We’ve got colleges and universities from all over the State converging here to test their grappling skills featuring UC San Diego, Cal Poly Pomona, San Diego State University, UC Berkley, UCLA and Cal State Northridge

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Grappling All-Stars
programme.desc: Grappling All Stars is a collection of the world's best grapplers in action on the mat from the OTM archives. Featuring; Renner Gracie, BJ Penn, Diego Sanchez, Jeff Glover, Dean Lister, and many more!

programme.title: Jiu Jitsu - 10th Planet Eclipse 2019 Team Duel
programme.desc: Eddie Bravo has invited warriors from the top moons in the 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu system to the Headquarters in Downtown Los Angeles for a 5 on 5 team duel tournament. Check out this show highlight that showcases the most explosive moments at the 2019 Eclipse Team Duel Follow Eddie Bravo on Instagram @EddieBravo10p www.10thPlanetJJ.com Follow us on: Website: https://live.thegrapplingnetwork.com/ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/thegrapplingnetwork/ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@thegrapplingnetwork

programme.title: Wrestling in ADCC - The Evolution of Wrestling, Jiu Jitsu and No Gi Grappling
programme.desc: Some of the greatest grapplers ever give their opinion on how important wrestling is for No Gi grappling and specifically ADCC. Plus, Joe Rogan and Eddie Bravo recap ADCC 2013.

programme.title: Garry Tonon - ADCC 2013 Breakout Performance
programme.desc: Kron Gracie reflects on his match with Garry Tonon and Joe Rogan and Eddie Bravo share their thoughts on the match and Garry's ADCC performance.

programme.title: USA Grappling – 2023 World Team Recap
programme.desc: Character Profile - Recap of Athletes competing in 2023 UWW World Championship in Poland. Ft. Brady Wicklund, Alex Enriquez, Kevin Crane, Christina Hansen, Gavin Teasdale, Guiseppe Lumanna, John Hanson, Emily Hauser, Mario Gonzalez, Paul Ardila, Sergio Ardila, Sheliah Lindsey, Tanner Cahill, and Tara White.

programme.title: Brandon Mccaghren - Wrestling for BJJ
programme.desc: Keelan Lawyer teaches wrestling for BJJ. Wrestling is quickly becoming an elemental pillar in leveling up your Jiu Jitsu Game. Brandon McCaghren shows off custom made mats, shares a few tips when making your own from 10th Planet Decatur.

programme.title: American Grappling - St. Louis
programme.desc: On this episode of American Grappling, the Qualifiers for 2024 have officially started ! This episode we see what talent the midwest has to offer with the Qualifiers being hosted in St Louis. Experience the city, the people and of course grappling as the USA Grappling team begin to build their new team for the World Championships. Directed, shot and edited by Anthony Kadel Produced by The Grappling Network

programme.title: Ultimate Mat Warriors 4 - Fly Weights
programme.desc: 16 Man Flyweight Tournament, No Points, Submission-Only Grappling. Hosted by 10th Planet San Diego head Black Belt, Boogeyman Richie Martinez.

programme.title: Mat Made - Nashville
programme.desc: Kenny visits Liberdade Jiu Jitsu in Nashville, TN with special guest and UFC veteran Din Thomas. See who wins the hot chicken challenge as they gulp beer down, tell Heather’s emotional redemption story, and ride mechanical bulls at the Wild Beaver Saloon.

programme.title: ADCC - Denver Opens
programme.desc: The Opens make their way to the mile high city where the best martial arts from the US look to stake their claim for supremacy as the circuit heats up. In this heart-pounding instalment, we bring you all the action from the epic showdown held in the magnificent city of Denver. Former UFC Strawweight Champion of the World Rose Namajunas known for her exceptional martial arts abilities, Rose is now ready to put her skills to the ultimate test in the realm of grappling. Witness her transition from the cage to the mats, as she grapples her way through some of the most intense matches of her career. ADCC Opens superstar and prodigy 16-year-old phenom, Helena Craver, steps onto the mats to showcase her unparalleled talent. With her sights set on glory, she aims to conquer the teenage, adults, and absolute divisions a feat that has never been done before. In a clash of titans, long time elite grappler Ryan Aitkens, a formidable competitor in his own right, is set to go head-to-head against the multiple-time world champion, Mateus Lutes. Brace yourself for an explosive battle between these two grappling juggernauts, as they leave everything on the mats in pursuit of victory.

programme.title: Rubber Guard 101
programme.desc: Brandon McCaghren goes over Rubber Guard. It is another staple of the 10th planet system. BMAC has some IMPORTANT details to keep in mind when playing this game.

programme.title: American Grappling - Seattle
programme.desc: American Grappling heads to Seattle, Washington. Coach Morgan heads to the world-famous Pike’s Market and get a taste of the Northwest. Our featured competitor is the black belt Nathan Orchard. Nathan is looking to make Team USA to tick the final box of his career…win a grappling world championship…but he’ll have to get past Eric Spence. Eric has wrestled his whole life and competed on a wrestling US World team. It’s the traditional clash of styles between wrestling and jiujitsu. Find out who’ll end up on top and secure their spot at the world team trials.

programme.desc: Rodolfo Vieira, Leandro Lo, Braulio Estima and Buchecha show some techniques, and discuss weight lifting, training and mindset.

programme.title: American Grappling - Seattle
programme.desc: American Grappling heads to Seattle, Washington. Coach Morgan heads to the world-famous Pike’s Market and get a taste of the Northwest. Our featured competitor is the black belt Nathan Orchard. Nathan is looking to make Team USA to tick the final box of his career…win a grappling world championship…but he’ll have to get past Eric Spence. Eric has wrestled his whole life and competed on a wrestling US World team. It’s the traditional clash of styles between wrestling and jiujitsu. Find out who’ll end up on top and secure their spot at the world team trials.

programme.title: Attitude is Everything featuring Keenan Cornelius and Josh Hinger
programme.desc: Stuart Cooper's short film covers ATOS jiu-jitsu Black Belts Keenan Cornelius and Josh Hinger, as they discuss having the right attitude towards your training and the mindset you must have to compete at the highest level.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E35 | The Canadian Sensation
programme.desc: It's the return of everyone's favorite poker degen to the Poker Night table: the Canadian sensation Gavin Smith! Witness his greatness for the start of day two here at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Alec Torelli, Esther Taylor, Matt Glantz, Gavin Smith, Chan Pelton, David Baker, and Maxx Coleman

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E23 | Toddler Fight Club
programme.desc: We bring in a new cast of characters to give their best at Choctaw Casino Resort. Featuring Etay Brady, Daphne Turner, Matt Russell, Brandon Cantu, Roger Sippl, Phil Hellmuth, Craig Stanley, Gavin Smith, Greg Himmelbrand, and Alec Torelli

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E36 | Outplayed Like A Mo-Fo
programme.desc: If watching infamous poker player Mike Dentale experience excruciating pain is your jam, then this episode is for you. It's part two day two at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Alec Torelli, Esther Taylor, Mike Dentale, Gavin Smith, Chan Pelton, David Baker, and Will Berry

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E01 | Twitch Celebrity Cash Game | Part 1 - It Begins
programme.desc: We collect the best poker streamers from Twitch.tv, as well as a few notable Vegas pros, to host our first ever Twitch Celebrity Cash Game. From a secret location in Las Vegas, NV we find out if the streamers can hang with the live players...or vise versa...featuring Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E02 | Twitch Celebrity Cash Game | Part 2 - Rampage
programme.desc: Our exclusive Twitch Celebrity Cash Game is in full swing, and the only thing more outrageous than the personalities is the pot sizes. From a private residence living room in Las Vegas, NV, this is cash game poker at its most entertaining. Featuring Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E03 | Twitch Celebrity Cash Game | Part 3 - The Kissing Bet
programme.desc: The Twitch Celebrity Cash Game in Las Vegas barrels on into the night as our curated collection of Twitch streamers and Vegas pros swap chips and insults. Featuring Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Maria Ho, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E04 | Twitch Celebrity Cash Game | Part 4 - "Damn, Daniel!"
programme.desc: As word gets around Las Vegas that our cash game is in full swing, some notable players stop by and try and get in. Featuring Daniel Negreanu, Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Maria Ho, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E05 | Twitch Celebrity Cash Game | Part 5 - Psychic Flow
programme.desc: The poker from Las Vegas continues apace, and Phil Laak channels the psychic energy of the universal overmind to hone his poker play. Featuring Daniel Negreanu, Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Maria Ho, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E06 | Twitch Celebrity Cash Game | Part 6 - Aces On The Felt, Aces That Fly
programme.desc: After losing the biggest pot in Poker Night history, Antonio Esfandiari is slowing regaining ground. Can he continue to build his stack against the best online and live players in Vegas? Featuring Daniel Negreanu, Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Maria Ho, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E07 | Needle In Chip Stack
programme.desc: Settle in for a "friendly" game of poker in upstate New York with us as we visit Turning Stone Resort Casino. Featuring Mike Sigel, Dew Micali, Matt Glantz, Steve Ruddock, Jared Bleznick, Samantha Abernathy, Shaun Deeb, Joe McKeehen, and Mike Dentale

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E08 | Upstate Action
programme.desc: All it takes is a few All-Ins to put these pros on tilt. Find out who ends up getting felted, from our exclusive cash game at Turning Stone Resort Casino in Upstate New York. Featuring Mike Sigel, Dew Micali, Matt Glantz, Rep Porter, Jared Bleznick, Samantha Abernathy, Shaun Deeb, Joe McKeehen, and Mike Dentale

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E09 | Awkward Silence...
programme.desc: Nothing brings the mood at the table down faster than a sore loser after a bad beat...which is EXACTLY what happens in this episode. The tension is thick at Turning Stone Resort Casino. Featuring Mike Sigel, Bart Hanson, Matt Glantz, Rep Porter, Jared Bleznick, Samantha Abernathy, Shaun Deeb, Joe McKeehen, and Mike Dentale

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E10 | Pillow Talk
programme.desc: Joe McKeehen and Tom Canulli square off at our table months ahead of their 2015 WSOP final table show down. Featuring Richard Anthony, Dominick Christiano, Alec Torelli, Thomas Cannuli, Matt Glantz, Travell Thomas, Joe McKeehen, Shaun Deeb, and Bart Hanson

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E11 | Turn and Burn
programme.desc: There are some hurt feelings after some big hands in this invite-only cash game from Turning Stone Resort Casino in Verona, NY. Featuring Richard Anthony, Rep Porter, Alec Torelli, Thomas Cannuli, Mike Dentale, Travell Thomas, Joe McKeehen, Shaun Deeb, and Bart Hanson

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E12 | Coach Fight
programme.desc: Two prominent poker coaches square off on our table from Turning Stone Resort Casino in Verona, NY. Featuring Richard Anthony, Rep Porter, Alec Torelli, Thomas Cannuli, Mike Dentale, Travell Thomas, Joe McKeehen, Shaun Deeb, and Bart Hanson

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E13 | Shots, Shots, Shots
programme.desc: There is an alligator in the parking lot, and Hellmuth's luck runs out at Seminole Hard Rock Casino Resort in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Jared Jaffee, Sorel Mizzi, Matt Glantz, Alec Torelli, Matt Affleck, Michael Sigel, Ben Tarzia, Jennifer Tilly, Samantha Abernathy, Dan O'Brien, and Phil Hellmuth

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E14 | Hard Knocks At Hard Rock
programme.desc: Jennifer Tilly tries to dig herself out of a hole. Featuring Jared Jaffee, Sorel Mizzi, Matt Glantz, Alec Torelli, Matt Affleck, Michael Sigel, Ben Tarzia, Jennifer Tilly, Samanta Abernathy, Dan O'Brien, and Phil Hellmuth

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E15 | Upstuck
programme.desc: Laak and Hellmuth square off, and Jess Dawley shows us the breakfast of champions. Featuring Alec Torelli, Phil Laak, Asher Conniff, Josh Beckley, Abbey Daniels, Joe McKeehen, Phil Hellmuth, Jessica Dawley, Michael Laake, Esther Taylor-Brady, Blake Bohn

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E16 | Phil vs Phil
programme.desc: Laak has good news and bad news for Hellmuth as our cash game winds down at Seminole Hard Rock Casino Resort in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Alec Torelli, Phil Laak, Asher Conniff, Josh Beckley, Abbey Daniels, Joe McKeehen, Phil Hellmuth, Jessica Dawley, Michael Laake, Esther Taylor-Brady, Blake Bohn

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E17 | The Robot
programme.desc: We bring our invite-only cash game to Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, and a new player calculates the odds. Featuring Matt Glantz, Sam Ganzfried, Dave Eldridge, David Baker, Igor Ioffe, Jennifer Harman, Phil Laak, Dan Wolf, and Jennifer Tilly.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E18 | Claudico: Part 1
programme.desc: We continue our cash game from the Rivers Casino, and we begin the first part of our series featuring the poker playing artificial intelligence named "Claudico". Featuring Matt Glantz, Sam Ganzfried, Dave Eldridge, David Baker, Igor Ioffe, Jennifer Harman, Phil Laak, Dan Wolf, and Jennifer Tilly.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E19 | Claudico: Part 2
programme.desc: Our cash game meanders on at the Rivers Casino, and we show Part 2 of our series featuring the poker-playing artificial intelligence named "Claudico". Featuring Tom Schneider, Dan Wolf, Mike Vierheller, David Baker, Jack Schanbacher, Phil Laak, Igor "Eric" Ioffe, and Mark "Pegasus" Smith

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E20 | Claudico: Part 3
programme.desc: Tom Schneider carpet bombs donkeys, and we conclude our artificial intelligence feature highlighting "Claudico", and advanced poker playing AI. Featuring Tom Schneider, Dan Wolf, Mike Vierheller, David Baker, Jack Schanbacher, Phil Laak, Igor "Eric" Ioffe, and Mark "Pegasus" Smith.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E21 | Carrol Top
programme.desc: We bring our cash game for the first time to Choctaw Resort Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Pros and locals square off, and Jim Carrol has a bag of tricks. Featuring Cate Hall, Brandon Cantu, Todd Brunson, Dennis Phillips, BJ Imejjane, Kage Gardner, George Ritacco, Phil Hellmuth, and Jim Carroll

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E22 | Blind Hands and Props
programme.desc: Our game continues from Choctaw Casino Resort in Durant, Oklahoma, and props fly across the tabe. Featuring Cate Hall, Brandon Cantu, Todd Brunson, Dennis Phillips, BJ Imejjane, Kage Gardner, George Ritacco, Phil Hellmuth, and Jim Carroll

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E23 | Toddler Fight Club
programme.desc: We bring in a new cast of characters to give their best at Choctaw Casino Resort. Featuring Etay Brady, Daphne Turner, Matt Russell, Brandon Cantu, Roger Sippl, Phil Hellmuth, Craig Stanley, Gavin Smith, Greg Himmelbrand, and Alec Torelli

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E24 | Rich Friends
programme.desc: We find out why bluffs are like potato chips at Choctaw Resort Casino. Featuring Etay Brady, Daphne Turner, Matt Russell, Brandon Cantu, Roger Sippl, Phil Hellmuth, Craig Stanley, Gavin Smith, Greg Himmelbrand, and Alec Torelli

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E25 | Face Up With Phil Hellmuth: Part 1
programme.desc: Texahoma Hold'em at its best from Choctaw Casino Resort. Also, we go deep with Phil Hellmuth in our first ever interview segment called Face Up. Featuring Nelda Escamilla, Alec Torelli, Phil Hellmuth, Todd Brunson, Dany George, Brandon Cantu, Roger Sippl, Gavin Smith, Jason Ettredge, and Cate Hall

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E26 | Face Up With Phil Hellmuth: Part 2
programme.desc: Texahoma locals show our pros a few tricks. Also, we conclude our first ever Face Up interview with Phil Hellmuth. Featuring Nelda Escamilla, Alec Torelli, Phil Hellmuth, Todd Brunson, Dany George, Brandon Cantu, Roger Sippl, Gavin Smith, Jason Ettredge, and Cate Hall

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E27 | Our 100th Episode!
programme.desc: We head back to Seminole Hard Rock Casino in Hollywood, Florida with a few of our favorite poker players. Some of them wake up with good hands, but others are stuck in a chip nightmare. Featuring Ian O'hara, Stewart Newman, Phil Laak, Mukul Pahuja, Phil Hellmuth, Alec Torelli, David Silverman, Jeff Gross, Matt Seidman

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E28 | Shades vs Goggles
programme.desc: Seminole Hard Rock Casino in Hollywood, FL hosts our cash game while the players test out different eyewear at the table. Featuring Ian O'hara, Stewart Newman, Phil Laak, Noah Schwartz, Phil Hellmuth, Alec Torelli, David Silverman, Jeff Gross, Matt Seidman

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E29 | Kentucky Fried Poker
programme.desc: We head to Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, PA where our very own Chris Hanson becomes an honorary Kentucky Colonel. Plus, our crew tells the harrowing tale of #GroundPizza. Featuring Matt Glantz, Chris Horter, Mark Smith, Phil Laak, Dave Eldridge, Jennifer Harman, Tom Schneider

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E30 | Attack Of The Yinzers
programme.desc: The locals in Pittsburgh show the pros how its done from Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, PA. Featuring Jennifer Tilly, Chris Horter, Nick Immekus, David Baker, Dan Wolf, Jennifer Harman, Jason Andrews, Dave Eldridge, Matt Glantz, Phil Laak, Tom Schneider, Mark Smith

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E31 | Down In The Valley
programme.desc: Poker Night in America makes its first visit to Thunder Valley Casino Resort just outside of Sacramento, CA. Featuring Mark Kroon, Maria Ho, Scott Ball, Phil Hellmuth, Alan Richardson, Lorrie Corvin, Mike Ross

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E32 | A Toast To Good Fortune
programme.desc: We continue our cash game from Thunder Valley Casino Resort, and as individual chip fortunes rise and fall some players realize their good fortune overall. Featuring Rep Porter, Maria Ho, Scott Ball, Phil Hellmuth, Alan Richardson, Bart Hanson, Mike Ross

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E33 | Billionaire Besties
programme.desc: Some of Phil Hellmuth's best friends from Silicon Valley join our table at Thunder Valley Casino Resort. Featuring Anthony Pagan, Jason Calacanis, David Baker, Phil Hellmuth, Tom West, Chamath Palihapitiya, Taylor Paur

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E34 | Money Buys Happiness
programme.desc: The poker action is non-stop, and so are the name drops from Thunder Valley Casino Resort. Featuring Matt Glantz, Jason Calicanis, David Baker, Phil Hellmuth, Bob Mather, Chamath Palihapitiya, Bart Hanson, Anthony Pagan, Maria Ho, Taylor Paur, Tom West

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E35 | California Cooler
programme.desc: The stakes heat up as the night winds down at Thunder Valley Casino Resort. Featuring JC Tran, Mike Ross, Mark Bonsack, Phil Hellmuth, Keith Bowman, Bart Hanson, David Baker

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E36 | Favorite Poker Ho
programme.desc: We conclude the poker from our first visit to NorCal and Thunder Valley Casino Resort. Featuring Mike Ross, Mark Kroon, JC Tran, Doug Lorgeree, Bart Hanson, David Baker, Maria Ho, Phil Hellmuth, Keith Bowman, Mark Bonsack

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E37 | Sleeveless In Paradise
programme.desc: We film cash game poker in the Paradise Live stage at the Seminole Hard Rock Resort in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Paul Harris, Jake Schindler, Samantha Abernathy, Mike Dentale, Mike Sigel, Joe DiPascale

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E38 | Mike Check
programme.desc: Jennifer Tilly meets a bunch of Mikes at our cash game table from the Paradise Live stage at Seminole Hard Rock Casino Resort in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Greg Marcus, Alex Rocha, Michael Laake, Jennifer Tilly, Mike Dentale, Mike Sigel, Joe DiPascale

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E39 | The One That Got Away
programme.desc: From Seminole Hard Rock Casino Resort in Hollywood, Florida, Vanessa Rousso makes her first appearance on Poker Night along with some regulars to the show. Featuring Phil Laak, Vanessa Rousso, Matt Affleck, Jared Jaffee, Noah Schwartz, Alan Richardson, Glynn Beebe

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E40 | Straight Shooter
programme.desc: Phil Laak puts his chips in with "delicate, consistent, well-appointed strength" from Seminole Hard Rock Casino Resort in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Mukul Pahuja, Matt Salsberg, Matt Affleck, Phil Laak, Dan Shak, Esther Taylor, Asher Conniff

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E41 | Ladies Night III
programme.desc: Back by popular demand, we invited just the ladies to Seminole Hard Rock in Hollywood, Florida, for a night of poker with considerably less body hair around the table. Featuring Vanessa Rousso, Esther Taylor, Samantha Abernathy, Danielle Anderson, Abbey Daniels, Natasha Mercier, Stacey Sullivan

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E42 | Ace Race
programme.desc: Ladies Night III continues from Seminole Hard Rock in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Vanessa Rousso, Esther Taylor, Samantha Abernathy, Danielle Anderson, Abbey Daniels, Natasha Mercier, Stacey Sullivan

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E01 | Face Up With Jennifer Tilly
programme.desc: We showcase cash game action from Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, PA. Plus, we do our first in-depth interview with Jennifer Tilly. Featuring Jennifer Tilly, Matt Glantz, Bobby Noel, Jack Schanbacher, Shaun Deeb, Maria Ho, Jason Andrews, Griffin Abel, Dave Eldrige

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E02 | Any Two Cards
programme.desc: Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, PA hosts our cash game while our invited pros start to play a little loose. Also, we show Part 2 of our in-depth interview with Jennifer Tilly. Featuring Matt Brady, Alec Torelli, Jennifer Tilly, Jack Schanbacher, Shaun Deeb, Daniel Wolf, Dave Eldridge, Matt Glantz, Bobby Noel, Jason Andrews

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E03 | The Rivers of Pittsburgh
programme.desc: Our pros go all the way to the river in our exclusive cash game from Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, PA. Featuring Patsy Altomari, Alec Torelli, Keith Morrow, Jennifer Tilly, Daniel Wolf, Matt Glantz, Griffin Abel

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E04 | The Wizard
programme.desc: Misty morning, clouds in the sky, without warning, the wizard walks by our cash game at Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, PA. Featuring Claude Petroy, Alec Torelli, Keith Morrow, Jennifer Tilly, Daniel Wolf, Stepan Gusak, Griffin Abel, Patsy Altomari, Matt Glantz

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E05 | Where There's Smoke...
programme.desc: We visit the poker room at SugarHouse Casino in Philadelphia, PA, and rub elbows with some of the East Coast's most notable players. Featuring Greg Fishberg, Todd Brunson, Matt Glantz, Linda Kenney Baden, Mark Herm, Joe McKeehen, and Gajan Jeganathan

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E06 | Face Up With Shaun Deeb
programme.desc: We continue the poker party at SugarHouse Casino, with east coast grinders battling hand for hand in Philadelphia. Plus, we showcase the first part of our in-depth interview with the always-controversial Shaun Deeb. Featuring Todd Brunson, Linda Kenny Baden, Joe Mckeehen, Matt Glantz, Greg Fishberg, Yitong Wang, and Shaun Deeb

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E07 | Pay The Troll Toll
programme.desc: Our second day of filming at SugarHouse Casino in Philadelphia, PA begins with some big hands and small needles. Featuring Matt Glantz, Todd Brunson, Jo Kim, Mike Sigel, Greg Himmelbrand, Shaun Deeb, Tony Reed, and Thai Ha

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E08 | Sugar And Spice
programme.desc: The poker spices up as the night winds down at SugarHouse Casino in Philadelphia, PA. Featuring Kyle Bowker, Todd Brunson, Akim Akimov, Mike Sigel, Matt Brady, Shaun Deeb, and Thai Ha

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E09 | Face Up With E-Tay
programme.desc: We return to Hollywood, Florida to visit the Seminole Hard Rock Hotel and Casino, plus we showcase the first segment of our in-depth interview with Esther Taylor. Featuring Cate Hall, Jason Mercier, Jennifer Tilly, Stewart Newman, Wendeen Eolis, Esther Taylor, and Tim Reilly.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E10 | Charitable Donations
programme.desc: Jason Mercier makes a "donation" to the table as our first day of filming at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, FL comes to a close. Featuring Cate Hall, Jason Mercier, Jennifer Tilly, Stewart Newman, Wendeen Eolis, Esther Taylor, and Tim Reilly

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E11 | Cranberries
programme.desc: We begin our second day of filming cash game action at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, FL. Featuring Tom Marchese, Jessica Dawley, Matt Berkey, Jennifer Tilly, Dan O'Brien, Aaron Mermelstein, and Dan Suied

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E12 | Woe Is Stapes
programme.desc: Our exclusive cash game continues from Seminole Hard Rock from Hollywood, FL, with some tough cards hitting the community, but it seems to hit Joe Stapleton hardest of all. Featuring Tom Marchese, Jessica Dawley, Matt Berkey, Jennifer Tilly, Dan O'Brien, Aaron Mermelstein, and Dan Suied

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E13 | The Man With The Biggest Stack
programme.desc: Brad Garrett joins our table at Seminole Hard Rock in Hollywood, FL. Can he hold his own against the pros? He's certainly got a big enough chip stack! Featuring Brad Garrett, Jennifer Tilly, Jason Mercier, Kyle Bowker, Brandon Adams, Ryan Fee, and Eric Wasserson

programme.title: Poker Night In America | Livestream Series | Golden Nugget Las Vegas
programme.desc: Poker Night visits the famous Golden Nugget in Las Vegas! Featuring Phil Hellmuth, Maria Ho, Liv Boeree, Phil Laak, Bill Lee, Greg Merson, and Joe Cada.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E14 | You Are A Mother #%$@&r!
programme.desc: Jennifer Tilly goes full Jennifer TILTy as we conclude our filming at Seminole Hard Rock at Hollywood, FL. Featuring Eric Wasserson, Esther Taylor, Ryan Fee, Jennifer Tilly, Jason Mercier, Kyle Bowker, and Michael Laake

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E15 | Winterhalter Is Coming
programme.desc: We corral seven of California's poker elite at our cash game table hosted by Thunder Valley Casino Resort in Lincoln, CA. Featuring Lee Markholt, Kelly Winterhalter, David Sands, Phil Hellmuth, Harlan Karnofsky, Rep Porter, Keith McNair, and Bob Mather

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E16 | Quick Sands
programme.desc: Our cash game continues from the beautiful Thunder Valley Casino Resort in Lincoln, CA. Featuring Lee Markholt, Kelly Winterhalter, David Sands, Phil Hellmuth, Jerry Utke, Matt Glantz, Rep Porter, Keith McNair, and Bob Mather

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E17 | Top Golf
programme.desc: We begin our second day of filming cash game action at Thunder Valley Casino Resort in Lincoln, CA, plus our players take a visit to a Top Golf facility to show off their driving chops. Featuring Matt Glantz, Tom Schneider, Kelly Winterhalter, Brad Garrett, Tony Bracy, Phil Hellmuth, and Harlan Karnofsky

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E18 | Way Down In The Valley
programme.desc: We conclude our epic cash game from Thunder Valley Casino in Lincoln, CA. Featuring Brad Garrett, Phil Hellmuth, Lee Markholt, Tom Schneider, Kelly Winterhalter, Tony Bracy, Rep Porter, and Jed Hoffman

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E19 | P.O.W.
programme.desc: Phil Laak invents new poker terms during our first visit to Golden Nugget Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada. Featuring Joe Cada, Maria Ho, Greg Mueller, Greg Merson, Phil Hellmuth, Bill Lee, Liv Boeree, and Phil Laak

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E20 | Heckmuth
programme.desc: We get some epic Hellmuth rants in this episode from Golden Nugget Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada. Featuring Joe Cada, Maria Ho, Greg Mueller, Phil Hellmuth, Brandon Cantu, Bill Lee, Liv Boeree, and Phil Laak

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E21 | Pass The Eight Ball
programme.desc: The outlook is good for our players as we begin our second day of filming at The Golden Nugget Casino in Las Vegas Nevada. Featuring Jim Carroll, Craig Casino, Stan Jablonksi, Jared Jaffee, Mario Orozco, Richard Roeper, and Brandon Cantu

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E22 | Not Live From Las Vegas
programme.desc: We close out the second day of our series from The Golden Nugget Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada with the best hands from the night. Featuring Jim Carroll, Craig Casino, Stan Jablonksi, Jared Jaffee, Mario Orozco, Richard Roeper, Matt Glantz, Mike Dentale, and Brandon Cantu

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E23 | Maybe I Just Hit Quads
programme.desc: We shake up the cast at our table as we begin our third day of filming from The Golden Nugget in Las Vegas, Nevada. Featuring Alan Richardson, Ryan Fee, Kyle Bowker, Jennifer Tilly, Cindy Kerslake, Bryn Kenney, and Esther Taylor

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E24 | Panning For Gold
programme.desc: Our players try and sift for those last few nuggets as the night winds down on our visit to The Golden Nugget Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada. Featuring Alan Richardson, Ryan Fee, Kyle Bowker, Jennifer Tilly, Cindy Kerslake, Bryn Kenney, and Esther Taylor

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E25 | Poker Night In Canada!
programme.desc: We team up with our friends at partypoker to make our first trip to Canada! Playground Poker Club in Montreal is host to our high-stakes cash game, played by luminaries from the US, Canada, and the UK. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Francois Safieddine, Ouri Ohayon, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E26 | A Playground For Poker
programme.desc: The pros at partypoker sling chips at nose-bleed stakes with their friends at Playground Poker Club in Montreal. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Francois Safieddine, Ouri Ohayon, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E27 | Mauvais Coup
programme.desc: There are some wicked turn outs for the partypoker pros as the poker at Playground Poker Club in Montreal winds down on the first day of our visit. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Jeff Gross, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E28 | partypoker Poker Party
programme.desc: We begin our second day at Playground Poker Club in Montreal, Quebec, and the pros from partypoker face off against some of the best players in North America. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Jeff Gross, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E29 | Montreal Nights
programme.desc: Our second day of filming at Playground Poker Club draws to a close as the pros from partypoker try to draw to a straight. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Jeff Gross, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E30 | Glantzing Blows
programme.desc: Poker Night in America Ambassador Matt Glantz joins the partypoker table at Playground Poker Club in Montreal to see how he fares against poker luminaries from Canada and the UK. Featuring Matt Glantz, John Duthie, Mike Dentale, Rob Yong, Pascal Lefrancois, Samuel Chartier, and Elliot Smith.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E31 | Mount Royal Flush
programme.desc: As our third day at Playground Poker Club in Montreal carries on, we showcase some hands we can't believe and some names we can't pronounce. Featuring Manig Loeser, John Duthie, Mike Dentale, Rob Yong, Pascal Lefrancois, Samuel Chartier, and Elliot Smith.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E32 | The City of Saints
programme.desc: We conclude our final day of filming with the pros at partypoker at the Playground Poker Club in Montreal Featuring Manig Loeser, John Duthie, Jason Koon, Rob Yong, Pascal Lefrancois, Samuel Chartier, and Elliot Smith.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E33 | Hanson Family Values
programme.desc: Our first day of high stakes cash kicks off at Choctaw Casino, where Kyle Bowker puts on a poker clinic and runs over this table full of sharks! Featuring Bart Hanson, Kane Kalas, Mike Ross, Kyle Bowker, David Baker, Douglas Lorgeree and Sean Mates.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E34 | The Butcher, The Baker, The Over Pair Maker
programme.desc: Can anything stop Kyle Bowker? Apparently not the sharks at this high stakes cash game. It's the secone half of day one here at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Bart Hanson, Kane Kalas, Mike Ross, Kyle Bowker, David Baker, Douglas Lorgeree, Bobby Greeson and Sean Mates.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E35 | The Canadian Sensation
programme.desc: It's the return of everyone's favorite poker degen to the Poker Night table: the Canadian sensation Gavin Smith! Witness his greatness for the start of day two here at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Alec Torelli, Esther Taylor, Matt Glantz, Gavin Smith, Chan Pelton, David Baker, and Maxx Coleman

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E36 | Outplayed Like A Mo-Fo
programme.desc: If watching infamous poker player Mike Dentale experience excruciating pain is your jam, then this episode is for you. It's part two day two at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Alec Torelli, Esther Taylor, Mike Dentale, Gavin Smith, Chan Pelton, David Baker, and Will Berry

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E37 | Carrot Top of Poker
programme.desc: The Carrot Top of Poker, Jim Carroll, covers the table in comedic props, and Table Captain Gavin Smith is having none of it! This is Day 3 Part 1 at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Jim Carroll, Alec Torelli, Abdyl Konjuhi, Gavin Smith, Matt Russell, Bart Hanson, and Tom Gray

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E38 | Good Hugger
programme.desc: Alec Torelli shows us why he is one of the best players in the biz, and Gavin Smith gets a hug. It's the end of Day 3 here at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Jim Carroll, Alec Torelli, Abdyl Konjuhi, Gavin Smith, Matt Russell, Kyle Bowker, and Denise Good

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E39 | Fold Like A Pro
programme.desc: Kyle Bowker puts on a clinic on proper folds, and Nick Immekus takes on Brandon Cantu in a roller coaster of a hand! This is Day 1 of our cash game at Rivers Casino Pittsburgh! Featuring Shaun Deeb, Todd Brunson, Kyle Bowker, Eli Elezra, Brandon Cantu, Kane Kalas and Nick Immekus.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E40 | Fullest House
programme.desc: Sometimes being on a boat is a bad thing. Just ask David Eldridge. Day 1 continues here at Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh! Featuring Shaun Deeb, Todd Brunson, Kyle Bowker, Sam Ganzfried, Kane Kalas and Nick Immekus.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E41 | Manifold Puma
programme.desc: Jack Schanbacher goes to great lengths for a possible win with seven deuce, and Joe Stapleton reveals himself to be a cat fancier. This is Day 2 of Poker Night in America at Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh. Featuring Mark Puma, Jack Schanbacher, Kyle Bowker, Todd Brunson, Kane Kalas, Shaun Deeb and Austin Wentling.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E42 | Grandma's Game
programme.desc: This episode features a very special appearance by Irene Schanbacher, Jack's grandmother! Day 2 continues here at Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh! Featuring Mark Puma, Jack Schanbacher, Kyle Bowker, Todd Brunson, Kane Kalas, Shaun Deeb, Austin Wentling and Irene Schanbacher.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E43 | Hi Rollerz!
programme.desc: We trade in our typical $25/50 game for $100/200! It's our High Roller table for Day 1 here at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Florida! Featuring Matt Berkey, Chance Kornuth, Joey DiPascale, Jason Mercier, James Calderaro, Bill Perkins and Mustapha Kanit!

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E44 | Ride the Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Fortunes are won and lost in this high roller game! This is what poker is all about! Day 1 continues here at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Florida! Featuring Matt Berkey, Chance Kornuth, Joey DiPascale, Jason Mercier, James Calderaro, Bill Perkins and Mustapha Kanit!

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E45 | High Altitude Poker
programme.desc: In this episode, more money crosses the table than most of us will ever see in our lifetime. Isn't that... awesome?! Day 1 of our High Roller game concludes here at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Matt Berkey, Chance Kornuth, Joey DiPascale, Jason Mercier, James Calderaro, Bill Perkins and Mustapha Kanit!

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E46 | Themyscira
programme.desc: Ladies Night returns to Poker Night in America! Samantha Abernathy flexes her bluffing muscles and Jessica Dawley gets crazy lucky on the river! Day 2 begins at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Florida! Featuring Natasha Mercier, Cate Hall, Lexy Gavin, Samantha Abernathy, Jessica Dawley, Kelly Minkin and Jamie Kerstetter!

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E47 | Guilty Sam
programme.desc: Sam Abernathy feels so guilty about winning all the time! And who can blame her! Day 2 continues here at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Florida! Featuring Natasha Mercier, Cate Hall, Lexy Gavin, Samantha Abernathy, Jessica Dawley, Kelly Minkin and Jamie Kerstetter!

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E48 | Bluffmeister
programme.desc: Cate Hall discovers that she and Mike Dentale finally have something in common! Day 2 concludes of our Ladies Night Cash Game here at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Florida! Featuring Natasha Mercier, Cate Hall, Lexy Gavin, Samantha Abernathy, Jessica Dawley and Jamie Kerstetter!

programme.title: Poker Night TV
programme.desc: John Duthie and the regulars from the Dusk Til Dawn game in London take to the beaches of Punta Cana where they are ambushed by Michael Chi Zhang. Featuring John Duthie, Michael Chi Zhang, Justin Sevilla, Timothy Chung, Luke Marsh and Vish Maini.

programme.title: Poker Night TV
programme.desc: Shaun Deeb joins the Dusk Til Dawn crew for some fish & chips and bad beats. Michael Chi Zhang continues to crush. Featuring John Duthie, Michael Chi Zhang, Justin Sevilla, Timothy Chung, Shawn Deeb and Vish Maini.

programme.title: Volvo C40 Recharge Crash & Safety Tests
programme.desc: The fully electric Volvo C40 Recharge has been awarded a fivestar safety rating in the 2022 Euro NCAP tests, joining its siblings in the Volvo Cars lineup as one of the safest cars on the road today.

programme.title: Maserati Levante Modena
programme.desc: Animated by a 580 horsepower V8 engine, they will speed along on 21inch wheels, the largest sizes within this range. The hood of the Ghibli, already considered one of the most beautiful sedans ever, will boast two supplementary air vents, which relieve the heat whilst bustling a gritty roar.

programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Hyundai Palisade Off Road driving
programme.desc: The design of the 2023 Palisade conveys dignified refinement with clear differentiation worthy of a flagship SUV. A wider, cascading grille form outlines rugged parametric shield elements for a premium appearance. The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic worldfirst climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. programme.desc: The design of the 2023 Palisade conveys dignified refinement with clear differentiation worthy of a flagship SUV. A wider, cascading grille form outlines rugged parametric shield elements for a premium appearance. The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Range Rover Sport Exterior Design in Grey
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic worldfirst climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute.

programme.title: Hyundai Palisade Off Road driving
programme.desc: The design of the 2023 Palisade conveys dignified refinement with clear differentiation worthy of a flagship SUV. A wider, cascading grille form outlines rugged parametric shield elements for a premium appearance. The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.title: Hyundai Palisade
programme.desc: The design of the 2023 Palisade conveys dignified refinement with clear differentiation worthy of a flagship SUV. A wider, cascading grille form outlines rugged parametric shield elements for a premium appearance. The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.title: Range Rover Sport Interior Design
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic worldfirst climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute.

programme.title: The Audi RS Q e tron rocks Hamburg
programme.desc: The futuristic Audi RS Q etron was one of the stars at the FUTURE MOVES New Mobility Summit as part of the OMR Festival in Hamburg on Tuesday. With a spectacular trip from the container port to the exhibition center, Swedish Audi driver Mattias Ekström and his codriver Emil Bergkvist generated a lot of excitement in the runup to the event.

programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Hyundai Palisade Off Road driving
programme.desc: The design of the 2023 Palisade conveys dignified refinement with clear differentiation worthy of a flagship SUV. A wider, cascading grille form outlines rugged parametric shield elements for a premium appearance. The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Hyundai Palisade Off Road driving
programme.desc: The design of the 2023 Palisade conveys dignified refinement with clear differentiation worthy of a flagship SUV. A wider, cascading grille form outlines rugged parametric shield elements for a premium appearance. The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Hyundai Palisade Off Road driving
programme.desc: The design of the 2023 Palisade conveys dignified refinement with clear differentiation worthy of a flagship SUV. A wider, cascading grille form outlines rugged parametric shield elements for a premium appearance. The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.title: Range Rover Sport
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic worldfirst climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute.

programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Hyundai Palisade Off Road driving
programme.desc: The design of the 2023 Palisade conveys dignified refinement with clear differentiation worthy of a flagship SUV. A wider, cascading grille form outlines rugged parametric shield elements for a premium appearance. The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.title: Range Rover Sport
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic worldfirst climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute.

programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Hyundai Palisade Off Road driving
programme.desc: The design of the 2023 Palisade conveys dignified refinement with clear differentiation worthy of a flagship SUV. A wider, cascading grille form outlines rugged parametric shield elements for a premium appearance. The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.title: Range Rover Sport
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic worldfirst climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute.
