programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic worldfirst climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute.

New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Hyundai Palisade
programme.desc: The design of the 2023 Palisade conveys dignified refinement with clear differentiation worthy of a flagship SUV. A wider, cascading grille form outlines rugged parametric shield elements for a premium appearance. The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

A wider, cascading grille form outlines rugged parametric shield elements for a premium appearance. The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.title: Range Rover Sport with Anthony Joshua & Jessica Hawkins
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic worldfirst climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute.

programme.title: Toyota Highlander with New Turbocharged Engine
programme.desc: The Toyota Highlander has been the No. 1 retail midsize SUV for six years running, no easy feat in one of the most intensely competitive segments. Now, for 2023, Highlander is giving buyers even more reasons to choose this handsdown winner, starting with an allnew engine for the gas models and also including larger multimedia screens and other amenities for greater value across all grades and powertrains.

programme.title: The Audi RS Q e tron rocks Hamburg
programme.desc: The futuristic Audi RS Q etron was one of the stars at the FUTURE MOVES New Mobility Summit as part of the OMR Festival in Hamburg on Tuesday. With a spectacular trip from the container port to the exhibition center, Swedish Audi driver Mattias Ekström and his codriver Emil Bergkvist generated a lot of excitement in the runup to the event.

programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Hyundai Palisade Off Road driving
programme.desc: The design of the 2023 Palisade conveys dignified refinement with clear differentiation worthy of a flagship SUV. A wider, cascading grille form outlines rugged parametric shield elements for a premium appearance. The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Hyundai Palisade Off Road driving
programme.desc: The design of the 2023 Palisade conveys dignified refinement with clear differentiation worthy of a flagship SUV. A wider, cascading grille form outlines rugged parametric shield elements for a premium appearance. The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Hyundai Palisade Off Road driving
programme.desc: The design of the 2023 Palisade conveys dignified refinement with clear differentiation worthy of a flagship SUV. A wider, cascading grille form outlines rugged parametric shield elements for a premium appearance. The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.title: The Audi RS Q e tron rocks Hamburg
programme.desc: The futuristic Audi RS Q etron was one of the stars at the FUTURE MOVES New Mobility Summit as part of the OMR Festival in Hamburg on Tuesday. With a spectacular trip from the container port to the exhibition center, Swedish Audi driver Mattias Ekström and his codriver Emil Bergkvist generated a lot of excitement in the runup to the event.

programme.title: Range Rover Sport
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic worldfirst climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute.

programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Hyundai Palisade Off Road driving
programme.desc: The design of the 2023 Palisade conveys dignified refinement with clear differentiation worthy of a flagship SUV. A wider, cascading grille form outlines rugged parametric shield elements for a premium appearance. The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.title: The Audi RS Q e tron rocks Hamburg
programme.desc: The futuristic Audi RS Q etron was one of the stars at the FUTURE MOVES New Mobility Summit as part of the OMR Festival in Hamburg on Tuesday. programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic worldfirst climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. programme.title: Cadillac Escalade V Launch Control Demonstration
programme.desc: Cadillac revealed full details surrounding the 2023 EscaladeV the industry’s most powerful fullsize SUV. It is the firstever Cadillac VSeries SUV an elevation of design, performance and technology and the purest expression of the passion that exists at the core of Cadillac.

programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Hyundai Palisade Off Road driving
programme.desc: The design of the 2023 Palisade conveys dignified refinement with clear differentiation worthy of a flagship SUV. A wider, cascading grille form outlines rugged parametric shield elements for a premium appearance. The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute.

programme.title: Hyundai Palisade Off Road driving
programme.desc: The design of the 2023 Palisade conveys dignified refinement with clear differentiation worthy of a flagship SUV. A wider, cascading grille form outlines rugged parametric shield elements for a premium appearance. The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

With a spectacular trip from the container port to the exhibition center, Swedish Audi driver Mattias Ekström and his codriver Emil Bergkvist generated a lot of excitement in the runup to the event.

programme.title: Toyota Highlander with New Turbocharged Engine
programme.desc: The Toyota Highlander has been the No. 1 retail midsize SUV for six years running, no easy feat in one of the most intensely competitive segments. Now, for 2023, Highlander is giving buyers even more reasons to choose this handsdown winner, starting with an allnew engine for the gas models and also including larger multimedia screens and other amenities for greater value across all grades and powertrains.

programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic worldfirst climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. programme.title: Mercedes Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a highprecision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a threedimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This highprecision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Hyundai Palisade Off Road driving
programme.desc: The design of the 2023 Palisade conveys dignified refinement with clear differentiation worthy of a flagship SUV. A wider, cascading grille form outlines rugged parametric shield elements for a premium appearance. The new forward lighting signature features verticallyconnected LED composite lights that frame the grille creating a sharpedged, technical appeal. New, 20inch multispoke alloy wheels fill the wheel openings for a premium flagship presence. New strake detailing on the lower front skid plate element further conveys a rugged demeanor. The powerful, extended hood profile creates an impressive road presence, while bold Cpillars and panoramic side glass graphics convey generous thirdrow spaciousness. The rear view emphasizes a wide, stable stance via vertical LED taillamps and lower fascia skid plate details.

programme.title: WPT World Championship at Wynn Las Vegas 2022 - Part 1
programme.desc: The WPT's World Championship Final Table is the place to be! With a massive $4.1 million first prize up for grabs, which six lucky players will take home the title of World Champion? All eyes are on Frank Funaro, Jean-Claude Moussa, Adam Adler, Colton Blomberg, Eliot Hudon, and Benny Glaser as they battle it out in part 1 of this exhilarating tournament.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: 12 Hours to Live
programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.title: 12 Hours to Live
programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Devon thought that his share of difficulties were over after a difficult divorce but on the road to rebuilding his life, tragedy strikes leaving him in a fight for his freedom and his innocence.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 4
programme.desc: In this month's episode we move to the western edge of Europe and the second largest city of Portugal, Porto. Located alongside the stunning Douro River, Porto is home ot the 2019 Laser Senior European Championships and Open European Trophy with all the top names of the class. Also, new ambitious senior sailors are on their way to the titles.

programme.title: Tiree Wave Classic - 2015
programme.desc: Since the very start of the event, a traditional Scottish sword known as Claymore has been the ultimate prize for the winners of both the Pro's and the Women's competitions. This year, it will be Willy of Wild Diamond Watersports who will bestow the sword upon the winner. Watch the 2015 Tiree Wave Classic with its brand new energy, fresh perspective to the event and island's 650 residents.

programme.title: RORC Caribbean 600
programme.desc: The RORC Caribbean 600 is an exciting 600-mile offshore race that takes competitors around some of the most beautiful islands of the Caribbean. In its 12th edition, more than 73 boats from 22 countries joined in a competition with participants from over 37 different nationalities.The fleet is made up not only of professional sailors and their boats, but also with Corinthian amateurs that love this offshore race. As it is the only offshore race in the Caribbean, it gets the attention of the best sailors worldwide. The race starts and finishes in Antigua and weaves its way around 11 different islands including St. Maarten and Guadaloupe amongst them.Be part of this unique race across the Caribbean with Nautical Channel and find out what crew will raise with victory.

programme.title: PWA World Cup - Tiberias, Israel
programme.desc: Athletes are meeting in Tiberias, Israel, for the PWA World Cup. This first leg of this year's competition will be filled with action after 18 months of inactivity. With winds between 18 and 30 knots, it will truly be a challenge for the world's best windsurf sailors and with this uncertainty in the conditions, we can expect anything to happen in Israel. Don't miss out on the PWA World Cup 2021 in Tiberias that marks the beginning of this year's windsurfing action!

programme.title: Alacati Windsurf Mecca
programme.desc: Alacati is a town on Turkey’s Cesme Peninsula and for many a Windsurf Mecca. The town is famous for its constant winds and drives the attention of people who like practicing wind sports such as Windsurfing, Kitesurfing, SUP and many more. For years now, the small town is experiencing the impact of windsurfing in their economy, society and lifestyle as it attracts the attention of people worldwide that prefer the Turkish coast to practice water sports.Experience the Alacati Windsurf Mecca that will be sure to blow your mind on Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: 175 of the world's best kayakers are gathering for the 10th anniversary edition of the Sickline Extreme Kayak World Championship. programme.desc: Celebrate with us the 132nd anniversary of the legendary Kieler Woche. programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 1 - GIRAGLIA ROLEX CUP
programme.desc: GIRAGLIA ROLEX CUP.2017 celebrates the 65th edition of the Giraglia Rolex Cup, one of the most famous offshore races in the yachting calendar. Conceived just after the end of World War II, to promote friendship between France and Italy, the action starts in the historic portof St Tropez with three days of inshore racing. Then follows the main event, a 243 nautical mile charge across the Mediterranean to Genoa, Italy, passing the iconic Giraglia Rock on the way.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 2 - ROLEX FARR 40 WORLDS
programme.desc: ROLEX FARR 40 WORLDS.The Farr 40 celebrates its 25th anniversary this year in Porto Cervo, Sardinia, a breathtaking, classic backdrop for any regatta. This is one design class sailing at its finest, four days of thrilling, dramatic, competitive action, which throws together an intriguing mix of amateur and top professional sailors, all desperately competing to become Farr 40 World Champions.

programme.title: Heineken Regatta - Episode 1
programme.desc: Boasting world class competition and legendary parties, the St. Maarten Heineken Regatta reigns as the undisputed king of Caribbean sailing. Given the lineup of over 200 internationally acclaimed boats skippered by the sailing world's top athletes, the stakes are high and anything can happen.Sail with us across the highlights of the 34th edition of the Heineken Regatta!

programme.title: Sofia
programme.desc: Sofía is a short documentary film about the life of young surfer Sofía De Tomás, Canary Islands’ surf champion. Originally from La Orotava, Tenerife, Sofia tells us through interviews and cinematic shoots about her surfing lifestyle and what inclined her towards the surf world.Sofia balances her time between painting and surfing, and for her painting has a similar effect sometimes as surfing. However, for Sofia, surfing is a sport that traps you, and once you start it, you can’t stop, you want more. It’s something she can’t live without.Live the beauty of the Canary Islands in this short documentary film about this young talent in the surf world. Sofia offers beautiful scenery, heart-warming moments and a strong desire to get on a board yourself and start surfing the world.

programme.title: P1 USA AquaX - Episode 3 Sarasota, FL
programme.desc: We move to the third round of the AquaX USA Championship that is taking place in Sarasota, FL. Riders will give their all once more in this event filled with adrenaline, power and the ultimate endurance racing. This year, competition is harder than ever as the top participants have been preparing hard for this championship and they are not ready to leave emptyhanded.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 1 - GIRAGLIA ROLEX CUP
programme.desc: GIRAGLIA ROLEX CUP.2017 celebrates the 65th edition of the Giraglia Rolex Cup, one of the most famous offshore races in the yachting calendar. Conceived just after the end of World War II, to promote friendship between France and Italy, the action starts in the historic portof St Tropez with three days of inshore racing. Then follows the main event, a 243 nautical mile charge across the Mediterranean to Genoa, Italy, passing the iconic Giraglia Rock on the way.

programme.title: Heineken Regatta - Episode 1
programme.desc: The St. Maarten Heineken Regatta celebrates its 33th edition! This year, the Regatta Organization has overworked to design challenging courses and guarantee smooth sailing. Moreover, Heineken brings all the awesome music and a four-day party atmosphere considered unmissable by many. Relive the best moments of the 2013 Heineken Regatta!

This is one design class sailing at its finest, four days of thrilling, dramatic, competitive action, which throws together an intriguing mix of amateur and top professional sailors, all desperately competing to become Farr 40 World Champions.

programme.title: Heineken Regatta - Episode 1
programme.desc: Boasting world class competition and legendary parties, the St. Maarten Heineken Regatta reigns as the undisputed king of Caribbean sailing. programme.title: RORC Caribbean 600
programme.desc: The RORC Caribbean 600 is an exciting 600-mile offshore race that takes competitors around some of the most beautiful islands of the Caribbean. In its 12th edition, more than 73 boats from 22 countries joined in a competition with participants from over 37 different nationalities.The fleet is made up not only of professional sailors and their boats, but also with Corinthian amateurs that love this offshore race. As it is the only offshore race in the Caribbean, it gets the attention of the best sailors worldwide. The race starts and finishes in Antigua and weaves its way around 11 different islands including St. Maarten and Guadaloupe amongst them.Be part of this unique race across the Caribbean with Nautical Channel and find out what crew will raise with victory.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 2 - Arrival
programme.desc: 15 crews set off for the world's toughest double-handed transatlantic race, the 7000km Transat AG2R La Mondiale to Saint-Barthélemy in the Caribbean. Ready to push their Figaro Bénéteaus 200% to collect the prize in Port of Gustavia, the battle is about to get intense. Watch the best moments as the boats crossed the finish line in the dreamy Caribbean island!

programme.title: South to Sian
programme.desc: In a time where there are fences around everything, and we are denied the instinct of self-preservation, it is difficult to find a place free from rules and restrictions, but not yet impossible.Surf movies come and go, a million waves in exotic locations and surfers flown in for three-day shoots on perfect swells, but the spirit of adventure never dies.What began as a three-month trip to a collection of surf breaks off the beaten track turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration, injury, companionship and 4,000km of two-wheeled, single-finned escape from the the real-world burdens of modern life.Harrison Roach and Zye Norris pack their bags, a diverse quiver of boards, two bikes and a 50-dollar tent into a 1970s Land Rover and embark on an epic quest from the southern reaches of Bali, through the Indonesian archipelago to Northern Sumatra’s isolated Lagundri Bay. On boards, on bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, the pair’s journey is to discover if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 8
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Tahitian Swell
programme.desc: The French Polynesia is world famous not only for its clear blue waters, but also for the quality of its waves to the delight of worldwide surfers. These waves are generated by the swell; an undulating movement of the sea surface that advances as it does not break.If the French Polynesia is one of the kingdoms of surfing, it is thanks to its geographical location. Nestled in the heart of the South Pacific, this group of five archipelagos cover an area as vast as Europe and benefit all year round from swells generated by the four winds.The conditions are therefore ideal for the many wave lovers: surfers, windsurfers, bodyboarders... but in order for them to enjoy these conditions, knowledge of marine forecasting is essential. This is where the Polynesian branch of Météo France takes place, including amongst their team swell specialists as Kenji Flohr, a Polynesian forecaster and surfer.His mission is to anticipate the waves that will break on the Polynesian coasts, by analysing the swells, their direction, period, energy, length, and dimensions. The expertise of this surfer forecaster enables to popularize a set of advanced analyses. This makes this didactic documentary accessible to all. And thanks to Kenji Flohr’s crystal clear explanations like the water of the Pacific Ocean, this complex system becomes clear and above all… fascinating.Learn more about the Tahitian Swell and the scientific approach for predicting waves, available on Nautical Channel.

Watch the best moments as the boats crossed the finish line in the dreamy Caribbean island!

programme.title: South to Sian
programme.desc: In a time where there are fences around everything, and we are denied the instinct of self-preservation, it is difficult to find a place free from rules and restrictions, but not yet impossible.Surf movies come and go, a million waves in exotic locations and surfers flown in for three-day shoots on perfect swells, but the spirit of adventure never dies.What began as a three-month trip to a collection of surf breaks off the beaten track turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration, injury, companionship and 4,000km of two-wheeled, single-finned escape from the the real-world burdens of modern life.Harrison Roach and Zye Norris pack their bags, a diverse quiver of boards, two bikes and a 50-dollar tent into a 1970s Land Rover and embark on an epic quest from the southern reaches of Bali, through the Indonesian archipelago to Northern Sumatra’s isolated Lagundri Bay. On boards, on bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, the pair’s journey is to discover if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.

programme.title: P1 USA AquaX - Episode 3 Sarasota, FL
programme.desc: We move to the third round of the AquaX USA Championship that is taking place in Sarasota, FL. Riders will give their all once more in this event filled with adrenaline, power and the ultimate endurance racing. This year, competition is harder than ever as the top participants have been preparing hard for this championship and they are not ready to leave emptyhanded.

programme.title: Tahitian Swell
programme.desc: The French Polynesia is world famous not only for its clear blue waters, but also for the quality of its waves to the delight of worldwide surfers. These waves are generated by the swell; an undulating movement of the sea surface that advances as it does not break.If the French Polynesia is one of the kingdoms of surfing, it is thanks to its geographical location. Nestled in the heart of the South Pacific, this group of five archipelagos cover an area as vast as Europe and benefit all year round from swells generated by the four winds.The conditions are therefore ideal for the many wave lovers: surfers, windsurfers, bodyboarders... but in order for them to enjoy these conditions, knowledge of marine forecasting is essential. This is where the Polynesian branch of Météo France takes place, including amongst their team swell specialists as Kenji Flohr, a Polynesian forecaster and surfer.His mission is to anticipate the waves that will break on the Polynesian coasts, by analysing the swells, their direction, period, energy, length, and dimensions. The expertise of this surfer forecaster enables to popularize a set of advanced analyses. This makes this didactic documentary accessible to all. And thanks to Kenji Flohr’s crystal clear explanations like the water of the Pacific Ocean, this complex system becomes clear and above all… fascinating.Learn more about the Tahitian Swell and the scientific approach for predicting waves, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 1 - GIRAGLIA ROLEX CUP
programme.desc: GIRAGLIA ROLEX CUP.2017 celebrates the 65th edition of the Giraglia Rolex Cup, one of the most famous offshore races in the yachting calendar. Conceived just after the end of World War II, to promote friendship between France and Italy, the action starts in the historic portof St Tropez with three days of inshore racing. Then follows the main event, a 243 nautical mile charge across the Mediterranean to Genoa, Italy, passing the iconic Giraglia Rock on the way.

programme.title: Travemunder Woche
programme.desc: A week of top-class sailing in the Bay of Lubeck. Perfect conditions for the 125th anniversary of this legendary German sailing event in the Baltic Sea. 30 different classes race and European championships are in 10 of them. Catch the highlights of this eight days sailing event only on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 2 - ROLEX FARR 40 WORLDS
programme.desc: ROLEX FARR 40 WORLDS.The Farr 40 celebrates its 25th anniversary this year in Porto Cervo, Sardinia, a breathtaking, classic backdrop for any regatta. This is one design class sailing at its finest, four days of thrilling, dramatic, competitive action, which throws together an intriguing mix of amateur and top professional sailors, all desperately competing to become Farr 40 World Champions.

This year, it will be Willy of Wild Diamond Watersports who will bestow the sword upon the winner. Watch the 2015 Tiree Wave Classic with its brand new energy, fresh perspective to the event and island's 650 residents.

programme.title: RORC Caribbean 600
programme.desc: The RORC Caribbean 600 is an exciting 600-mile offshore race that takes competitors around some of the most beautiful islands of the Caribbean. In its 12th edition, more than 73 boats from 22 countries joined in a competition with participants from over 37 different nationalities.The fleet is made up not only of professional sailors and their boats, but also with Corinthian amateurs that love this offshore race. As it is the only offshore race in the Caribbean, it gets the attention of the best sailors worldwide. The race starts and finishes in Antigua and weaves its way around 11 different islands including St. Maarten and Guadaloupe amongst them.Be part of this unique race across the Caribbean with Nautical Channel and find out what crew will raise with victory.

programme.title: Sailing Documentary Show
programme.desc: Sailing boats have always come in different shapes and size. Whether if they are used for competition, fishing or recreational use, competition has always been at the heart of sport, pushing boundaries in technological advancements.The Extreme Sailing Series combines the top class sailing teams and the advanced innovations in technology, and watching the races becomes a thrill to spectators. With circuits that range through eight global events, the Extreme Sailing Series is breaking boundaries. Follow the journey of boats that are some of the fastest in production and that can reach speeds of just under 40 knots or almost 75 kilometres per hour.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 1 - GIRAGLIA ROLEX CUP
programme.desc: GIRAGLIA ROLEX CUP.2017 celebrates the 65th edition of the Giraglia Rolex Cup, one of the most famous offshore races in the yachting calendar. Conceived just after the end of World War II, to promote friendship between France and Italy, the action starts in the historic portof St Tropez with three days of inshore racing. Then follows the main event, a 243 nautical mile charge across the Mediterranean to Genoa, Italy, passing the iconic Giraglia Rock on the way.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 1 - Dubrovnik – Lastovo
programme.desc: (A new season of Sail-Ho! Croatia brings you the most fascinating destinations on the Croatian coast. Breathtaking landscapes, untouched nature, exquisite cuisine, no wonder Croatia is by many considered to be a true Hedonist Paradise.) We start at the southernmost part of the Croatian Coast - the old city of Dubrovnik. We will reveal you some secrets and show you some interesting attractions. After Dubrovnik, we set our sail towards mystical island of Lastovo that was until recently a navy stronghold.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 2 - ROLEX FARR 40 WORLDS
programme.desc: ROLEX FARR 40 WORLDS.The Farr 40 celebrates its 25th anniversary this year in Porto Cervo, Sardinia, a breathtaking, classic backdrop for any regatta. This is one design class sailing at its finest, four days of thrilling, dramatic, competitive action, which throws together an intriguing mix of amateur and top professional sailors, all desperately competing to become Farr 40 World Champions.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2 - Korcula – Stari Grad
programme.desc: Korcula is often referred as a little Dubrovnik and we will show you why is that. We will taste some amazing cuisine and attend Moreska dance that is preserved from the Middle Ages and it is performed only here on island of Korcula. After Korcula we visit beautiful Stari Grad town on the island of Hvar and wonder it's amazing old streets.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 8
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 6: Dugi Otok and Vrana Lake
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 12
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: South to Sian
programme.desc: In a time where there are fences around everything, and we are denied the instinct of self-preservation, it is difficult to find a place free from rules and restrictions, but not yet impossible.Surf movies come and go, a million waves in exotic locations and surfers flown in for three-day shoots on perfect swells, but the spirit of adventure never dies.What began as a three-month trip to a collection of surf breaks off the beaten track turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration, injury, companionship and 4,000km of two-wheeled, single-finned escape from the the real-world burdens of modern life.Harrison Roach and Zye Norris pack their bags, a diverse quiver of boards, two bikes and a 50-dollar tent into a 1970s Land Rover and embark on an epic quest from the southern reaches of Bali, through the Indonesian archipelago to Northern Sumatra’s isolated Lagundri Bay. On boards, on bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, the pair’s journey is to discover if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.

programme.title: Ocean Safari - South Africa - Episode 6
programme.desc: Andi van Zyl is discovering and experiencing the coastline of South Africa through some of its remarkable personalities and their human spirit.

programme.title: Un día en...Salón Internacional Náutico de Barcelona - Salón Internacional Barcelona - Ep9
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing Documentary Show
programme.desc: Sailing boats have always come in different shapes and size. Whether if they are used for competition, fishing or recreational use, competition has always been at the heart of sport, pushing boundaries in technological advancements.The Extreme Sailing Series combines the top class sailing teams and the advanced innovations in technology, and watching the races becomes a thrill to spectators. With circuits that range through eight global events, the Extreme Sailing Series is breaking boundaries. Follow the journey of boats that are some of the fastest in production and that can reach speeds of just under 40 knots or almost 75 kilometres per hour.

programme.title: South to Sian
programme.desc: In a time where there are fences around everything, and we are denied the instinct of self-preservation, it is difficult to find a place free from rules and restrictions, but not yet impossible.Surf movies come and go, a million waves in exotic locations and surfers flown in for three-day shoots on perfect swells, but the spirit of adventure never dies.What began as a three-month trip to a collection of surf breaks off the beaten track turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration, injury, companionship and 4,000km of two-wheeled, single-finned escape from the the real-world burdens of modern life.Harrison Roach and Zye Norris pack their bags, a diverse quiver of boards, two bikes and a 50-dollar tent into a 1970s Land Rover and embark on an epic quest from the southern reaches of Bali, through the Indonesian archipelago to Northern Sumatra’s isolated Lagundri Bay. On boards, on bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, the pair’s journey is to discover if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 1 - Dubrovnik – Lastovo
programme.desc: (A new season of Sail-Ho! Croatia brings you the most fascinating destinations on the Croatian coast. Breathtaking landscapes, untouched nature, exquisite cuisine, no wonder Croatia is by many considered to be a true Hedonist Paradise.) We start at the southernmost part of the Croatian Coast - the old city of Dubrovnik. We will reveal you some secrets and show you some interesting attractions. After Dubrovnik, we set our sail towards mystical island of Lastovo that was until recently a navy stronghold.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 8
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2 - Korcula – Stari Grad
programme.desc: Korcula is often referred as a little Dubrovnik and we will show you why is that. We will taste some amazing cuisine and attend Moreska dance that is preserved from the Middle Ages and it is performed only here on island of Korcula. After Korcula we visit beautiful Stari Grad town on the island of Hvar and wonder it's amazing old streets.

programme.title: Tiree Wave Classic - 2015
programme.desc: Since the very start of the event, a traditional Scottish sword known as Claymore has been the ultimate prize for the winners of both the Pro's and the Women's competitions. This year, it will be Willy of Wild Diamond Watersports who will bestow the sword upon the winner. Watch the 2015 Tiree Wave Classic with its brand new energy, fresh perspective to the event and island's 650 residents.

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 6: Dugi Otok and Vrana Lake
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: RORC Caribbean 600
programme.desc: The RORC Caribbean 600 is an exciting 600-mile offshore race that takes competitors around some of the most beautiful islands of the Caribbean. In its 12th edition, more than 73 boats from 22 countries joined in a competition with participants from over 37 different nationalities.The fleet is made up not only of professional sailors and their boats, but also with Corinthian amateurs that love this offshore race. As it is the only offshore race in the Caribbean, it gets the attention of the best sailors worldwide. The race starts and finishes in Antigua and weaves its way around 11 different islands including St. Maarten and Guadaloupe amongst them.Be part of this unique race across the Caribbean with Nautical Channel and find out what crew will raise with victory.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 12
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Travemunder Woche
programme.desc: A week of top-class sailing in the Bay of Lubeck. Perfect conditions for the 125th anniversary of this legendary German sailing event in the Baltic Sea. 30 different classes race and European championships are in 10 of them. Catch the highlights of this eight days sailing event only on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Ocean Safari - South Africa - Episode 6
programme.desc: Andi van Zyl is discovering and experiencing the coastline of South Africa through some of its remarkable personalities and their human spirit.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: This time we stay in Europe but find ourselves in Russia's most western and exquisite city: St. Petersburg. We are following the 2019 RS:X Youth World Championship, and this event was hosted by the St. Petersburg Regional Sports, non-governmental Organization: Yacht Club of St. Petersburg. We stay for the opening ceremony before flying to China for the Nimble Cup Asian Windsurfing Championship 2019. To round off the trip in Olympic classes, join us as we fet off to Italy's San Remo for the 470 European Championships.

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 1 - GIRAGLIA ROLEX CUP
programme.desc: GIRAGLIA ROLEX CUP.2017 celebrates the 65th edition of the Giraglia Rolex Cup, one of the most famous offshore races in the yachting calendar. Conceived just after the end of World War II, to promote friendship between France and Italy, the action starts in the historic portof St Tropez with three days of inshore racing. Then follows the main event, a 243 nautical mile charge across the Mediterranean to Genoa, Italy, passing the iconic Giraglia Rock on the way.

programme.title: South to Sian
programme.desc: In a time where there are fences around everything, and we are denied the instinct of self-preservation, it is difficult to find a place free from rules and restrictions, but not yet impossible.Surf movies come and go, a million waves in exotic locations and surfers flown in for three-day shoots on perfect swells, but the spirit of adventure never dies.What began as a three-month trip to a collection of surf breaks off the beaten track turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration, injury, companionship and 4,000km of two-wheeled, single-finned escape from the the real-world burdens of modern life.Harrison Roach and Zye Norris pack their bags, a diverse quiver of boards, two bikes and a 50-dollar tent into a 1970s Land Rover and embark on an epic quest from the southern reaches of Bali, through the Indonesian archipelago to Northern Sumatra’s isolated Lagundri Bay. On boards, on bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, the pair’s journey is to discover if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 2 - ROLEX FARR 40 WORLDS
programme.desc: ROLEX FARR 40 WORLDS.The Farr 40 celebrates its 25th anniversary this year in Porto Cervo, Sardinia, a breathtaking, classic backdrop for any regatta. This is one design class sailing at its finest, four days of thrilling, dramatic, competitive action, which throws together an intriguing mix of amateur and top professional sailors, all desperately competing to become Farr 40 World Champions.

programme.title: P1 USA AquaX - Episode 3 Sarasota, FL
programme.desc: We move to the third round of the AquaX USA Championship that is taking place in Sarasota, FL. Riders will give their all once more in this event filled with adrenaline, power and the ultimate endurance racing. This year, competition is harder than ever as the top participants have been preparing hard for this championship and they are not ready to leave emptyhanded.

programme.title: RORC Caribbean 600
programme.desc: The RORC Caribbean 600 is an exciting 600-mile offshore race that takes competitors around some of the most beautiful islands of the Caribbean. In its 12th edition, more than 73 boats from 22 countries joined in a competition with participants from over 37 different nationalities.The fleet is made up not only of professional sailors and their boats, but also with Corinthian amateurs that love this offshore race. As it is the only offshore race in the Caribbean, it gets the attention of the best sailors worldwide. The race starts and finishes in Antigua and weaves its way around 11 different islands including St. Maarten and Guadaloupe amongst them.Be part of this unique race across the Caribbean with Nautical Channel and find out what crew will raise with victory.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: Travemunder Woche
programme.desc: A week of top-class sailing in the Bay of Lubeck. Perfect conditions for the 125th anniversary of this legendary German sailing event in the Baltic Sea. 30 different classes race and European championships are in 10 of them. Catch the highlights of this eight days sailing event only on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 2 - Arrival
programme.desc: 15 crews set off for the world's toughest double-handed transatlantic race, the 7000km Transat AG2R La Mondiale to Saint-Barthélemy in the Caribbean. Ready to push their Figaro Bénéteaus 200% to collect the prize in Port of Gustavia, the battle is about to get intense. Watch the best moments as the boats crossed the finish line in the dreamy Caribbean island!

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: This time we stay in Europe but find ourselves in Russia's most western and exquisite city: St. Petersburg. We are following the 2019 RS:X Youth World Championship, and this event was hosted by the St. Petersburg Regional Sports, non-governmental Organization: Yacht Club of St. Petersburg. To round off the trip in Olympic classes, join us as we fet off to Italy's San Remo for the 470 European Championships.

This is one design class sailing at its finest, four days of thrilling, dramatic, competitive action, which throws together an intriguing mix of amateur and top professional sailors, all desperately competing to become Farr 40 World Champions.

programme.title: South to Sian
programme.desc: In a time where there are fences around everything, and we are denied the instinct of self-preservation, it is difficult to find a place free from rules and restrictions, but not yet impossible.Surf movies come and go, a million waves in exotic locations and surfers flown in for three-day shoots on perfect swells, but the spirit of adventure never dies.What began as a three-month trip to a collection of surf breaks off the beaten track turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration, injury, companionship and 4,000km of two-wheeled, single-finned escape from the the real-world burdens of modern life.Harrison Roach and Zye Norris pack their bags, a diverse quiver of boards, two bikes and a 50-dollar tent into a 1970s Land Rover and embark on an epic quest from the southern reaches of Bali, through the Indonesian archipelago to Northern Sumatra’s isolated Lagundri Bay. On boards, on bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, the pair’s journey is to discover if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.

programme.title: Travemunder Woche
programme.desc: A week of top-class sailing in the Bay of Lubeck. Perfect conditions for the 125th anniversary of this legendary German sailing event in the Baltic Sea. 30 different classes race and European championships are in 10 of them. Catch the highlights of this eight days sailing event only on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Un día en...Salón Internacional Náutico de Barcelona - Salón Internacional Barcelona - Ep9
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: This time we stay in Europe but find ourselves in Russia's most western and exquisite city: St. Petersburg. We are following the 2019 RS:X Youth World Championship, and this event was hosted by the St. Petersburg Regional Sports, non-governmental Organization: Yacht Club of St. Petersburg. We stay for the opening ceremony before flying to China for the Nimble Cup Asian Windsurfing Championship 2019. To round off the trip in Olympic classes, join us as we fet off to Italy's San Remo for the 470 European Championships.

programme.title: Sailing Documentary Show
programme.desc: Sailing boats have always come in different shapes and size. Whether if they are used for competition, fishing or recreational use, competition has always been at the heart of sport, pushing boundaries in technological advancements.The Extreme Sailing Series combines the top class sailing teams and the advanced innovations in technology, and watching the races becomes a thrill to spectators. With circuits that range through eight global events, the Extreme Sailing Series is breaking boundaries. Follow the journey of boats that are some of the fastest in production and that can reach speeds of just under 40 knots or almost 75 kilometres per hour.

programme.title: Dusi Canoe Marathon - Episode 1
programme.desc: One of the most physically testing competitions is coming soon to Nautical Channel. The Dusi Canoe Marathon is a one of a kind canoe and running endurance race set in the magnificent South African Drakensberg hills and rapids. Follow this years edition as some of the fittest men and women single handedly row the 120 km river and run over the hills carrying their custom built canoes over their shoulders. Who will come first in this prestigious African event?

programme.desc: - Array

programme.desc: - Array

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Bass By Kayak
programme.desc: Bass by Kayak follows a small expedition party formed by four adventurers crossing from the Australian mainland to Tasmania in sea kayaks. With a 300 km separation, a bare four hundred people have made the crossing of the Bass Strait in the modern era. Before then, Aboriginal Australians sailed in their canoes the shocking distance during the last ice age.This adventure makes strategic stops on the islands along the way; however, it is one of the toughest and deadliest journeys in the world. Adventure filmmaker Beau Miles narrates the expedition as the first ever feature film of the crossing via sea kayaks.The travellers will experience chafe, storms, bad cooking and an emerging mate-ship between men that barely know each other.Watch it now with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 1 - GIRAGLIA ROLEX CUP
programme.desc: GIRAGLIA ROLEX CUP.2017 celebrates the 65th edition of the Giraglia Rolex Cup, one of the most famous offshore races in the yachting calendar. Conceived just after the end of World War II, to promote friendship between France and Italy, the action starts in the historic portof St Tropez with three days of inshore racing. Then follows the main event, a 243 nautical mile charge across the Mediterranean to Genoa, Italy, passing the iconic Giraglia Rock on the way.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 2 - ROLEX FARR 40 WORLDS
programme.desc: ROLEX FARR 40 WORLDS.The Farr 40 celebrates its 25th anniversary this year in Porto Cervo, Sardinia, a breathtaking, classic backdrop for any regatta. This is one design class sailing at its finest, four days of thrilling, dramatic, competitive action, which throws together an intriguing mix of amateur and top professional sailors, all desperately competing to become Farr 40 World Champions.

programme.title: Tiree Wave Classic - 2015
programme.desc: Since the very start of the event, a traditional Scottish sword known as Claymore has been the ultimate prize for the winners of both the Pro's and the Women's competitions. This year, it will be Willy of Wild Diamond Watersports who will bestow the sword upon the winner. Watch the 2015 Tiree Wave Classic with its brand new energy, fresh perspective to the event and island's 650 residents.

programme.title: Travemunder Woche
programme.desc: A week of top-class sailing in the Bay of Lubeck. Perfect conditions for the 125th anniversary of this legendary German sailing event in the Baltic Sea. 30 different classes race and European championships are in 10 of them. Catch the highlights of this eight days sailing event only on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: RORC Caribbean 600
programme.desc: The RORC Caribbean 600 is an exciting 600-mile offshore race that takes competitors around some of the most beautiful islands of the Caribbean. In its 12th edition, more than 73 boats from 22 countries joined in a competition with participants from over 37 different nationalities.The fleet is made up not only of professional sailors and their boats, but also with Corinthian amateurs that love this offshore race. As it is the only offshore race in the Caribbean, it gets the attention of the best sailors worldwide. The race starts and finishes in Antigua and weaves its way around 11 different islands including St. Maarten and Guadaloupe amongst them.Be part of this unique race across the Caribbean with Nautical Channel and find out what crew will raise with victory.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: RORC Caribbean 600
programme.desc: The RORC Caribbean 600 is an exciting 600-mile offshore race that takes competitors around some of the most beautiful islands of the Caribbean. In its 12th edition, more than 73 boats from 22 countries joined in a competition with participants from over 37 different nationalities.The fleet is made up not only of professional sailors and their boats, but also with Corinthian amateurs that love this offshore race. programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 2 - Arrival
programme.desc: 15 crews set off for the world's toughest double-handed transatlantic race, the 7000km Transat AG2R La Mondiale to Saint-Barthélemy in the Caribbean. Ready to push their Figaro Bénéteaus 200% to collect the prize in Port of Gustavia, the battle is about to get intense. Watch the best moments as the boats crossed the finish line in the dreamy Caribbean island!

programme.desc: A week of top-class sailing in the Bay of Lubeck. Perfect conditions for the 125th anniversary of this legendary German sailing event in the Baltic Sea. 30 different classes race and European championships are in 10 of them. Catch the highlights of this eight days sailing event only on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: South to Sian
programme.desc: In a time where there are fences around everything, and we are denied the instinct of self-preservation, it is difficult to find a place free from rules and restrictions, but not yet impossible.Surf movies come and go, a million waves in exotic locations and surfers flown in for three-day shoots on perfect swells, but the spirit of adventure never dies.What began as a three-month trip to a collection of surf breaks off the beaten track turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration, injury, companionship and 4,000km of two-wheeled, single-finned escape from the the real-world burdens of modern life.Harrison Roach and Zye Norris pack their bags, a diverse quiver of boards, two bikes and a 50-dollar tent into a 1970s Land Rover and embark on an epic quest from the southern reaches of Bali, through the Indonesian archipelago to Northern Sumatra’s isolated Lagundri Bay. On boards, on bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, the pair’s journey is to discover if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: This time we stay in Europe but find ourselves in Russia's most western and exquisite city: St. Petersburg. We are following the 2019 RS:X Youth World Championship, and this event was hosted by the St. Petersburg Regional Sports, non-governmental Organization: Yacht Club of St. Petersburg. We stay for the opening ceremony before flying to China for the Nimble Cup Asian Windsurfing Championship 2019. To round off the trip in Olympic classes, join us as we fet off to Italy's San Remo for the 470 European Championships.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!
