programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 2 - Arrival
programme.desc: 15 crews set off for the world's toughest double-handed transatlantic race, the 7000km Transat AG2R La Mondiale to Saint-Barthélemy in the Caribbean. Ready to push their Figaro Bénéteaus 200% to collect the prize in Port of Gustavia, the battle is about to get intense. Watch the best moments as the boats crossed the finish line in the dreamy Caribbean island!

programme.title: P1 USA AquaX - Episode 3 Sarasota, FL
programme.desc: We move to the third round of the AquaX USA Championship that is taking place in Sarasota, FL. Riders will give their all once more in this event filled with adrenaline, power and the ultimate endurance racing. This year, competition is harder than ever as the top participants have been preparing hard for this championship and they are not ready to leave emptyhanded.

programme.title: Tiree Wave Classic - 2015
programme.desc: Since the very start of the event, a traditional Scottish sword known as Claymore has been the ultimate prize for the winners of both the Pro's and the Women's competitions. This year, it will be Willy of Wild Diamond Watersports who will bestow the sword upon the winner. Watch the 2015 Tiree Wave Classic with its brand new energy, fresh perspective to the event and island's 650 residents.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 9
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: RORC Caribbean 600
programme.desc: The RORC Caribbean 600 is an exciting 600-mile offshore race that takes competitors around some of the most beautiful islands of the Caribbean. In its 12th edition, more than 73 boats from 22 countries joined in a competition with participants from over 37 different nationalities.The fleet is made up not only of professional sailors and their boats, but also with Corinthian amateurs that love this offshore race. As it is the only offshore race in the Caribbean, it gets the attention of the best sailors worldwide. The race starts and finishes in Antigua and weaves its way around 11 different islands including St. Maarten and Guadaloupe amongst them.Be part of this unique race across the Caribbean with Nautical Channel and find out what crew will raise with victory.

programme.title: Tahiti Pearl Regatta - Episode 1
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Travemunder Woche
programme.desc: A week of top-class sailing in the Bay of Lubeck. Perfect conditions for the 125th anniversary of this legendary German sailing event in the Baltic Sea. 30 different classes race and European championships are in 10 of them. Catch the highlights of this eight days sailing event only on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Tidal
programme.desc: Tidal follows the journey of Lisa Beasley. After she suffered a horrible BASE jumping accident, she struggles to return to the ocean, but ends convincing herself to venture back into the water. Lisa’s journey begins with a childhood love of water and sea life. Lucky of surviving the accident, she must now face an immense recovery period that brings her closer to her mother as well as her first love: the sea.As Lisa struggles to find an exercise she can handle, she starts discovering the beauty surrounding Cape Town’s ocean. The tidal pools in particular became very meaningful to Lisa’s recovery, and she must now work to protect them from the harmful historical cleaning protocols that kill the marine life she has come to love.Watch Lisa’s inspirational transformation and realisation of the beauty of the ocean in this impactful documentary that reminds us of the importance of self-recovery and reconnection with the ocean. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: This time we stay in Europe but find ourselves in Russia's most western and exquisite city: St. Petersburg. We are following the 2019 RS:X Youth World Championship, and this event was hosted by the St. Petersburg Regional Sports, non-governmental Organization: Yacht Club of St. Petersburg. We stay for the opening ceremony before flying to China for the Nimble Cup Asian Windsurfing Championship 2019. To round off the trip in Olympic classes, join us as we fet off to Italy's San Remo for the 470 European Championships.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 3 - ROLEX FASTNET RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX FASTNET RACE.This is a sporting institution, 340 boats on a 603 nautical mile charge, battling whatever weather conditions are thrown at them, as they make their way across the ocean from Cowes, to the symbol of the race, the Fastnet Rock, before heading back to Plymouth.This race first conceived in 1925 is the ultimate test of both inshore and offshore sailing skills and is unquestionably one of the greatest events in the international yachting calendar.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 4 - MAXI YACHT ROLEX
programme.desc: MAXI YACHT ROLEX.Costa Smeralda – the Emerald Coast – once again provides a stunning backdrop, with a variety of challenging conditions, for the Maxi Yacht Rolex Cup, a highlight of the Mediterranean yachting season. Each September a fleet of the world’s mostelegant, powerful and spectacular yachts gather to battle for one of yachting’s most revered and celebrated competitions, with the coveted World Championship the focal point of the week.

programme.title: P1 USA AquaX - Episode 3 Sarasota, FL
programme.desc: We move to the third round of the AquaX USA Championship that is taking place in Sarasota, FL. Riders will give their all once more in this event filled with adrenaline, power and the ultimate endurance racing. This year, competition is harder than ever as the top participants have been preparing hard for this championship and they are not ready to leave emptyhanded.

programme.title: Bora Bora: Paddling Paradise
programme.desc: In Bora Bora: Paddling Paradise Nikolai visits the crystal blue lagoons, encounters sharks and stingrays and witnesses the 6th edition of the Muramur surfski race in Tahiti. The intensive 38 km race meandering through reefs that surround the mystic island of Bora Bora is bound to make you pack your flippers and book a flight to the exotic French Polynesia.You can now watch this exclusive show that will take you to one of the world’s most beautiful sceneries on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sailing Documentary Show
programme.desc: Sailing boats have always come in different shapes and size. Whether if they are used for competition, fishing or recreational use, competition has always been at the heart of sport, pushing boundaries in technological advancements.The Extreme Sailing Series combines the top class sailing teams and the advanced innovations in technology, and watching the races becomes a thrill to spectators. With circuits that range through eight global events, the Extreme Sailing Series is breaking boundaries. Follow the journey of boats that are some of the fastest in production and that can reach speeds of just under 40 knots or almost 75 kilometres per hour.

This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 6: Dugi Otok and Vrana Lake
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 2 - Arrival
programme.desc: 15 crews set off for the world's toughest double-handed transatlantic race, the 7000km Transat AG2R La Mondiale to Saint-Barthélemy in the Caribbean. Ready to push their Figaro Bénéteaus 200% to collect the prize in Port of Gustavia, the battle is about to get intense. Watch the best moments as the boats crossed the finish line in the dreamy Caribbean island!

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 12
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - GP of Binh Dinh (Vietnam Ski)
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: South to Sian
programme.desc: In a time where there are fences around everything, and we are denied the instinct of self-preservation, it is difficult to find a place free from rules and restrictions, but not yet impossible.Surf movies come and go, a million waves in exotic locations and surfers flown in for three-day shoots on perfect swells, but the spirit of adventure never dies.What began as a three-month trip to a collection of surf breaks off the beaten track turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration, injury, companionship and 4,000km of two-wheeled, single-finned escape from the the real-world burdens of modern life.Harrison Roach and Zye Norris pack their bags, a diverse quiver of boards, two bikes and a 50-dollar tent into a 1970s Land Rover and embark on an epic quest from the southern reaches of Bali, through the Indonesian archipelago to Northern Sumatra’s isolated Lagundri Bay. On boards, on bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, the pair’s journey is to discover if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.

programme.title: P1 USA AquaX - Episode 3 Sarasota, FL
programme.desc: We move to the third round of the AquaX USA Championship that is taking place in Sarasota, FL. Riders will give their all once more in this event filled with adrenaline, power and the ultimate endurance racing. This year, competition is harder than ever as the top participants have been preparing hard for this championship and they are not ready to leave emptyhanded.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 3 - ROLEX FASTNET RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX FASTNET RACE.This is a sporting institution, 340 boats on a 603 nautical mile charge, battling whatever weather conditions are thrown at them, as they make their way across the ocean from Cowes, to the symbol of the race, the Fastnet Rock, before heading back to Plymouth.This race first conceived in 1925 is the ultimate test of both inshore and offshore sailing skills and is unquestionably one of the greatest events in the international yachting calendar.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 4 - MAXI YACHT ROLEX
programme.desc: MAXI YACHT ROLEX.Costa Smeralda – the Emerald Coast – once again provides a stunning backdrop, with a variety of challenging conditions, for the Maxi Yacht Rolex Cup, a highlight of the Mediterranean yachting season. Each September a fleet of the world’s mostelegant, powerful and spectacular yachts gather to battle for one of yachting’s most revered and celebrated competitions, with the coveted World Championship the focal point of the week.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 2 - Arrival
programme.desc: 15 crews set off for the world's toughest double-handed transatlantic race, the 7000km Transat AG2R La Mondiale to Saint-Barthélemy in the Caribbean. Ready to push their Figaro Bénéteaus 200% to collect the prize in Port of Gustavia, the battle is about to get intense. Watch the best moments as the boats crossed the finish line in the dreamy Caribbean island!

programme.title: Travemunder Woche
programme.desc: A week of top-class sailing in the Bay of Lubeck. Perfect conditions for the 125th anniversary of this legendary German sailing event in the Baltic Sea. 30 different classes race and European championships are in 10 of them. Catch the highlights of this eight days sailing event only on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: This time we stay in Europe but find ourselves in Russia's most western and exquisite city: St. Petersburg. We are following the 2019 RS:X Youth World Championship, and this event was hosted by the St. Petersburg Regional Sports, non-governmental Organization: Yacht Club of St. Petersburg. We stay for the opening ceremony before flying to China for the Nimble Cup Asian Windsurfing Championship 2019. To round off the trip in Olympic classes, join us as we fet off to Italy's San Remo for the 470 European Championships.

programme.title: Sailing Documentary Show
programme.desc: Sailing boats have always come in different shapes and size. Whether if they are used for competition, fishing or recreational use, competition has always been at the heart of sport, pushing boundaries in technological advancements.The Extreme Sailing Series combines the top class sailing teams and the advanced innovations in technology, and watching the races becomes a thrill to spectators. With circuits that range through eight global events, the Extreme Sailing Series is breaking boundaries. Follow the journey of boats that are some of the fastest in production and that can reach speeds of just under 40 knots or almost 75 kilometres per hour.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 1 - Nelson Mandela Pro
programme.desc: The first event of the South African WQS during series kicks off in Nelson Mandela Bay. Challenging conditions make it even tougher for surfers to get the vital points they need to advance. Will they have what it takes to raise to the top? Don’t miss all the action, the disappointments and victories at the start of what will be an epic African series.

Whether if they are used for competition, fishing or recreational use, competition has always been at the heart of sport, pushing boundaries in technological advancements.The Extreme Sailing Series combines the top class sailing teams and the advanced innovations in technology, and watching the races becomes a thrill to spectators. With circuits that range through eight global events, the Extreme Sailing Series is breaking boundaries. Follow the journey of boats that are some of the fastest in production and that can reach speeds of just under 40 knots or almost 75 kilometres per hour.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 2 - Arrival
programme.desc: 15 crews set off for the world's toughest double-handed transatlantic race, the 7000km Transat AG2R La Mondiale to Saint-Barthélemy in the Caribbean. Ready to push their Figaro Bénéteaus 200% to collect the prize in Port of Gustavia, the battle is about to get intense. Watch the best moments as the boats crossed the finish line in the dreamy Caribbean island!

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 1 - Nelson Mandela Pro
programme.desc: The first event of the South African WQS during series kicks off in Nelson Mandela Bay. Challenging conditions make it even tougher for surfers to get the vital points they need to advance. Will they have what it takes to raise to the top? Don’t miss all the action, the disappointments and victories at the start of what will be an epic African series.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - GP of Binh Dinh (Vietnam Ski)
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 2 - Port Alfred Classic
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the South Africa WQS Surf Series. This time, we are in Port Alfred at The Royal St Andrews Hotel Port Alfred Classic. Some of South Africa's best waves can be surfed here despite also being one of the most underrated locations. We are in for a thrill!

programme.title: P1 USA AquaX - Episode 3 Sarasota, FL
programme.desc: We move to the third round of the AquaX USA Championship that is taking place in Sarasota, FL. Riders will give their all once more in this event filled with adrenaline, power and the ultimate endurance racing. This year, competition is harder than ever as the top participants have been preparing hard for this championship and they are not ready to leave emptyhanded.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: Travemunder Woche
programme.desc: A week of top-class sailing in the Bay of Lubeck. Perfect conditions for the 125th anniversary of this legendary German sailing event in the Baltic Sea. 30 different classes race and European championships are in 10 of them. Catch the highlights of this eight days sailing event only on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: This time we stay in Europe but find ourselves in Russia's most western and exquisite city: St. Petersburg. We are following the 2019 RS:X Youth World Championship, and this event was hosted by the St. Petersburg Regional Sports, non-governmental Organization: Yacht Club of St. Petersburg. We stay for the opening ceremony before flying to China for the Nimble Cup Asian Windsurfing Championship 2019. To round off the trip in Olympic classes, join us as we fet off to Italy's San Remo for the 470 European Championships.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: This time we stay in Europe but find ourselves in Russia's most western and exquisite city: St. Petersburg. We are following the 2019 RS:X Youth World Championship, and this event was hosted by the St. Petersburg Regional Sports, non-governmental Organization: Yacht Club of St. Petersburg. We stay for the opening ceremony before flying to China for the Nimble Cup Asian Windsurfing Championship 2019. programme.title: South to Sian
programme.desc: In a time where there are fences around everything, and we are denied the instinct of self-preservation, it is difficult to find a place free from rules and restrictions, but not yet impossible.Surf movies come and go, a million waves in exotic locations and surfers flown in for three-day shoots on perfect swells, but the spirit of adventure never dies.What began as a three-month trip to a collection of surf breaks off the beaten track turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration, injury, companionship and 4,000km of two-wheeled, single-finned escape from the the real-world burdens of modern life.Harrison Roach and Zye Norris pack their bags, a diverse quiver of boards, two bikes and a 50-dollar tent into a 1970s Land Rover and embark on an epic quest from the southern reaches of Bali, through the Indonesian archipelago to Northern Sumatra’s isolated Lagundri Bay. On boards, on bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, the pair’s journey is to discover if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.

programme.title: Jet RAID - Greece
programme.desc: Welcome to the 2019 edition of Jet Raid, the first step of a World Championship that is considered like the Dakar of the Sea. Specially prepared for these endurance races, the machines are divided in F1, F2, F3 and F4. The defending champion, Jean-Bruno Pastorello came in strong with his team. With the impressive lineup of the competition, will he be able to repeat last year's victory?

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 2 - Arrival

programme.title: Jet RAID - Greece
programme.desc: Welcome to the 2021 edition of Jet Raid, the Dakar of the Seas. This first step of the World Championship is celebrated in Greece and it englobes endurance races, slalom, navigation races and enlaces as well as four different categories: Course F1, F2, F3 and F4.The race is on at the Jet Raid 2021 of Athens. From the 29 riders, who will earn the podium? Find out the highlights of the Dakar of the Seas, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 3 - ROLEX FASTNET RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX FASTNET RACE.This is a sporting institution, 340 boats on a 603 nautical mile charge, battling whatever weather conditions are thrown at them, as they make their way across the ocean from Cowes, to the symbol of the race, the Fastnet Rock, before heading back to Plymouth.This race first conceived in 1925 is the ultimate test of both inshore and offshore sailing skills and is unquestionably one of the greatest events in the international yachting calendar.

programme.title: South to Sian
programme.desc: In a time where there are fences around everything, and we are denied the instinct of self-preservation, it is difficult to find a place free from rules and restrictions, but not yet impossible.Surf movies come and go, a million waves in exotic locations and surfers flown in for three-day shoots on perfect swells, but the spirit of adventure never dies.What began as a three-month trip to a collection of surf breaks off the beaten track turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration, injury, companionship and 4,000km of two-wheeled, single-finned escape from the the real-world burdens of modern life.Harrison Roach and Zye Norris pack their bags, a diverse quiver of boards, two bikes and a 50-dollar tent into a 1970s Land Rover and embark on an epic quest from the southern reaches of Bali, through the Indonesian archipelago to Northern Sumatra’s isolated Lagundri Bay. programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 4 - MAXI YACHT ROLEX
programme.desc: MAXI YACHT ROLEX.Costa Smeralda – the Emerald Coast – once again provides a stunning backdrop, with a variety of challenging conditions, for the Maxi Yacht Rolex Cup, a highlight of the Mediterranean yachting season. Each September a fleet of the world’s mostelegant, powerful and spectacular yachts gather to battle for one of yachting’s most revered and celebrated competitions, with the coveted World Championship the focal point of the week.

programme.desc: In a time where there are fences around everything, and we are denied the instinct of self-preservation, it is difficult to find a place free from rules and restrictions, but not yet impossible.Surf movies come and go, a million waves in exotic locations and surfers flown in for three-day shoots on perfect swells, but the spirit of adventure never dies.What began as a three-month trip to a collection of surf breaks off the beaten track turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration, injury, companionship and 4,000km of two-wheeled, single-finned escape from the the real-world burdens of modern life.Harrison Roach and Zye Norris pack their bags, a diverse quiver of boards, two bikes and a 50-dollar tent into a 1970s Land Rover and embark on an epic quest from the southern reaches of Bali, through the Indonesian archipelago to Northern Sumatra’s isolated Lagundri Bay. On boards, on bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, the pair’s journey is to discover if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.

programme.title: Travemunder Woche
programme.desc: A week of top-class sailing in the Bay of Lubeck. Perfect conditions for the 125th anniversary of this legendary German sailing event in the Baltic Sea. 30 different classes race and European championships are in 10 of them. Catch the highlights of this eight days sailing event only on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 6: Dugi Otok and Vrana Lake
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: This time we stay in Europe but find ourselves in Russia's most western and exquisite city: St. Petersburg. We are following the 2019 RS:X Youth World Championship, and this event was hosted by the St. Petersburg Regional Sports, non-governmental Organization: Yacht Club of St. Petersburg. We stay for the opening ceremony before flying to China for the Nimble Cup Asian Windsurfing Championship 2019. To round off the trip in Olympic classes, join us as we fet off to Italy's San Remo for the 470 European Championships.

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 5

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 1 - Nelson Mandela Pro
programme.desc: The first event of the South African WQS during series kicks off in Nelson Mandela Bay. Challenging conditions make it even tougher for surfers to get the vital points they need to advance. Will they have what it takes to raise to the top? Don’t miss all the action, the disappointments and victories at the start of what will be an epic African series.

programme.title: South to Sian
programme.desc: In a time where there are fences around everything, and we are denied the instinct of self-preservation, it is difficult to find a place free from rules and restrictions, but not yet impossible.Surf movies come and go, a million waves in exotic locations and surfers flown in for three-day shoots on perfect swells, but the spirit of adventure never dies.What began as a three-month trip to a collection of surf breaks off the beaten track turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration, injury, companionship and 4,000km of two-wheeled, single-finned escape from the the real-world burdens of modern life.Harrison Roach and Zye Norris pack their bags, a diverse quiver of boards, two bikes and a 50-dollar tent into a 1970s Land Rover and embark on an epic quest from the southern reaches of Bali, through the Indonesian archipelago to Northern Sumatra’s isolated Lagundri Bay. programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 2 - Port Alfred Classic
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the South Africa WQS Surf Series. This time, we are in Port Alfred at The Royal St Andrews Hotel Port Alfred Classic. Some of South Africa's best waves can be surfed here despite also being one of the most underrated locations. We are in for a thrill!

programme.title: Sailing Documentary Show
programme.desc: Sailing boats have always come in different shapes and size. Whether if they are used for competition, fishing or recreational use, competition has always been at the heart of sport, pushing boundaries in technological advancements.The Extreme Sailing Series combines the top class sailing teams and the advanced innovations in technology, and watching the races becomes a thrill to spectators. With circuits that range through eight global events, the Extreme Sailing Series is breaking boundaries. Follow the journey of boats that are some of the fastest in production and that can reach speeds of just under 40 knots or almost 75 kilometres per hour.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 1 - Nelson Mandela Pro
programme.desc: The first event of the South African WQS during series kicks off in Nelson Mandela Bay. Challenging conditions make it even tougher for surfers to get the vital points they need to advance. Will they have what it takes to raise to the top? Don’t miss all the action, the disappointments and victories at the start of what will be an epic African series.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 3 - ROLEX FASTNET RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX FASTNET RACE.This is a sporting institution, 340 boats on a 603 nautical mile charge, battling whatever weather conditions are thrown at them, as they make their way across the ocean from Cowes, to the symbol of the race, the Fastnet Rock, before heading back to Plymouth.This race first conceived in 1925 is the ultimate test of both inshore and offshore sailing skills and is unquestionably one of the greatest events in the international yachting calendar.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 2 - Port Alfred Classic
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the South Africa WQS Surf Series. This time, we are in Port Alfred at The Royal St Andrews Hotel Port Alfred Classic. Some of South Africa's best waves can be surfed here despite also being one of the most underrated locations. We are in for a thrill!

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 4 - MAXI YACHT ROLEX
programme.desc: MAXI YACHT ROLEX.Costa Smeralda – the Emerald Coast – once again provides a stunning backdrop, with a variety of challenging conditions, for the Maxi Yacht Rolex Cup, a highlight of the Mediterranean yachting season. Each September a fleet of the world’s mostelegant, powerful and spectacular yachts gather to battle for one of yachting’s most revered and celebrated competitions, with the coveted World Championship the focal point of the week.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 3 - ROLEX FASTNET RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX FASTNET RACE.This is a sporting institution, 340 boats on a 603 nautical mile charge, battling whatever weather conditions are thrown at them, as they make their way across the ocean from Cowes, to the symbol of the race, the Fastnet Rock, before heading back to Plymouth.This race first conceived in 1925 is the ultimate test of both inshore and offshore sailing skills and is unquestionably one of the greatest events in the international yachting calendar.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 2 - Arrival
programme.desc: 15 crews set off for the world's toughest double-handed transatlantic race, the 7000km Transat AG2R La Mondiale to Saint-Barthélemy in the Caribbean. Ready to push their Figaro Bénéteaus 200% to collect the prize in Port of Gustavia, the battle is about to get intense. Watch the best moments as the boats crossed the finish line in the dreamy Caribbean island!

programme.title: Tour De France à La Voile - Episode 1
programme.desc: For its 38th edition, the Tour de France à la Voile has undergone a revolution. Out with the monohulls and in with the trimarans! Also, no more sailing from one venue to another, instead races will be shorter, more intense and spectacular, so the crowd will be closer to the action. Let's relive the best moments of the Tour de France à la Voile 2015.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Ciuri Ciuri
programme.desc: Sicily, the largest Mediterranean island and just off the “toe” of Italy’s “boot” is the destination chosen this time by our Nautical Hosts Andi and Chelsey as they head to the South of Italy to meet up with renowned Sicilian sailors.Its rich history is not only reflected in their cuisine and culture, but also on their sailing techniques that balance tradition with modern skills. They will discover the coastlines near Palermo to learn how to tack and jibe and of course will try the delicious Sicilian cuisine.Join Andi and Chelsey on their journey around Sicily learning about sailing and tasting traditional dishes in Ciuri Ciuri, exclusive on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: US F1 Powerboats - Round 1 Port Neches
programme.desc: Welcome to Port Neches in Texas for Round 1 of the 2019 NG K F1 powerboat series. We are bringing all the action from the season ahead starting here in Texas, but before, we will look back at the best action from last season to get us started. We're ready to race off!

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 6
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of Sailing to Tokyo! This time we visit the famous Torbole where the whole of the Worldwide Olympic Windsurfing community focusses for the 2019 RS:X Windsurfing World Championships. Then, we will move to Asia and the largest in the United Arab Emirates, Abu Dhabi. There, the Abu Dhabi Sailing and Yacht club hosted the inaugural 49er and 49er FX Asian Championships. To round off the trip, we stay in Asia but jet off to Japaon for one of the most significant events in the 470 class: the 2019 470 World Championship.

programme.desc: For its 38th edition, the Tour de France à la Voile has undergone a revolution. Out with the monohulls and in with the trimarans! Also, no more sailing from one venue to another, instead races will be shorter, more intense and spectacular, so the crowd will be closer to the action. Let's relive the best moments of the Tour de France à la Voile 2015.

programme.title: Alpine Freestyle Kayaking
programme.desc: Graz, at the south of Austria, is a popular tourist destination as it has been recognized as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. The Mur River is a defining feature of Graz. It runs through a total of four countries: Austria, Slovenia, Croatia and Hungary.Graz is also the home of Austria's number one Freestyle Kayaker Marcel Bloder. Together with him, we'll be exploring Graz and the Mur River and joining him on his journey to the 2013 ECA Freestyle Kayaking Euro Cup in Slovakia.Join Lucia Metzbauer in her new adventure in Graz in Alpine Freestyle Kayak.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 6: Dugi Otok and Vrana Lake
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 2 - Arrival
programme.desc: 15 crews set off for the world's toughest double-handed transatlantic race, the 7000km Transat AG2R La Mondiale to Saint-Barthélemy in the Caribbean. Ready to push their Figaro Bénéteaus 200% to collect the prize in Port of Gustavia, the battle is about to get intense. Watch the best moments as the boats crossed the finish line in the dreamy Caribbean island!

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 4 - MAXI YACHT ROLEX
programme.desc: MAXI YACHT ROLEX.Costa Smeralda – the Emerald Coast – once again provides a stunning backdrop, with a variety of challenging conditions, for the Maxi Yacht Rolex Cup, a highlight of the Mediterranean yachting season. Each September a fleet of the world’s mostelegant, powerful and spectacular yachts gather to battle for one of yachting’s most revered and celebrated competitions, with the coveted World Championship the focal point of the week.

programme.title: South to Sian
programme.desc: In a time where there are fences around everything, and we are denied the instinct of self-preservation, it is difficult to find a place free from rules and restrictions, but not yet impossible.Surf movies come and go, a million waves in exotic locations and surfers flown in for three-day shoots on perfect swells, but the spirit of adventure never dies.What began as a three-month trip to a collection of surf breaks off the beaten track turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration, injury, companionship and 4,000km of two-wheeled, single-finned escape from the the real-world burdens of modern life.Harrison Roach and Zye Norris pack their bags, a diverse quiver of boards, two bikes and a 50-dollar tent into a 1970s Land Rover and embark on an epic quest from the southern reaches of Bali, through the Indonesian archipelago to Northern Sumatra’s isolated Lagundri Bay. On boards, on bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, the pair’s journey is to discover if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.

programme.desc: Sicily, the largest Mediterranean island and just off the “toe” of Italy’s “boot” is the destination chosen this time by our Nautical Hosts Andi and Chelsey as they head to the South of Italy to meet up with renowned Sicilian sailors.Its rich history is not only reflected in their cuisine and culture, but also on their sailing techniques that balance tradition with modern skills. They will discover the coastlines near Palermo to learn how to tack and jibe and of course will try the delicious Sicilian cuisine.Join Andi and Chelsey on their journey around Sicily learning about sailing and tasting traditional dishes in Ciuri Ciuri, exclusive on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sailing Documentary Show
programme.desc: Sailing boats have always come in different shapes and size. Whether if they are used for competition, fishing or recreational use, competition has always been at the heart of sport, pushing boundaries in technological advancements.The Extreme Sailing Series combines the top class sailing teams and the advanced innovations in technology, and watching the races becomes a thrill to spectators. With circuits that range through eight global events, the Extreme Sailing Series is breaking boundaries. Follow the journey of boats that are some of the fastest in production and that can reach speeds of just under 40 knots or almost 75 kilometres per hour.

programme.title: Why Not Whitewater?
programme.desc: Welcome to Dimaro, the Rafting Center Val di Sole. Our story begins in 1982 when a group of adventurers decided to make history by being the first humans to raft down the River Noce. Not only they managed to go down the river against all odds, but they also fell in love with its beautiful landscapes and decided to share it with the rest of the world.Why Not Whitewater? takes us on a journey to the north of Italy to explore the valleys and rivers in the most adventurous ways. From canoening to kayaking and from rafting to hydrospeed, we are set to live an odyssey filled with adrenaline and fun that will leave you wondeing why not white water this summer!

programme.title: Brilliant Corners Jamaica
programme.desc: The Caribbean is filled with places where tourism is rare or close to non-existent. However, there is so much potential for cultural and water sports tourism, they are called Brilliant corners. Nautical Channel is on a mission to explore the brilliant corners of the Caribbean.Going from Haiti all the way to Jamaica or Barbados, we will dive into these brilliant corners, many of them with no tourism at all. With a sustainable tourism approach, get ready to live a fully local experience on Brilliant Corners Jamaica while we practice water sports, taste the traditional local dishes and talk with the habitants of the area.On this occasion, we venture into Jamaica: the third-largest island of the Greater Antilles and Caribbean, home to famous personalities like Bob Marley or Usain Bolt. Through extreme surf travel and consequent writing and aestheticized by jazz, Sam Bleakley gives a voice to the brilliant corners of this country, revealing the character of the place by getting inside the mind of a coastline as much as people.Immerse yourself in the beauty of the yet to discover areas of the Caribbean, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Monaco Winter Series - 2015
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Les Voiles de Saint Tropez - Episode 2 - Meeting and Sailing at Les Voiles De St Tropez
programme.desc: Marking the end of the Mediterranean yachting season, Les Voiles de Saint Tropez will be back for its 20th edition. Close to 4,000 sailors and more than 300 sailing yachts will gather in St Tropez in early autumn for an action-packed programme of competitive racing and lively social events.

Nautical Channel is on a mission to explore the brilliant corners of the Caribbean.Going from Haiti all the way to Jamaica or Barbados, we will dive into these brilliant corners, many of them with no tourism at all. With a sustainable tourism approach, get ready to live a fully local experience on Brilliant Corners Jamaica while we practice water sports, taste the traditional local dishes and talk with the habitants of the area.On this occasion, we venture into Jamaica: the third-largest island of the Greater Antilles and Caribbean, home to famous personalities like Bob Marley or Usain Bolt. Through extreme surf travel and consequent writing and aestheticized by jazz, Sam Bleakley gives a voice to the brilliant corners of this country, revealing the character of the place by getting inside the mind of a coastline as much as people.Immerse yourself in the beauty of the yet to discover areas of the Caribbean, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sailing Documentary Show
programme.desc: Sailing boats have always come in different shapes and size. Whether if they are used for competition, fishing or recreational use, competition has always been at the heart of sport, pushing boundaries in technological advancements.The Extreme Sailing Series combines the top class sailing teams and the advanced innovations in technology, and watching the races becomes a thrill to spectators. With circuits that range through eight global events, the Extreme Sailing Series is breaking boundaries. Follow the journey of boats that are some of the fastest in production and that can reach speeds of just under 40 knots or almost 75 kilometres per hour.

programme.title: Ciuri Ciuri
programme.desc: Sicily, the largest Mediterranean island and just off the “toe” of Italy’s “boot” is the destination chosen this time by our Nautical Hosts Andi and Chelsey as they head to the South of Italy to meet up with renowned Sicilian sailors.Its rich history is not only reflected in their cuisine and culture, but also on their sailing techniques that balance tradition with modern skills. They will discover the coastlines near Palermo to learn how to tack and jibe and of course will try the delicious Sicilian cuisine.Join Andi and Chelsey on their journey around Sicily learning about sailing and tasting traditional dishes in Ciuri Ciuri, exclusive on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 12
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 6
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of Sailing to Tokyo! This time we visit the famous Torbole where the whole of the Worldwide Olympic Windsurfing community focusses for the 2019 RS:X Windsurfing World Championships. Then, we will move to Asia and the largest in the United Arab Emirates, Abu Dhabi. There, the Abu Dhabi Sailing and Yacht club hosted the inaugural 49er and 49er FX Asian Championships. To round off the trip, we stay in Asia but jet off to Japaon for one of the most significant events in the 470 class: the 2019 470 World Championship.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 3 - ROLEX FASTNET RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX FASTNET RACE.This is a sporting institution, 340 boats on a 603 nautical mile charge, battling whatever weather conditions are thrown at them, as they make their way across the ocean from Cowes, to the symbol of the race, the Fastnet Rock, before heading back to Plymouth.This race first conceived in 1925 is the ultimate test of both inshore and offshore sailing skills and is unquestionably one of the greatest events in the international yachting calendar.

Each September a fleet of the world’s mostelegant, powerful and spectacular yachts gather to battle for one of yachting’s most revered and celebrated competitions, with the coveted World Championship the focal point of the week.

programme.title: Why Not Whitewater?
programme.desc: Welcome to Dimaro, the Rafting Center Val di Sole. Our story begins in 1982 when a group of adventurers decided to make history by being the first humans to raft down the River Noce. Not only they managed to go down the river against all odds, but they also fell in love with its beautiful landscapes and decided to share it with the rest of the world.Why Not Whitewater? takes us on a journey to the north of Italy to explore the valleys and rivers in the most adventurous ways. From canoening to kayaking and from rafting to hydrospeed, we are set to live an odyssey filled with adrenaline and fun that will leave you wondeing why not white water this summer!

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 2 - Port Alfred Classic

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 1
programme.desc: We set out to sail under the hot July sun and brilliant blue skies of Viareggio, a Tuscan port town best known for its long-standing tradition of shipbulding. The journey on board the Ghibellina will take us along the coast of central Italy, guiding us through the various sea passages of the area. Sit down, relax and get on board the Ghibellina with us!

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 3 - ROLEX FASTNET RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX FASTNET RACE.This is a sporting institution, 340 boats on a 603 nautical mile charge, battling whatever weather conditions are thrown at them, as they make their way across the ocean from Cowes, to the symbol of the race, the Fastnet Rock, before heading back to Plymouth.This race first conceived in 1925 is the ultimate test of both inshore and offshore sailing skills and is unquestionably one of the greatest events in the international yachting calendar.

programme.title: Sails In Sardinia
programme.desc: Sails in Sardinia takes us to the beautiful Italian island of Sardinia, the sescond largest island in the Mediterranean Sea, to visit the Yacht Club Costa Smeralda, in Porto Cervo. Known for being visited by the rich and famous, it also has a unique sailing history. We will get the true essence of competitive sailing at the Audi Settimana Delle Bocche, where the last leg of the TP52 Super Series is being held. We are meeting Ricardo Bonadeo, Commodore of the yacht club, to understand better how the 1967 non-profit organization has become today a world's leading organizer in international sailing events. Join Andi Van Zyl as she heads to the beautiful Costa Smeralda and interviews other big sailing personalities as Francesco Bruni and Terry Hutchinson, on Sails in Sardinia.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 4 - MAXI YACHT ROLEX
programme.desc: MAXI YACHT ROLEX.Costa Smeralda – the Emerald Coast – once again provides a stunning backdrop, with a variety of challenging conditions, for the Maxi Yacht Rolex Cup, a highlight of the Mediterranean yachting season. Each September a fleet of the world’s mostelegant, powerful and spectacular yachts gather to battle for one of yachting’s most revered and celebrated competitions, with the coveted World Championship the focal point of the week.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 3 - Vrboska - Split
programme.desc: Small city of Vrboska is a little piece of paradise for yachtsmen and Split is the biggest city in Dalmatia. We will show you where to go, what to see, and of course, some amazing food suggestions.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 9
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 4 - Zagreb
programme.desc: The capital of Croatia Zagreb is a not-to-miss destination, no matter if you arrive by boat, car or airplane. Only 1 hour from the coast it is definitely worth a visit. Most important attractions and some crazy museums will amaze you. There is also an interesting connection between Zagreb and nautics and we will reveal it all to you.

programme.title: What Sup - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this first episode of What SUP we meet David Brent and go paddleboarding for a chat on the water. He will talk about his experience on the stage before trying out the popular paddleboard yoga with Winny Clarke. We will hopefully learn how to relax on the water and not fall out of our boards too much!

programme.title: Sails In Sardinia

programme.title: What Sup - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to the second episode of What SUP. On today's episode, comedian Ryan Maglunob and the band the Elwins will join us in our adventures. Chris first saw Ryan perform live a few months ago, and he was amused throughout the whole set. Let's go take a paddle with Ryan before playing paddle pong and many other challenges!

programme.desc: Welcome to Dimaro, the Rafting Center Val di Sole. Our story begins in 1982 when a group of adventurers decided to make history by being the first humans to raft down the River Noce. Not only they managed to go down the river against all odds, but they also fell in love with its beautiful landscapes and decided to share it with the rest of the world.Why Not Whitewater? takes us on a journey to the north of Italy to explore the valleys and rivers in the most adventurous ways. From canoening to kayaking and from rafting to hydrospeed, we are set to live an odyssey filled with adrenaline and fun that will leave you wondeing why not white water this summer!

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 6
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of Sailing to Tokyo! This time we visit the famous Torbole where the whole of the Worldwide Olympic Windsurfing community focusses for the 2019 RS:X Windsurfing World Championships. Then, we will move to Asia and the largest in the United Arab Emirates, Abu Dhabi. There, the Abu Dhabi Sailing and Yacht club hosted the inaugural 49er and 49er FX Asian Championships. To round off the trip, we stay in Asia but jet off to Japaon for one of the most significant events in the 470 class: the 2019 470 World Championship.

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 6
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 3 - ROLEX FASTNET RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX FASTNET RACE.This is a sporting institution, 340 boats on a 603 nautical mile charge, battling whatever weather conditions are thrown at them, as they make their way across the ocean from Cowes, to the symbol of the race, the Fastnet Rock, before heading back to Plymouth.This race first conceived in 1925 is the ultimate test of both inshore and offshore sailing skills and is unquestionably one of the greatest events in the international yachting calendar.

programme.title: Brilliant Corners Jamaica
programme.desc: The Caribbean is filled with places where tourism is rare or close to non-existent. However, there is so much potential for cultural and water sports tourism, they are called Brilliant corners. Nautical Channel is on a mission to explore the brilliant corners of the Caribbean.Going from Haiti all the way to Jamaica or Barbados, we will dive into these brilliant corners, many of them with no tourism at all. With a sustainable tourism approach, get ready to live a fully local experience on Brilliant Corners Jamaica while we practice water sports, taste the traditional local dishes and talk with the habitants of the area.On this occasion, we venture into Jamaica: the third-largest island of the Greater Antilles and Caribbean, home to famous personalities like Bob Marley or Usain Bolt. Through extreme surf travel and consequent writing and aestheticized by jazz, Sam Bleakley gives a voice to the brilliant corners of this country, revealing the character of the place by getting inside the mind of a coastline as much as people.Immerse yourself in the beauty of the yet to discover areas of the Caribbean, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 4 - MAXI YACHT ROLEX
programme.desc: MAXI YACHT ROLEX.Costa Smeralda – the Emerald Coast – once again provides a stunning backdrop, with a variety of challenging conditions, for the Maxi Yacht Rolex Cup, a highlight of the Mediterranean yachting season. Each September a fleet of the world’s mostelegant, powerful and spectacular yachts gather to battle for one of yachting’s most revered and celebrated competitions, with the coveted World Championship the focal point of the week.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 1
programme.desc: We set out to sail under the hot July sun and brilliant blue skies of Viareggio, a Tuscan port town best known for its long-standing tradition of shipbulding. The journey on board the Ghibellina will take us along the coast of central Italy, guiding us through the various sea passages of the area. Sit down, relax and get on board the Ghibellina with us!

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - GP of Binh Dinh (Vietnam Runabout & Freestyle)
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sails In Sardinia
programme.desc: Sails in Sardinia takes us to the beautiful Italian island of Sardinia, the sescond largest island in the Mediterranean Sea, to visit the Yacht Club Costa Smeralda, in Porto Cervo. Known for being visited by the rich and famous, it also has a unique sailing history. We will get the true essence of competitive sailing at the Audi Settimana Delle Bocche, where the last leg of the TP52 Super Series is being held. We are meeting Ricardo Bonadeo, Commodore of the yacht club, to understand better how the 1967 non-profit organization has become today a world's leading organizer in international sailing events. Join Andi Van Zyl as she heads to the beautiful Costa Smeralda and interviews other big sailing personalities as Francesco Bruni and Terry Hutchinson, on Sails in Sardinia.

programme.desc: Welcome to Port Neches in Texas for Round 1 of the 2019 NG K F1 powerboat series. We are bringing all the action from the season ahead starting here in Texas, but before, we will look back at the best action from last season to get us started. We're ready to race off!

programme.title: Ciuri Ciuri
programme.desc: Sicily, the largest Mediterranean island and just off the “toe” of Italy’s “boot” is the destination chosen this time by our Nautical Hosts Andi and Chelsey as they head to the South of Italy to meet up with renowned Sicilian sailors.Its rich history is not only reflected in their cuisine and culture, but also on their sailing techniques that balance tradition with modern skills. They will discover the coastlines near Palermo to learn how to tack and jibe and of course will try the delicious Sicilian cuisine.Join Andi and Chelsey on their journey around Sicily learning about sailing and tasting traditional dishes in Ciuri Ciuri, exclusive on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Dusi Canoe Marathon - Episode 1
programme.desc: The three-day event of the FNB Dusi Canoe Marathon is back again for the 2016 edition. Participants competing for the podium will have to trust their partners, be the best at route scouting and keep their focus until the very last moment, a task that is not easy at all. Both mental and physical preparation play a crucial part in one of the toughest paddling competitions. Relive the best moments of the 2016 edition of the Dusi Canoe Marathon.

programme.title: The Cyclades With Andi Van Zyl - Naxos Part 1
programme.desc: Andi van Zyl has just arrived to the island of Naxos for the start of summer and the windy season. Naxos is a gem in the Aegean sea, where laughter, activity , sprwaling nature and beautiful beaches await. She is determined to explore the diversity of the island, from ancient greek ruins to modern watersports. Will she be able to handle the strong winds or will rough seas get the better of her?

programme.title: The Cyclades With Andi Van Zyl - Naxos Part 2
programme.desc: Over the past few days Andi has been travelling around Naxos, the largest of the Cyclades Islands in Greece. Dive into the second episode of The Cyclades with Andi Van Zyl, exclusive on Nautical Channel.

Known for being visited by the rich and famous, it also has a unique sailing history. We will get the true essence of competitive sailing at the Audi Settimana Delle Bocche, where the last leg of the TP52 Super Series is being held. We are meeting Ricardo Bonadeo, Commodore of the yacht club, to understand better how the 1967 non-profit organization has become today a world's leading organizer in international sailing events. Join Andi Van Zyl as she heads to the beautiful Costa Smeralda and interviews other big sailing personalities as Francesco Bruni and Terry Hutchinson, on Sails in Sardinia.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 10
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 6
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Cyclades With Andi Van Zyl - Naxos Part 1
programme.desc: Andi van Zyl has just arrived to the island of Naxos for the start of summer and the windy season. Naxos is a gem in the Aegean sea, where laughter, activity , sprwaling nature and beautiful beaches await. She is determined to explore the diversity of the island, from ancient greek ruins to modern watersports. Will she be able to handle the strong winds or will rough seas get the better of her?

programme.title: The Cyclades With Andi Van Zyl - Naxos Part 2
programme.desc: Over the past few days Andi has been travelling around Naxos, the largest of the Cyclades Islands in Greece. The Mediterranean waters look so inviting and so Andi cannot resist the opportunity to try a diving lesson on the island. We start our adventure at Blue Fin divers to get on the water. Dive into the second episode of The Cyclades with Andi Van Zyl, exclusive on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Brilliant Corners Jamaica
programme.desc: The Caribbean is filled with places where tourism is rare or close to non-existent. However, there is so much potential for cultural and water sports tourism, they are called Brilliant corners. Nautical Channel is on a mission to explore the brilliant corners of the Caribbean.Going from Haiti all the way to Jamaica or Barbados, we will dive into these brilliant corners, many of them with no tourism at all. With a sustainable tourism approach, get ready to live a fully local experience on Brilliant Corners Jamaica while we practice water sports, taste the traditional local dishes and talk with the habitants of the area.On this occasion, we venture into Jamaica: the third-largest island of the Greater Antilles and Caribbean, home to famous personalities like Bob Marley or Usain Bolt. Through extreme surf travel and consequent writing and aestheticized by jazz, Sam Bleakley gives a voice to the brilliant corners of this country, revealing the character of the place by getting inside the mind of a coastline as much as people.Immerse yourself in the beauty of the yet to discover areas of the Caribbean, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 1 - Nelson Mandela Pro
programme.desc: The first event of the South African WQS during series kicks off in Nelson Mandela Bay. Challenging conditions make it even tougher for surfers to get the vital points they need to advance. Will they have what it takes to raise to the top? Don’t miss all the action, the disappointments and victories at the start of what will be an epic African series.

programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the South Africa WQS Surf Series. This time, we are in Port Alfred at The Royal St Andrews Hotel Port Alfred Classic. Some of South Africa's best waves can be surfed here despite also being one of the most underrated locations. We are in for a thrill!

programme.desc: Welcome to Port Neches in Texas for Round 1 of the 2019 NG K F1 powerboat series. We are bringing all the action from the season ahead starting here in Texas, but before, we will look back at the best action from last season to get us started. We're ready to race off!

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 3 - ROLEX FASTNET RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX FASTNET RACE.This is a sporting institution, 340 boats on a 603 nautical mile charge, battling whatever weather conditions are thrown at them, as they make their way across the ocean from Cowes, to the symbol of the race, the Fastnet Rock, before heading back to Plymouth.This race first conceived in 1925 is the ultimate test of both inshore and offshore sailing skills and is unquestionably one of the greatest events in the international yachting calendar.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 4 - MAXI YACHT ROLEX
programme.desc: MAXI YACHT ROLEX.Costa Smeralda – the Emerald Coast – once again provides a stunning backdrop, with a variety of challenging conditions, for the Maxi Yacht Rolex Cup, a highlight of the Mediterranean yachting season. Each September a fleet of the world’s mostelegant, powerful and spectacular yachts gather to battle for one of yachting’s most revered and celebrated competitions, with the coveted World Championship the focal point of the week.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 1
programme.desc: We set out to sail under the hot July sun and brilliant blue skies of Viareggio, a Tuscan port town best known for its long-standing tradition of shipbulding. The journey on board the Ghibellina will take us along the coast of central Italy, guiding us through the various sea passages of the area. Sit down, relax and get on board the Ghibellina with us!

programme.title: US F1 Powerboats - Round 1 Port Neches
programme.desc: Welcome to Port Neches in Texas for Round 1 of the 2019 NG K F1 powerboat series. We are bringing all the action from the season ahead starting here in Texas, but before, we will look back at the best action from last season to get us started. We're ready to race off!

programme.title: Ciuri Ciuri
programme.desc: Sicily, the largest Mediterranean island and just off the “toe” of Italy’s “boot” is the destination chosen this time by our Nautical Hosts Andi and Chelsey as they head to the South of Italy to meet up with renowned Sicilian sailors.Its rich history is not only reflected in their cuisine and culture, but also on their sailing techniques that balance tradition with modern skills. They will discover the coastlines near Palermo to learn how to tack and jibe and of course will try the delicious Sicilian cuisine.Join Andi and Chelsey on their journey around Sicily learning about sailing and tasting traditional dishes in Ciuri Ciuri, exclusive on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 10
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 6
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of Sailing to Tokyo! This time we visit the famous Torbole where the whole of the Worldwide Olympic Windsurfing community focusses for the 2019 RS:X Windsurfing World Championships. Then, we will move to Asia and the largest in the United Arab Emirates, Abu Dhabi. There, the Abu Dhabi Sailing and Yacht club hosted the inaugural 49er and 49er FX Asian Championships. To round off the trip, we stay in Asia but jet off to Japaon for one of the most significant events in the 470 class: the 2019 470 World Championship.

programme.title: Why Not Whitewater?
programme.desc: Welcome to Dimaro, the Rafting Center Val di Sole. Our story begins in 1982 when a group of adventurers decided to make history by being the first humans to raft down the River Noce. Not only they managed to go down the river against all odds, but they also fell in love with its beautiful landscapes and decided to share it with the rest of the world.Why Not Whitewater? takes us on a journey to the north of Italy to explore the valleys and rivers in the most adventurous ways. From canoening to kayaking and from rafting to hydrospeed, we are set to live an odyssey filled with adrenaline and fun that will leave you wondeing why not white water this summer!

programme.title: Monaco Yacht Show - 2013
programme.desc: Set in the iconic Port Hercules of the Principality of Monaco since 1991, the MYS is the only place to admire, visit and purchase around 125 extraordinary one-off superyachts built by the world’s most respectful shipyards. Experience the luxury, learn what is trending in the yachting world, and see exclusive test runs of this year's hottest yachts!

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 1 - Nelson Mandela Pro

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 5 - ROLEX MIDDLE SEA RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX MIDDLE SEA RACE.The Rolex Middle Sea Race takes place in October, in the heart of the Mediterranean, the final event of the European sailing season. Starting in the historic setting of Valletta’s Grand Harbour, the fleet travels through probably the most visually stunning course in the world, as it makes its way around Sicily. Along the 606 nautical mile journey, sights include, the Strait of Messina, the azure clear waters of Sicily, the Islands of Pantelleria and Lampedusa and the ultimate highlight, the active volcano of Stromboli, before returning to Malta. Tactically demanding, with famously changeable weather conditions, this is a classic test of seamanship.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 2 - Port Alfred Classic
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the South Africa WQS Surf Series. This time, we are in Port Alfred at The Royal St Andrews Hotel Port Alfred Classic. Some of South Africa's best waves can be surfed here despite also being one of the most underrated locations. We are in for a thrill!

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 6 - ROLEX SYDNEY HOBART YACHT RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX SYDNEY HOBART YACHT RACE.The definitive blue water classic, which for more than 70 years has enticed, captivated and challenged sailors from around the world. The Rolex Sydney Hobart Race is a 628 nautical mile sailing adventure full of drama, spectacle and camaraderie. The Boxing Day start from Sydney Harbour, watched by hundreds of thousands of festive spectators, is one of the sports iconic sights

programme.desc: Welcome to Port Neches in Texas for Round 1 of the 2019 NG K F1 powerboat series. We are bringing all the action from the season ahead starting here in Texas, but before, we will look back at the best action from last season to get us started. We're ready to race off!

programme.desc: The first event of the South African WQS during series kicks off in Nelson Mandela Bay. Challenging conditions make it even tougher for surfers to get the vital points they need to advance. Will they have what it takes to raise to the top? Don’t miss all the action, the disappointments and victories at the start of what will be an epic African series.

programme.title: Tahiti Pearl Regatta - Episode 1
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Ciuri Ciuri
programme.desc: Sicily, the largest Mediterranean island and just off the “toe” of Italy’s “boot” is the destination chosen this time by our Nautical Hosts Andi and Chelsey as they head to the South of Italy to meet up with renowned Sicilian sailors.Its rich history is not only reflected in their cuisine and culture, but also on their sailing techniques that balance tradition with modern skills. They will discover the coastlines near Palermo to learn how to tack and jibe and of course will try the delicious Sicilian cuisine.Join Andi and Chelsey on their journey around Sicily learning about sailing and tasting traditional dishes in Ciuri Ciuri, exclusive on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Monaco Yacht Show - 2013
programme.desc: Set in the iconic Port Hercules of the Principality of Monaco since 1991, the MYS is the only place to admire, visit and purchase around 125 extraordinary one-off superyachts built by the world’s most respectful shipyards. Experience the luxury, learn what is trending in the yachting world, and see exclusive test runs of this year's hottest yachts!

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 6
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of Sailing to Tokyo! This time we visit the famous Torbole where the whole of the Worldwide Olympic Windsurfing community focusses for the 2019 RS:X Windsurfing World Championships. Then, we will move to Asia and the largest in the United Arab Emirates, Abu Dhabi. There, the Abu Dhabi Sailing and Yacht club hosted the inaugural 49er and 49er FX Asian Championships. To round off the trip, we stay in Asia but jet off to Japaon for one of the most significant events in the 470 class: the 2019 470 World Championship.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 5 - ROLEX MIDDLE SEA RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX MIDDLE SEA RACE.The Rolex Middle Sea Race takes place in October, in the heart of the Mediterranean, the final event of the European sailing season. Starting in the historic setting of Valletta’s Grand Harbour, the fleet travels through probably the most visually stunning course in the world, as it makes its way around Sicily. Along the 606 nautical mile journey, sights include, the Strait of Messina, the azure clear waters of Sicily, the Islands of Pantelleria and Lampedusa and the ultimate highlight, the active volcano of Stromboli, before returning to Malta. Tactically demanding, with famously changeable weather conditions, this is a classic test of seamanship.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 1
programme.desc: We set out to sail under the hot July sun and brilliant blue skies of Viareggio, a Tuscan port town best known for its long-standing tradition of shipbulding. The journey on board the Ghibellina will take us along the coast of central Italy, guiding us through the various sea passages of the area. Sit down, relax and get on board the Ghibellina with us!

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 6 - ROLEX SYDNEY HOBART YACHT RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX SYDNEY HOBART YACHT RACE.The definitive blue water classic, which for more than 70 years has enticed, captivated and challenged sailors from around the world. The Rolex Sydney Hobart Race is a 628 nautical mile sailing adventure full of drama, spectacle and camaraderie. The Boxing Day start from Sydney Harbour, watched by hundreds of thousands of festive spectators, is one of the sports iconic sights

programme.title: Sails In Sardinia
programme.desc: Sails in Sardinia takes us to the beautiful Italian island of Sardinia, the sescond largest island in the Mediterranean Sea, to visit the Yacht Club Costa Smeralda, in Porto Cervo. Known for being visited by the rich and famous, it also has a unique sailing history. We will get the true essence of competitive sailing at the Audi Settimana Delle Bocche, where the last leg of the TP52 Super Series is being held. We are meeting Ricardo Bonadeo, Commodore of the yacht club, to understand better how the 1967 non-profit organization has become today a world's leading organizer in international sailing events. Join Andi Van Zyl as she heads to the beautiful Costa Smeralda and interviews other big sailing personalities as Francesco Bruni and Terry Hutchinson, on Sails in Sardinia.

programme.title: Brilliant Corners Jamaica
programme.desc: The Caribbean is filled with places where tourism is rare or close to non-existent. However, there is so much potential for cultural and water sports tourism, they are called Brilliant corners. Nautical Channel is on a mission to explore the brilliant corners of the Caribbean.Going from Haiti all the way to Jamaica or Barbados, we will dive into these brilliant corners, many of them with no tourism at all. With a sustainable tourism approach, get ready to live a fully local experience on Brilliant Corners Jamaica while we practice water sports, taste the traditional local dishes and talk with the habitants of the area.On this occasion, we venture into Jamaica: the third-largest island of the Greater Antilles and Caribbean, home to famous personalities like Bob Marley or Usain Bolt. Through extreme surf travel and consequent writing and aestheticized by jazz, Sam Bleakley gives a voice to the brilliant corners of this country, revealing the character of the place by getting inside the mind of a coastline as much as people.Immerse yourself in the beauty of the yet to discover areas of the Caribbean, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Why Not Whitewater?
programme.desc: Welcome to Dimaro, the Rafting Center Val di Sole. Our story begins in 1982 when a group of adventurers decided to make history by being the first humans to raft down the River Noce. Not only they managed to go down the river against all odds, but they also fell in love with its beautiful landscapes and decided to share it with the rest of the world.Why Not Whitewater? takes us on a journey to the north of Italy to explore the valleys and rivers in the most adventurous ways. From canoening to kayaking and from rafting to hydrospeed, we are set to live an odyssey filled with adrenaline and fun that will leave you wondeing why not white water this summer!

programme.desc: ROLEX SYDNEY HOBART YACHT RACE.The definitive blue water classic, which for more than 70 years has enticed, captivated and challenged sailors from around the world. The Rolex Sydney Hobart Race is a 628 nautical mile sailing adventure full of drama, spectacle and camaraderie. The Boxing Day start from Sydney Harbour, watched by hundreds of thousands of festive spectators, is one of the sports iconic sights

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 6
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Ciuri Ciuri
programme.desc: Sicily, the largest Mediterranean island and just off the “toe” of Italy’s “boot” is the destination chosen this time by our Nautical Hosts Andi and Chelsey as they head to the South of Italy to meet up with renowned Sicilian sailors.Its rich history is not only reflected in their cuisine and culture, but also on their sailing techniques that balance tradition with modern skills. They will discover the coastlines near Palermo to learn how to tack and jibe and of course will try the delicious Sicilian cuisine.Join Andi and Chelsey on their journey around Sicily learning about sailing and tasting traditional dishes in Ciuri Ciuri, exclusive on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Brilliant Corners Jamaica
programme.desc: The Caribbean is filled with places where tourism is rare or close to non-existent. However, there is so much potential for cultural and water sports tourism, they are called Brilliant corners. Nautical Channel is on a mission to explore the brilliant corners of the Caribbean.Going from Haiti all the way to Jamaica or Barbados, we will dive into these brilliant corners, many of them with no tourism at all. With a sustainable tourism approach, get ready to live a fully local experience on Brilliant Corners Jamaica while we practice water sports, taste the traditional local dishes and talk with the habitants of the area.On this occasion, we venture into Jamaica: the third-largest island of the Greater Antilles and Caribbean, home to famous personalities like Bob Marley or Usain Bolt. Through extreme surf travel and consequent writing and aestheticized by jazz, Sam Bleakley gives a voice to the brilliant corners of this country, revealing the character of the place by getting inside the mind of a coastline as much as people.Immerse yourself in the beauty of the yet to discover areas of the Caribbean, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 6
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of Sailing to Tokyo! This time we visit the famous Torbole where the whole of the Worldwide Olympic Windsurfing community focusses for the 2019 RS:X Windsurfing World Championships. Then, we will move to Asia and the largest in the United Arab Emirates, Abu Dhabi. There, the Abu Dhabi Sailing and Yacht club hosted the inaugural 49er and 49er FX Asian Championships. To round off the trip, we stay in Asia but jet off to Japaon for one of the most significant events in the 470 class: the 2019 470 World Championship.

programme.title: US F1 Powerboats - Round 1 Port Neches
programme.desc: Welcome to Port Neches in Texas for Round 1 of the 2019 NG K F1 powerboat series. We are bringing all the action from the season ahead starting here in Texas, but before, we will look back at the best action from last season to get us started. We're ready to race off!

programme.title: A Surfing Life: David Van Zyl
programme.desc: David Van Zyl is a young South-African surfer that is quickly gaining popularity and becoming a rising star on the pro-surfer scene. For surf connoisseurs, his name has made history in 2019 as the first International Surfer to ever win the Vans Pro competition in Hawaii. Before then, Hawaiian surfers had an undefeated upper hand that was finally overcome by this young underdog. He now faces new challenges to engrave his name in fame.Get ready to catch some South African waves with David Van Zyl and find out more about his lifestyle on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 1
programme.desc: We set out to sail under the hot July sun and brilliant blue skies of Viareggio, a Tuscan port town best known for its long-standing tradition of shipbulding. The journey on board the Ghibellina will take us along the coast of central Italy, guiding us through the various sea passages of the area. Sit down, relax and get on board the Ghibellina with us!

programme.title: Discovering Halki
programme.desc: In the south-eastern corner of the Aegean, west of Rhodes, there is a cosy island, a truly untouched gem of the Dodecanese. It’s a realm of rock and absolute peace; an island with great nautical tradition and proud islanders with an innate warmth.If you are looking for a hidden paradise on earth, then you have found the right place. Greece is home to a small island called Halki. Majestic and mystical; ethereal; elegant yet unpolished; and truly authentic.In this episode, we will visit Halki’s capital, Emborio and we will explore, with captain George, all the natural hidden treasures of the island.We are set to discover deep caves, bask on Trahia and Kania beach, and explore Alimia islet. We will visit an abandoned village, learning more about its rich history, and scuba dive down to the sea floor to get closer to a legendary shipwreck.Still untouched by mass tourism, Halki is the perfect destination for relaxing holidays away from the bright lights or for a quick getaway from the island of Rhodes. Watch Discovering Halki to become part of this almost untouched territory that is worth visiting.

programme.title: Sails In Sardinia
programme.desc: Sails in Sardinia takes us to the beautiful Italian island of Sardinia, the sescond largest island in the Mediterranean Sea, to visit the Yacht Club Costa Smeralda, in Porto Cervo. Known for being visited by the rich and famous, it also has a unique sailing history. We will get the true essence of competitive sailing at the Audi Settimana Delle Bocche, where the last leg of the TP52 Super Series is being held. We are meeting Ricardo Bonadeo, Commodore of the yacht club, to understand better how the 1967 non-profit organization has become today a world's leading organizer in international sailing events. Join Andi Van Zyl as she heads to the beautiful Costa Smeralda and interviews other big sailing personalities as Francesco Bruni and Terry Hutchinson, on Sails in Sardinia.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 5 - ROLEX MIDDLE SEA RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX MIDDLE SEA RACE.The Rolex Middle Sea Race takes place in October, in the heart of the Mediterranean, the final event of the European sailing season. Starting in the historic setting of Valletta’s Grand Harbour, the fleet travels through probably the most visually stunning course in the world, as it makes its way around Sicily. Along the 606 nautical mile journey, sights include, the Strait of Messina, the azure clear waters of Sicily, the Islands of Pantelleria and Lampedusa and the ultimate highlight, the active volcano of Stromboli, before returning to Malta. Tactically demanding, with famously changeable weather conditions, this is a classic test of seamanship.
