programme.title: Why Not Whitewater?
programme.desc: Welcome to Dimaro, the Rafting Center Val di Sole. Our story begins in 1982 when a group of adventurers decided to make history by being the first humans to raft down the River Noce. Not only they managed to go down the river against all odds, but they also fell in love with its beautiful landscapes and decided to share it with the rest of the world.Why Not Whitewater? takes us on a journey to the north of Italy to explore the valleys and rivers in the most adventurous ways. From canoening to kayaking and from rafting to hydrospeed, we are set to live an odyssey filled with adrenaline and fun that will leave you wondeing why not white water this summer!

Then, we will move to Asia and the largest in the United Arab Emirates, Abu Dhabi. There, the Abu Dhabi Sailing and Yacht club hosted the inaugural 49er and 49er FX Asian Championships. To round off the trip, we stay in Asia but jet off to Japaon for one of the most significant events in the 470 class: the 2019 470 World Championship.

programme.title: Sails In Sardinia
programme.desc: Sails in Sardinia takes us to the beautiful Italian island of Sardinia, the sescond largest island in the Mediterranean Sea, to visit the Yacht Club Costa Smeralda, in Porto Cervo. Known for being visited by the rich and famous, it also has a unique sailing history. We will get the true essence of competitive sailing at the Audi Settimana Delle Bocche, where the last leg of the TP52 Super Series is being held. We are meeting Ricardo Bonadeo, Commodore of the yacht club, to understand better how the 1967 non-profit organization has become today a world's leading organizer in international sailing events. Join Andi Van Zyl as she heads to the beautiful Costa Smeralda and interviews other big sailing personalities as Francesco Bruni and Terry Hutchinson, on Sails in Sardinia.

This is one of the highlights of the WSL Africa tour and features a Women’s QS 3000, Men’s QS 1000 and Junior Men and Women’s QS 1000 rated events. With a field of top international and local surfers, this event is bound to heat up as the best South African Surfers face off some formidable opponents. Fierce competition may see some position changes ahead of the final event of the series.

Who will claim victory and take the overall series winnings in the season finale of the City Surf Series?

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Brilliant Corners Jamaica
programme.desc: The Caribbean is filled with places where tourism is rare or close to non-existent. However, there is so much potential for cultural and water sports tourism, they are called Brilliant corners. Nautical Channel is on a mission to explore the brilliant corners of the Caribbean.Going from Haiti all the way to Jamaica or Barbados, we will dive into these brilliant corners, many of them with no tourism at all. With a sustainable tourism approach, get ready to live a fully local experience on Brilliant Corners Jamaica while we practice water sports, taste the traditional local dishes and talk with the habitants of the area.On this occasion, we venture into Jamaica: the third-largest island of the Greater Antilles and Caribbean, home to famous personalities like Bob Marley or Usain Bolt. Through extreme surf travel and consequent writing and aestheticized by jazz, Sam Bleakley gives a voice to the brilliant corners of this country, revealing the character of the place by getting inside the mind of a coastline as much as people.Immerse yourself in the beauty of the yet to discover areas of the Caribbean, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Why Not Whitewater?
programme.desc: Welcome to Dimaro, the Rafting Center Val di Sole. Our story begins in 1982 when a group of adventurers decided to make history by being the first humans to raft down the River Noce. Not only they managed to go down the river against all odds, but they also fell in love with its beautiful landscapes and decided to share it with the rest of the world.Why Not Whitewater? takes us on a journey to the north of Italy to explore the valleys and rivers in the most adventurous ways. From canoening to kayaking and from rafting to hydrospeed, we are set to live an odyssey filled with adrenaline and fun that will leave you wondeing why not white water this summer!

programme.title: Ciuri Ciuri
programme.desc: Sicily, the largest Mediterranean island and just off the “toe” of Italy’s “boot” is the destination chosen this time by our Nautical Hosts Andi and Chelsey as they head to the South of Italy to meet up with renowned Sicilian sailors.Its rich history is not only reflected in their cuisine and culture, but also on their sailing techniques that balance tradition with modern skills. They will discover the coastlines near Palermo to learn how to tack and jibe and of course will try the delicious Sicilian cuisine.Join Andi and Chelsey on their journey around Sicily learning about sailing and tasting traditional dishes in Ciuri Ciuri, exclusive on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 1
programme.desc: We set out to sail under the hot July sun and brilliant blue skies of Viareggio, a Tuscan port town best known for its long-standing tradition of shipbulding. The journey on board the Ghibellina will take us along the coast of central Italy, guiding us through the various sea passages of the area. Sit down, relax and get on board the Ghibellina with us!

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 10
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 5 - ROLEX MIDDLE SEA RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX MIDDLE SEA RACE.The Rolex Middle Sea Race takes place in October, in the heart of the Mediterranean, the final event of the European sailing season. Starting in the historic setting of Valletta’s Grand Harbour, the fleet travels through probably the most visually stunning course in the world, as it makes its way around Sicily. Along the 606 nautical mile journey, sights include, the Strait of Messina, the azure clear waters of Sicily, the Islands of Pantelleria and Lampedusa and the ultimate highlight, the active volcano of Stromboli, before returning to Malta. Tactically demanding, with famously changeable weather conditions, this is a classic test of seamanship.

programme.title: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 3 - GP of Binh Dinh - Vietnam
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 6 - ROLEX SYDNEY HOBART YACHT RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX SYDNEY HOBART YACHT RACE.The definitive blue water classic, which for more than 70 years has enticed, captivated and challenged sailors from around the world. The Rolex Sydney Hobart Race is a 628 nautical mile sailing adventure full of drama, spectacle and camaraderie. The Boxing Day start from Sydney Harbour, watched by hundreds of thousands of festive spectators, is one of the sports iconic sights

Nautical Channel is on a mission to explore the brilliant corners of the Caribbean.Going from Haiti all the way to Jamaica or Barbados, we will dive into these brilliant corners, many of them with no tourism at all. With a sustainable tourism approach, get ready to live a fully local experience on Brilliant Corners Jamaica while we practice water sports, taste the traditional local dishes and talk with the habitants of the area.On this occasion, we venture into Jamaica: the third-largest island of the Greater Antilles and Caribbean, home to famous personalities like Bob Marley or Usain Bolt. Through extreme surf travel and consequent writing and aestheticized by jazz, Sam Bleakley gives a voice to the brilliant corners of this country, revealing the character of the place by getting inside the mind of a coastline as much as people.Immerse yourself in the beauty of the yet to discover areas of the Caribbean, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 6 - ROLEX SYDNEY HOBART YACHT RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX SYDNEY HOBART YACHT RACE.The definitive blue water classic, which for more than 70 years has enticed, captivated and challenged sailors from around the world. The Rolex Sydney Hobart Race is a 628 nautical mile sailing adventure full of drama, spectacle and camaraderie. The Boxing Day start from Sydney Harbour, watched by hundreds of thousands of festive spectators, is one of the sports iconic sights

programme.title: Why Not Whitewater?
programme.desc: Welcome to Dimaro, the Rafting Center Val di Sole. Our story begins in 1982 when a group of adventurers decided to make history by being the first humans to raft down the River Noce. Not only they managed to go down the river against all odds, but they also fell in love with its beautiful landscapes and decided to share it with the rest of the world.Why Not Whitewater? takes us on a journey to the north of Italy to explore the valleys and rivers in the most adventurous ways. From canoening to kayaking and from rafting to hydrospeed, we are set to live an odyssey filled with adrenaline and fun that will leave you wondeing why not white water this summer!

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 3 - SA Open
programme.desc: The penultimate event of the South African Surf Series takes place at Pollock Beach. This is one of the highlights of the WSL Africa tour and features a Women’s QS 3000, Men’s QS 1000 and Junior Men and Women’s QS 1000 rated events. With a field of top international and local surfers, this event is bound to heat up as the best South African Surfers face off some formidable opponents. Fierce competition may see some position changes ahead of the final event of the series.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 10
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 4 - Vic Bay
programme.desc: The Vic Bay Classic takes place in the winter months so expect the biggest swells and highest quality of surfing. Watch former CT contender fight for the win as the crowd cheers their local hero. The fight for the mens series winner gets even closer at this final event. Who will claim victory and take the overall series winnings in the season finale of the City Surf Series?

programme.title: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 3 - GP of Binh Dinh - Vietnam
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 1
programme.desc: We set out to sail under the hot July sun and brilliant blue skies of Viareggio, a Tuscan port town best known for its long-standing tradition of shipbulding. The journey on board the Ghibellina will take us along the coast of central Italy, guiding us through the various sea passages of the area. Sit down, relax and get on board the Ghibellina with us!

programme.title: US F1 Powerboats - Round 2 Gulfport
programme.desc: Welcome to Toledo, Ohio, for the Pro Medica Rock the River Event as we are head over heels to bring you the round to the 2019 NGK F1 powerboat series. On Round One, Ashton Rinker took the first victory of the circuit, and now conditions are looking good for this next heat of the competition. On your marks, get set, GO!

programme.title: Sails In Sardinia
programme.desc: Sails in Sardinia takes us to the beautiful Italian island of Sardinia, the sescond largest island in the Mediterranean Sea, to visit the Yacht Club Costa Smeralda, in Porto Cervo. Known for being visited by the rich and famous, it also has a unique sailing history. We will get the true essence of competitive sailing at the Audi Settimana Delle Bocche, where the last leg of the TP52 Super Series is being held. We are meeting Ricardo Bonadeo, Commodore of the yacht club, to understand better how the 1967 non-profit organization has become today a world's leading organizer in international sailing events. Join Andi Van Zyl as she heads to the beautiful Costa Smeralda and interviews other big sailing personalities as Francesco Bruni and Terry Hutchinson, on Sails in Sardinia.

programme.title: Ciuri Ciuri
programme.desc: Sicily, the largest Mediterranean island and just off the “toe” of Italy’s “boot” is the destination chosen this time by our Nautical Hosts Andi and Chelsey as they head to the South of Italy to meet up with renowned Sicilian sailors.Its rich history is not only reflected in their cuisine and culture, but also on their sailing techniques that balance tradition with modern skills. They will discover the coastlines near Palermo to learn how to tack and jibe and of course will try the delicious Sicilian cuisine.Join Andi and Chelsey on their journey around Sicily learning about sailing and tasting traditional dishes in Ciuri Ciuri, exclusive on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 5 - ROLEX MIDDLE SEA RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX MIDDLE SEA RACE.The Rolex Middle Sea Race takes place in October, in the heart of the Mediterranean, the final event of the European sailing season. Starting in the historic setting of Valletta’s Grand Harbour, the fleet travels through probably the most visually stunning course in the world, as it makes its way around Sicily. Along the 606 nautical mile journey, sights include, the Strait of Messina, the azure clear waters of Sicily, the Islands of Pantelleria and Lampedusa and the ultimate highlight, the active volcano of Stromboli, before returning to Malta. Tactically demanding, with famously changeable weather conditions, this is a classic test of seamanship.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 6
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of Sailing to Tokyo! This time we visit the famous Torbole where the whole of the Worldwide Olympic Windsurfing community focusses for the 2019 RS:X Windsurfing World Championships. Then, we will move to Asia and the largest in the United Arab Emirates, Abu Dhabi. There, the Abu Dhabi Sailing and Yacht club hosted the inaugural 49er and 49er FX Asian Championships. To round off the trip, we stay in Asia but jet off to Japaon for one of the most significant events in the 470 class: the 2019 470 World Championship.

programme.desc: ROLEX SYDNEY HOBART YACHT RACE.The definitive blue water classic, which for more than 70 years has enticed, captivated and challenged sailors from around the world. The Rolex Sydney Hobart Race is a 628 nautical mile sailing adventure full of drama, spectacle and camaraderie. The Boxing Day start from Sydney Harbour, watched by hundreds of thousands of festive spectators, is one of the sports iconic sights

programme.title: Tour De France à La Voile - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to Dunkirk. Over the years, the northern city and its iconic beaches have become the traditional point of departure for the Tour de France à la Voile. Some skippers already have their sights set on victory, while others are here to discover the Tour and soak up the atmosphere to learn from the best. Let's dive into the action, on the 2016 Tour de France à la Voile!

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 5 - ROLEX MIDDLE SEA RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX MIDDLE SEA RACE.The Rolex Middle Sea Race takes place in October, in the heart of the Mediterranean, the final event of the European sailing season. Starting in the historic setting of Valletta’s Grand Harbour, the fleet travels through probably the most visually stunning course in the world, as it makes its way around Sicily. Along the 606 nautical mile journey, sights include, the Strait of Messina, the azure clear waters of Sicily, the Islands of Pantelleria and Lampedusa and the ultimate highlight, the active volcano of Stromboli, before returning to Malta. Tactically demanding, with famously changeable weather conditions, this is a classic test of seamanship.

programme.title: Skagerrak
programme.desc: SKAGERRAK follows the preparation and mental development of the Danish professional stand up paddle athlete Casper Steinfath in his attempt to be the first person in the world to paddle from Denmark to Norway.In his journey, brotherhood and friendship come to play an essential part making a dream and project like the crossing of an entire ocean come true. SKAGERRAK will take you behind the scenes of mainstream media and portrays the Northern and secluded region of Denmark called Thy, where Casper grew up.A region, where a pioneer spirit and desire for independence prevails despite adversity and isolation. SKAGERRAK is an inspirational story that touches upon the dreams, aspirations, and desires that live inside all of us. A film about the courage to reach for the horizon.

Starting in the historic setting of Valletta’s Grand Harbour, the fleet travels through probably the most visually stunning course in the world, as it makes its way around Sicily. Along the 606 nautical mile journey, sights include, the Strait of Messina, the azure clear waters of Sicily, the Islands of Pantelleria and Lampedusa and the ultimate highlight, the active volcano of Stromboli, before returning to Malta. Tactically demanding, with famously changeable weather conditions, this is a classic test of seamanship.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 6 - ROLEX SYDNEY HOBART YACHT RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX SYDNEY HOBART YACHT RACE.The definitive blue water classic, which for more than 70 years has enticed, captivated and challenged sailors from around the world. The Rolex Sydney Hobart Race is a 628 nautical mile sailing adventure full of drama, spectacle and camaraderie. The Boxing Day start from Sydney Harbour, watched by hundreds of thousands of festive spectators, is one of the sports iconic sights

programme.title: Skagerrak
programme.desc: SKAGERRAK follows the preparation and mental development of the Danish professional stand up paddle athlete Casper Steinfath in his attempt to be the first person in the world to paddle from Denmark to Norway.In his journey, brotherhood and friendship come to play an essential part making a dream and project like the crossing of an entire ocean come true. SKAGERRAK will take you behind the scenes of mainstream media and portrays the Northern and secluded region of Denmark called Thy, where Casper grew up.A region, where a pioneer spirit and desire for independence prevails despite adversity and isolation. SKAGERRAK is an inspirational story that touches upon the dreams, aspirations, and desires that live inside all of us. A film about the courage to reach for the horizon.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 10
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 1
programme.desc: We set out to sail under the hot July sun and brilliant blue skies of Viareggio, a Tuscan port town best known for its long-standing tradition of shipbulding. The journey on board the Ghibellina will take us along the coast of central Italy, guiding us through the various sea passages of the area. Sit down, relax and get on board the Ghibellina with us!

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 7: Rab, Crikvenica and Novi Vinodolski
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sails In Sardinia
programme.desc: Sails in Sardinia takes us to the beautiful Italian island of Sardinia, the sescond largest island in the Mediterranean Sea, to visit the Yacht Club Costa Smeralda, in Porto Cervo. Known for being visited by the rich and famous, it also has a unique sailing history. We will get the true essence of competitive sailing at the Audi Settimana Delle Bocche, where the last leg of the TP52 Super Series is being held. We are meeting Ricardo Bonadeo, Commodore of the yacht club, to understand better how the 1967 non-profit organization has become today a world's leading organizer in international sailing events. Join Andi Van Zyl as she heads to the beautiful Costa Smeralda and interviews other big sailing personalities as Francesco Bruni and Terry Hutchinson, on Sails in Sardinia.

programme.title: US F1 Powerboats - Round 2 Gulfport
programme.desc: Welcome to Toledo, Ohio, for the Pro Medica Rock the River Event as we are head over heels to bring you the round to the 2019 NGK F1 powerboat series. On Round One, Ashton Rinker took the first victory of the circuit, and now conditions are looking good for this next heat of the competition. On your marks, get set, GO!

programme.title: Brilliant Corners Jamaica
programme.desc: The Caribbean is filled with places where tourism is rare or close to non-existent. However, there is so much potential for cultural and water sports tourism, they are called Brilliant corners. Nautical Channel is on a mission to explore the brilliant corners of the Caribbean.Going from Haiti all the way to Jamaica or Barbados, we will dive into these brilliant corners, many of them with no tourism at all. With a sustainable tourism approach, get ready to live a fully local experience on Brilliant Corners Jamaica while we practice water sports, taste the traditional local dishes and talk with the habitants of the area.On this occasion, we venture into Jamaica: the third-largest island of the Greater Antilles and Caribbean, home to famous personalities like Bob Marley or Usain Bolt. Through extreme surf travel and consequent writing and aestheticized by jazz, Sam Bleakley gives a voice to the brilliant corners of this country, revealing the character of the place by getting inside the mind of a coastline as much as people.Immerse yourself in the beauty of the yet to discover areas of the Caribbean, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Monaco Winter Series - 2015
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Why Not Whitewater?
programme.desc: Welcome to Dimaro, the Rafting Center Val di Sole. Our story begins in 1982 when a group of adventurers decided to make history by being the first humans to raft down the River Noce. Not only they managed to go down the river against all odds, but they also fell in love with its beautiful landscapes and decided to share it with the rest of the world.Why Not Whitewater? takes us on a journey to the north of Italy to explore the valleys and rivers in the most adventurous ways. From canoening to kayaking and from rafting to hydrospeed, we are set to live an odyssey filled with adrenaline and fun that will leave you wondeing why not white water this summer!

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 3 - SA Open
programme.desc: The penultimate event of the South African Surf Series takes place at Pollock Beach. This is one of the highlights of the WSL Africa tour and features a Women’s QS 3000, Men’s QS 1000 and Junior Men and Women’s QS 1000 rated events. With a field of top international and local surfers, this event is bound to heat up as the best South African Surfers face off some formidable opponents. Fierce competition may see some position changes ahead of the final event of the series.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 4 - Vic Bay
programme.desc: The Vic Bay Classic takes place in the winter months so expect the biggest swells and highest quality of surfing. Watch former CT contender fight for the win as the crowd cheers their local hero. The fight for the mens series winner gets even closer at this final event. Who will claim victory and take the overall series winnings in the season finale of the City Surf Series?

programme.title: San Borondón
programme.desc: The popular legend claims San Borondón is an island that appears and disappears, normally under a heavy veil of fog. As adventurers departed on missions to be the first to locate it, not all returned from the depths of the ocean.Now, San Borondón is the name many local and international surfers have given to a dangerous wave spot on the Canary Islands. The film producer Rayco Cano, his team and five big wave riders embrace us in their story about these huge waves. The film features windsurfing pro Daniel Bruch, German big wave surfer Alexander Zirke, Manuel Lezcano, Ayoze Fernandea and David Rodal Santiago Vilayta.San Borondón stands for big wave surfing and adrenalin driven surfers, who risk a lot on their surfing boards and SUPs. The jet ski is a necessary safety tool. Discover hidden places with beautiful nature in the Canary Islands as this team of adventurers dive into action on the water, available on Nautical Channel.

Known for being visited by the rich and famous, it also has a unique sailing history. We will get the true essence of competitive sailing at the Audi Settimana Delle Bocche, where the last leg of the TP52 Super Series is being held. We are meeting Ricardo Bonadeo, Commodore of the yacht club, to understand better how the 1967 non-profit organization has become today a world's leading organizer in international sailing events. Join Andi Van Zyl as she heads to the beautiful Costa Smeralda and interviews other big sailing personalities as Francesco Bruni and Terry Hutchinson, on Sails in Sardinia.

Along the 606 nautical mile journey, sights include, the Strait of Messina, the azure clear waters of Sicily, the Islands of Pantelleria and Lampedusa and the ultimate highlight, the active volcano of Stromboli, before returning to Malta. Tactically demanding, with famously changeable weather conditions, this is a classic test of seamanship.

The Rolex Sydney Hobart Race is a 628 nautical mile sailing adventure full of drama, spectacle and camaraderie. The Boxing Day start from Sydney Harbour, watched by hundreds of thousands of festive spectators, is one of the sports iconic sights

programme.desc: The Vic Bay Classic takes place in the winter months so expect the biggest swells and highest quality of surfing. programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the sunny French Riviera for the 2016 Cannes Yachting Festival, a gathering in the name of luxury and excellence. In this year's edition, more than 200 models will be shown for the first time ever in the world. Let's find out the highlights of this incredible boat show.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: San Borondón
programme.desc: The popular legend claims San Borondón is an island that appears and disappears, normally under a heavy veil of fog. As adventurers departed on missions to be the first to locate it, not all returned from the depths of the ocean.Now, San Borondón is the name many local and international surfers have given to a dangerous wave spot on the Canary Islands. The film producer Rayco Cano, his team and five big wave riders embrace us in their story about these huge waves. The film features windsurfing pro Daniel Bruch, German big wave surfer Alexander Zirke, Manuel Lezcano, Ayoze Fernandea and David Rodal Santiago Vilayta.San Borondón stands for big wave surfing and adrenalin driven surfers, who risk a lot on their surfing boards and SUPs. The jet ski is a necessary safety tool. Discover hidden places with beautiful nature in the Canary Islands as this team of adventurers dive into action on the water, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Torrevieja Euromarina Optimist International Trophy - XV Trofeo Euromarina Optimist Torrevieja
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Skagerrak
programme.desc: SKAGERRAK follows the preparation and mental development of the Danish professional stand up paddle athlete Casper Steinfath in his attempt to be the first person in the world to paddle from Denmark to Norway.In his journey, brotherhood and friendship come to play an essential part making a dream and project like the crossing of an entire ocean come true. SKAGERRAK will take you behind the scenes of mainstream media and portrays the Northern and secluded region of Denmark called Thy, where Casper grew up.A region, where a pioneer spirit and desire for independence prevails despite adversity and isolation. SKAGERRAK is an inspirational story that touches upon the dreams, aspirations, and desires that live inside all of us. A film about the courage to reach for the horizon.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 1
programme.desc: We set out to sail under the hot July sun and brilliant blue skies of Viareggio, a Tuscan port town best known for its long-standing tradition of shipbulding. The journey on board the Ghibellina will take us along the coast of central Italy, guiding us through the various sea passages of the area. Sit down, relax and get on board the Ghibellina with us!

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 13
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sails In Sardinia
programme.desc: Sails in Sardinia takes us to the beautiful Italian island of Sardinia, the sescond largest island in the Mediterranean Sea, to visit the Yacht Club Costa Smeralda, in Porto Cervo. Known for being visited by the rich and famous, it also has a unique sailing history. We will get the true essence of competitive sailing at the Audi Settimana Delle Bocche, where the last leg of the TP52 Super Series is being held. We are meeting Ricardo Bonadeo, Commodore of the yacht club, to understand better how the 1967 non-profit organization has become today a world's leading organizer in international sailing events. Join Andi Van Zyl as she heads to the beautiful Costa Smeralda and interviews other big sailing personalities as Francesco Bruni and Terry Hutchinson, on Sails in Sardinia.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we will visit the Sicilian archipelago: the Aeolian islands. We dive into its beautiful landsdcape, villages of small white buildings and lush vegetation. These seven small islands are home to two active volcanos, Vulcano and Stromboli, and the reefs testify the many geological upheavals they have suffered. Enjoy the breathtaking sunrise as we leave the island of Stromboli.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 3 - SA Open
programme.desc: The penultimate event of the South African Surf Series takes place at Pollock Beach. Fierce competition may see some position changes ahead of the final event of the series.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: The glamorous city of Cannes hosts the luxury Yachting Festival par excellence for the 40th time this year and a new Luxury Gallery has been opened in the Palais de Festivals to celebrate this landmark anniversary. Breathe in the boat show’s opulence and learn about the latest trends in the yachting world!

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 4 - Vic Bay

Who will claim victory and take the overall series winnings in the season finale of the City Surf Series?

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 5 - Solta – Sibenik
programme.desc: The island of Solta is one of the most beautiful islands in the Central Dalmatia and we visited some very interesting places and coves. Sibenik is a city with many fortresses, old churches and UNESCO heritage. See it all in this episode.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 5 - ROLEX MIDDLE SEA RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX MIDDLE SEA RACE.The Rolex Middle Sea Race takes place in October, in the heart of the Mediterranean, the final event of the European sailing season. Tactically demanding, with famously changeable weather conditions, this is a classic test of seamanship.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 6 - Sibenik Islands - Murter
programme.desc: There are several interesting islands in the Sibenik area and we visited some of them. The island of Murter is known for its famous figs and delicacies from this healthy fruit. We will also show you some interesting places for swimming and sailing.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the sunny French Riviera for the 2016 Cannes Yachting Festival, a gathering in the name of luxury and excellence. In this year's edition, more than 200 models will be shown for the first time ever in the world. Let's find out the highlights of this incredible boat show.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 3 - SA Open
programme.desc: The penultimate event of the South African Surf Series takes place at Pollock Beach. This is one of the highlights of the WSL Africa tour and features a Women’s QS 3000, Men’s QS 1000 and Junior Men and Women’s QS 1000 rated events. With a field of top international and local surfers, this event is bound to heat up as the best South African Surfers face off some formidable opponents. Fierce competition may see some position changes ahead of the final event of the series.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the sunny French Riviera for the 2016 Cannes Yachting Festival, a gathering in the name of luxury and excellence. In this year's edition, more than 200 models will be shown for the first time ever in the world. Let's find out the highlights of this incredible boat show.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 4 - Vic Bay
programme.desc: The Vic Bay Classic takes place in the winter months so expect the biggest swells and highest quality of surfing. Watch former CT contender fight for the win as the crowd cheers their local hero. The fight for the mens series winner gets even closer at this final event. Who will claim victory and take the overall series winnings in the season finale of the City Surf Series?

programme.title: San Borondón
programme.desc: The popular legend claims San Borondón is an island that appears and disappears, normally under a heavy veil of fog. As adventurers departed on missions to be the first to locate it, not all returned from the depths of the ocean.Now, San Borondón is the name many local and international surfers have given to a dangerous wave spot on the Canary Islands. The film producer Rayco Cano, his team and five big wave riders embrace us in their story about these huge waves. The film features windsurfing pro Daniel Bruch, German big wave surfer Alexander Zirke, Manuel Lezcano, Ayoze Fernandea and David Rodal Santiago Vilayta.San Borondón stands for big wave surfing and adrenalin driven surfers, who risk a lot on their surfing boards and SUPs. The jet ski is a necessary safety tool. Discover hidden places with beautiful nature in the Canary Islands as this team of adventurers dive into action on the water, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sailing to the Games - Episode 2
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Skagerrak
programme.desc: SKAGERRAK follows the preparation and mental development of the Danish professional stand up paddle athlete Casper Steinfath in his attempt to be the first person in the world to paddle from Denmark to Norway.In his journey, brotherhood and friendship come to play an essential part making a dream and project like the crossing of an entire ocean come true. SKAGERRAK will take you behind the scenes of mainstream media and portrays the Northern and secluded region of Denmark called Thy, where Casper grew up.A region, where a pioneer spirit and desire for independence prevails despite adversity and isolation. SKAGERRAK is an inspirational story that touches upon the dreams, aspirations, and desires that live inside all of us. A film about the courage to reach for the horizon.

programme.title: Torrevieja Euromarina Optimist International Trophy - XV Trofeo Euromarina Optimist Torrevieja
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 5 - ROLEX MIDDLE SEA RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX MIDDLE SEA RACE.The Rolex Middle Sea Race takes place in October, in the heart of the Mediterranean, the final event of the European sailing season. Starting in the historic setting of Valletta’s Grand Harbour, the fleet travels through probably the most visually stunning course in the world, as it makes its way around Sicily. Along the 606 nautical mile journey, sights include, the Strait of Messina, the azure clear waters of Sicily, the Islands of Pantelleria and Lampedusa and the ultimate highlight, the active volcano of Stromboli, before returning to Malta. Tactically demanding, with famously changeable weather conditions, this is a classic test of seamanship.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we will visit the Sicilian archipelago: the Aeolian islands. We dive into its beautiful landsdcape, villages of small white buildings and lush vegetation. These seven small islands are home to two active volcanos, Vulcano and Stromboli, and the reefs testify the many geological upheavals they have suffered. Enjoy the breathtaking sunrise as we leave the island of Stromboli.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 6 - ROLEX SYDNEY HOBART YACHT RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX SYDNEY HOBART YACHT RACE.The definitive blue water classic, which for more than 70 years has enticed, captivated and challenged sailors from around the world. The Rolex Sydney Hobart Race is a 628 nautical mile sailing adventure full of drama, spectacle and camaraderie. The Boxing Day start from Sydney Harbour, watched by hundreds of thousands of festive spectators, is one of the sports iconic sights

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: The glamorous city of Cannes hosts the luxury Yachting Festival par excellence for the 40th time this year and a new Luxury Gallery has been opened in the Palais de Festivals to celebrate this landmark anniversary. Breathe in the boat show’s opulence and learn about the latest trends in the yachting world!

programme.title: Sailing to the Games - Episode 2
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Iballa - Corazón de Escamas
programme.desc: After more than two decades in the world class of sports and overcoming different personal and sporting challenges of great significance, Iballa Ruano Moreno achieved in 2018 an historical landmark unprecedented in professional sports: winning the world championships in the same year the PWA World Circuit of Windsurf and the APP World Tour of Stand Up Paddle. This milestone never before achieved by an active athlete, highlights the level of dedication and improvement that the Moreno Twins and specifically Iballa Ruano, have been successfully reaping for so many years. However, the journey wasn’t easy. Corazón de Escamas is a short biographical documentary told in the first person and that shows the most intimate part of its history and is dedicated with great affection to the Ruano Moreno family. Dive into the world of this Canarian athlete and find out her inspiring story.

programme.title: Maya Gabeira - Return to Nazaré
programme.desc: After a horrible crash in Nazaré that almost took her life, big wave surfer Maya Gabeira fights to overcome physical and mental obstacles and return to surf the giant waves again.Maya Gabeira, the Brazilian surfer that was close to death in 2013 in Nazaré due to big waves. She had to be rescued by lifeguards who struggled to get her out of waves that didn’t stop coming. After recovering physically and emotionally of the shock, she's ready to return to Nazaré to overcome the same obstacles that almost took her life years ago.Her determination is undeniable, as is the danger of tempting fate twice. However, once in Nazaré, will she have the strength needed to surf deathly waves?Follow her inspiring story in Maya Gabeira – Return to Nazaré.

programme.title: The Portofino Classic
programme.desc: The SIAD Bombola D’Oro Trophy is a regatta organized by the Italian Yacht Club, and a classic event in Italy’s sailing season. Situated in the picturesque bay of Portofino, this vintage regatta is a classic spectacle that drives the attention of people across Europe.The Bombola D’Oro partly connects its success to its boat class: the Dingy 12’. Designed in 1913, this class has maintained its appeal and tradition despite the assaults from extreme technical novelties. In The Portofino Classic, we will visit the port and experience this unique regatta to get a taste of the sailing culture in Italy.

programme.desc: After more than two decades in the world class of sports and overcoming different personal and sporting challenges of great significance, Iballa Ruano Moreno achieved in 2018 an historical landmark unprecedented in professional sports: winning the world championships in the same year the PWA World Circuit of Windsurf and the APP World Tour of Stand Up Paddle. This milestone never before achieved by an active athlete, highlights the level of dedication and improvement that the Moreno Twins and specifically Iballa Ruano, have been successfully reaping for so many years. However, the journey wasn’t easy. Corazón de Escamas is a short biographical documentary told in the first person and that shows the most intimate part of its history and is dedicated with great affection to the Ruano Moreno family. Dive into the world of this Canarian athlete and find out her inspiring story.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we will visit the Sicilian archipelago: the Aeolian islands. We dive into its beautiful landsdcape, villages of small white buildings and lush vegetation. These seven small islands are home to two active volcanos, Vulcano and Stromboli, and the reefs testify the many geological upheavals they have suffered. Enjoy the breathtaking sunrise as we leave the island of Stromboli.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 11
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: The glamorous city of Cannes hosts the luxury Yachting Festival par excellence for the 40th time this year and a new Luxury Gallery has been opened in the Palais de Festivals to celebrate this landmark anniversary. Breathe in the boat show’s opulence and learn about the latest trends in the yachting world!

programme.title: Maya Gabeira - Return to Nazaré
programme.desc: After a horrible crash in Nazaré that almost took her life, big wave surfer Maya Gabeira fights to overcome physical and mental obstacles and return to surf the giant waves again.Maya Gabeira, the Brazilian surfer that was close to death in 2013 in Nazaré due to big waves. She had to be rescued by lifeguards who struggled to get her out of waves that didn’t stop coming. After recovering physically and emotionally of the shock, she's ready to return to Nazaré to overcome the same obstacles that almost took her life years ago.Her determination is undeniable, as is the danger of tempting fate twice. However, once in Nazaré, will she have the strength needed to surf deathly waves?Follow her inspiring story in Maya Gabeira – Return to Nazaré.

programme.title: Sailing to the Games - Episode 2
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Portofino Classic
programme.desc: The SIAD Bombola D’Oro Trophy is a regatta organized by the Italian Yacht Club, and a classic event in Italy’s sailing season. Situated in the picturesque bay of Portofino, this vintage regatta is a classic spectacle that drives the attention of people across Europe.The Bombola D’Oro partly connects its success to its boat class: the Dingy 12’. Designed in 1913, this class has maintained its appeal and tradition despite the assaults from extreme technical novelties. In The Portofino Classic, we will visit the port and experience this unique regatta to get a taste of the sailing culture in Italy.

This is one of the highlights of the WSL Africa tour and features a Women’s QS 3000, Men’s QS 1000 and Junior Men and Women’s QS 1000 rated events. programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 4 - Vic Bay
programme.desc: The Vic Bay Classic takes place in the winter months so expect the biggest swells and highest quality of surfing. Watch former CT contender fight for the win as the crowd cheers their local hero. The fight for the mens series winner gets even closer at this final event. Who will claim victory and take the overall series winnings in the season finale of the City Surf Series?

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 5 - ROLEX MIDDLE SEA RACE
programme.desc: ROLEX MIDDLE SEA RACE.The Rolex Middle Sea Race takes place in October, in the heart of the Mediterranean, the final event of the European sailing season. Starting in the historic setting of Valletta’s Grand Harbour, the fleet travels through probably the most visually stunning course in the world, as it makes its way around Sicily. Along the 606 nautical mile journey, sights include, the Strait of Messina, the azure clear waters of Sicily, the Islands of Pantelleria and Lampedusa and the ultimate highlight, the active volcano of Stromboli, before returning to Malta. Tactically demanding, with famously changeable weather conditions, this is a classic test of seamanship.

The Rolex Sydney Hobart Race is a 628 nautical mile sailing adventure full of drama, spectacle and camaraderie. programme.title: Skagerrak
programme.desc: SKAGERRAK follows the preparation and mental development of the Danish professional stand up paddle athlete Casper Steinfath in his attempt to be the first person in the world to paddle from Denmark to Norway.In his journey, brotherhood and friendship come to play an essential part making a dream and project like the crossing of an entire ocean come true. SKAGERRAK will take you behind the scenes of mainstream media and portrays the Northern and secluded region of Denmark called Thy, where Casper grew up.A region, where a pioneer spirit and desire for independence prevails despite adversity and isolation. SKAGERRAK is an inspirational story that touches upon the dreams, aspirations, and desires that live inside all of us. A film about the courage to reach for the horizon.

programme.title: San Borondón
programme.desc: The popular legend claims San Borondón is an island that appears and disappears, normally under a heavy veil of fog. As adventurers departed on missions to be the first to locate it, not all returned from the depths of the ocean.Now, San Borondón is the name many local and international surfers have given to a dangerous wave spot on the Canary Islands. The film producer Rayco Cano, his team and five big wave riders embrace us in their story about these huge waves. The film features windsurfing pro Daniel Bruch, German big wave surfer Alexander Zirke, Manuel Lezcano, Ayoze Fernandea and David Rodal Santiago Vilayta.San Borondón stands for big wave surfing and adrenalin driven surfers, who risk a lot on their surfing boards and SUPs. The jet ski is a necessary safety tool. Discover hidden places with beautiful nature in the Canary Islands as this team of adventurers dive into action on the water, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 1 - Rolex China Sea Race
programme.desc: Rolex China Sea Race.First contested in 1962, the biennial Rolex China Sea race is now one of the most anticipated Asian blue-water events. Starting in Victoria Harbour, Hong Kong, and traversing the Southern China Sea to finish in Subic Bay, in the Philippines, the race measures 565 nautical miles. With huge challenges awaiting the international fleet, the race demands skill, determination, and stamina.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 3 - SA Open
programme.desc: The penultimate event of the South African Surf Series takes place at Pollock Beach. This is one of the highlights of the WSL Africa tour and features a Women’s QS 3000, Men’s QS 1000 and Junior Men and Women’s QS 1000 rated events. With a field of top international and local surfers, this event is bound to heat up as the best South African Surfers face off some formidable opponents. Fierce competition may see some position changes ahead of the final event of the series.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 2 - Giraglia Rolex Cup
programme.desc: Giraglia Rolex Cup.2018 celebrates the 66th edition of the Giraglia Rolex Cup. Created to promote friendship between France and Italy after the end of World War 2, the event starts in the historic port of St Tropez with three days of in-shore racing. Then follows the main event, a charge to Genoa, Italy, passing the iconic Giraglia Rock on the way.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 4 - Vic Bay
programme.desc: The Vic Bay Classic takes place in the winter months so expect the biggest swells and highest quality of surfing. Watch former CT contender fight for the win as the crowd cheers their local hero. The fight for the mens series winner gets even closer at this final event. Who will claim victory and take the overall series winnings in the season finale of the City Surf Series?

programme.title: Vilanculos Downwind
programme.desc: We are in Mozambique, the southern African paradise with the long Indian Ocean coastline to its side. Mozambique is not only filled with popular beaches and offshore marine parks, but also incredible windsurfing spots. On this occasion, we celebrate Vilanculos Downwind, a never before done 20 kilometer kitesurf race from the mainland of Mozambique to Bazaruto Island.Join the windsurfers that will journey in the tricky Indian Ocean and race to reach the island of Bazaruto. Departing from the city of Vilanculos, they head for a journey downwind like no other. Don’t miss this once-in-a-lifetime experience, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Skagerrak
programme.desc: SKAGERRAK follows the preparation and mental development of the Danish professional stand up paddle athlete Casper Steinfath in his attempt to be the first person in the world to paddle from Denmark to Norway.In his journey, brotherhood and friendship come to play an essential part making a dream and project like the crossing of an entire ocean come true. SKAGERRAK will take you behind the scenes of mainstream media and portrays the Northern and secluded region of Denmark called Thy, where Casper grew up.A region, where a pioneer spirit and desire for independence prevails despite adversity and isolation. SKAGERRAK is an inspirational story that touches upon the dreams, aspirations, and desires that live inside all of us. A film about the courage to reach for the horizon.

programme.title: Perilous Sea
programme.desc: Perilous Sea is a transcontinental cold-water surfing odyssey capturing the raw spirit, glorious landscapes and pure perfection that arises when conditions align. This incredible story creates moments of cold-water nirvana that rival any across the globe.Inspired by the storytelling style of classic ocean-fairing novels, Perilous Sea follows a group of surfers as they explore the landscapes and waves of the North Atlantic fringes. From the Canadian Maritimes, north to Iceland and beyond to the wave rich coast of Ireland, this award-winning film takes us on a journey to the world of surf.Follow them into the water as they dare to get into the treacherous waters that have taken the lives of many in Perilous Sea: a story of overcoming challenges and spirituality.

programme.desc: Welcome to the sunny French Riviera for the 2016 Cannes Yachting Festival, a gathering in the name of luxury and excellence. In this year's edition, more than 200 models will be shown for the first time ever in the world. Let's find out the highlights of this incredible boat show.

programme.title: Tahiti Pearl Regatta - Episode 1
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: San Borondón
programme.desc: The popular legend claims San Borondón is an island that appears and disappears, normally under a heavy veil of fog. As adventurers departed on missions to be the first to locate it, not all returned from the depths of the ocean.Now, San Borondón is the name many local and international surfers have given to a dangerous wave spot on the Canary Islands. The film producer Rayco Cano, his team and five big wave riders embrace us in their story about these huge waves. The film features windsurfing pro Daniel Bruch, German big wave surfer Alexander Zirke, Manuel Lezcano, Ayoze Fernandea and David Rodal Santiago Vilayta.San Borondón stands for big wave surfing and adrenalin driven surfers, who risk a lot on their surfing boards and SUPs. The jet ski is a necessary safety tool. Discover hidden places with beautiful nature in the Canary Islands as this team of adventurers dive into action on the water, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Monaco Yacht Show - 2014
programme.desc: Experience the most prestigious yachting event in the world! Nautical Channel will cover this luxurious event and will show you all there is the know about the most exclusive yachts of the year!

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 3 - SA Open
programme.desc: The penultimate event of the South African Surf Series takes place at Pollock Beach. This is one of the highlights of the WSL Africa tour and features a Women’s QS 3000, Men’s QS 1000 and Junior Men and Women’s QS 1000 rated events. With a field of top international and local surfers, this event is bound to heat up as the best South African Surfers face off some formidable opponents. Fierce competition may see some position changes ahead of the final event of the series.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 1 - Rolex China Sea Race
programme.desc: Rolex China Sea Race.First contested in 1962, the biennial Rolex China Sea race is now one of the most anticipated Asian blue-water events. Starting in Victoria Harbour, Hong Kong, and traversing the Southern China Sea to finish in Subic Bay, in the Philippines, the race measures 565 nautical miles. With huge challenges awaiting the international fleet, the race demands skill, determination, and stamina.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 4 - Vic Bay
programme.desc: The Vic Bay Classic takes place in the winter months so expect the biggest swells and highest quality of surfing. Watch former CT contender fight for the win as the crowd cheers their local hero. The fight for the mens series winner gets even closer at this final event. Who will claim victory and take the overall series winnings in the season finale of the City Surf Series?

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 2 - Giraglia Rolex Cup
programme.desc: Giraglia Rolex Cup.2018 celebrates the 66th edition of the Giraglia Rolex Cup. Created to promote friendship between France and Italy after the end of World War 2, the event starts in the historic port of St Tropez with three days of in-shore racing. Then follows the main event, a charge to Genoa, Italy, passing the iconic Giraglia Rock on the way.

programme.title: Skagerrak
programme.desc: SKAGERRAK follows the preparation and mental development of the Danish professional stand up paddle athlete Casper Steinfath in his attempt to be the first person in the world to paddle from Denmark to Norway.In his journey, brotherhood and friendship come to play an essential part making a dream and project like the crossing of an entire ocean come true. SKAGERRAK will take you behind the scenes of mainstream media and portrays the Northern and secluded region of Denmark called Thy, where Casper grew up.A region, where a pioneer spirit and desire for independence prevails despite adversity and isolation. SKAGERRAK is an inspirational story that touches upon the dreams, aspirations, and desires that live inside all of us. A film about the courage to reach for the horizon.

programme.title: Vilanculos Downwind
programme.desc: We are in Mozambique, the southern African paradise with the long Indian Ocean coastline to its side. Mozambique is not only filled with popular beaches and offshore marine parks, but also incredible windsurfing spots. On this occasion, we celebrate Vilanculos Downwind, a never before done 20 kilometer kitesurf race from the mainland of Mozambique to Bazaruto Island.Join the windsurfers that will journey in the tricky Indian Ocean and race to reach the island of Bazaruto. Departing from the city of Vilanculos, they head for a journey downwind like no other. Don’t miss this once-in-a-lifetime experience, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we will visit the Sicilian archipelago: the Aeolian islands. We dive into its beautiful landsdcape, villages of small white buildings and lush vegetation. These seven small islands are home to two active volcanos, Vulcano and Stromboli, and the reefs testify the many geological upheavals they have suffered. Enjoy the breathtaking sunrise as we leave the island of Stromboli.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: The glamorous city of Cannes hosts the luxury Yachting Festival par excellence for the 40th time this year and a new Luxury Gallery has been opened in the Palais de Festivals to celebrate this landmark anniversary. Breathe in the boat show’s opulence and learn about the latest trends in the yachting world!

programme.title: Perilous Sea
programme.desc: Perilous Sea is a transcontinental cold-water surfing odyssey capturing the raw spirit, glorious landscapes and pure perfection that arises when conditions align. This incredible story creates moments of cold-water nirvana that rival any across the globe.Inspired by the storytelling style of classic ocean-fairing novels, Perilous Sea follows a group of surfers as they explore the landscapes and waves of the North Atlantic fringes. From the Canadian Maritimes, north to Iceland and beyond to the wave rich coast of Ireland, this award-winning film takes us on a journey to the world of surf.Follow them into the water as they dare to get into the treacherous waters that have taken the lives of many in Perilous Sea: a story of overcoming challenges and spirituality.

SKAGERRAK is an inspirational story that touches upon the dreams, aspirations, and desires that live inside all of us. A film about the courage to reach for the horizon.

programme.title: Magnifique Martinique
programme.desc: Martinique is truly magnificent!The Caribbean Island is a paradise for both locals and visitors that year after year come to discover the mysteries of this island. Come discover the beauty of life in the Caribbean in this show.Nautical Channel’s host, Andrew Miller, will show you exciting new places and delicious local cuisine prepared by a great chef. programme.title: Magnifique Martinique
programme.desc: Martinique is truly magnificent!The Caribbean Island is a paradise for both locals and visitors that year after year come to discover the mysteries of this island. Come discover the beauty of life in the Caribbean in this show.Nautical Channel’s host, Andrew Miller, will show you exciting new places and delicious local cuisine prepared by a great chef. Famous Caribbean Rum for breakfast and an intense session of fly boarding will guarantee madness fun in this exhilarating adventure in Magnifique Martinique.Follow Andrew on a unique discovery in this French holiday destination, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: San Borondón
programme.desc: The popular legend claims San Borondón is an island that appears and disappears, normally under a heavy veil of fog. As adventurers departed on missions to be the first to locate it, not all returned from the depths of the ocean.Now, San Borondón is the name many local and international surfers have given to a dangerous wave spot on the Canary Islands. The film producer Rayco Cano, his team and five big wave riders embrace us in their story about these huge waves. The film features windsurfing pro Daniel Bruch, German big wave surfer Alexander Zirke, Manuel Lezcano, Ayoze Fernandea and David Rodal Santiago Vilayta.San Borondón stands for big wave surfing and adrenalin driven surfers, who risk a lot on their surfing boards and SUPs. The jet ski is a necessary safety tool. Discover hidden places with beautiful nature in the Canary Islands as this team of adventurers dive into action on the water, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Julbo Sail Session
programme.desc: The mythical, legendary Cape Horn towers high in the imagination of all sailors. Located in the southern part of the Patagonia, sailors will travel from Usuaïa to Cap Horn. Passing it is always a feat so you can imagine the adventure two men set out for themselves when they dreamed of being the ﬁrst to pass it in a Nacra.Aboard a flying catamaran, the Julbo Session is a unique event that requires constant attention. The situation at the Julbo Sail season is tense and things become serious as the sailors have to push forward whatever happens, as the weather window is very brief and they have little time to succeed in their adventure.Embark on this journey across la Tierra del Fuego, a mystical place with extraordinary landscapes and incredible shifts in weather that allowed sailors in the Nacra to achieve a lifetime dream: pass Cape Horn aboard a flying catamaran.

programme.title: The South To Sian Journals
programme.desc: While filming South To Sian, a pair of adventurers dived into what began as a three-month trip and turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration.On boards, bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, Harrison Roach and Zye Norris discovered if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.South to Sian Journals is a collection of stories documenting the people, places & adventures that occurred during the 2 years making “South To Sian” - the challenges, the surfers, riders, shapers, bike builders, filmmakers and photographers.Extremely entertaining and insightful, “Journals” documents the travels, the hardships, the spectacular locations, the personalities and the thoughts of the characters, both in front of and behind the lens.

programme.title: VOR Supremacy
programme.desc: The Volvo Ocean Race sails around 10 cities from all over the world, making it the ultimate test for sailors. Often described as the longest and toughest professional sporting event in the world, it is one of the sport’s big three events, alongside the Olympic Games and America’s Cup.The cannon blast in Alicante sends off the fleet, and once again shakes the sailing world. The veterans finally get their memory back while for the rookies it feels like mission impossible. They share the same obsession for the sea, and many of them have fully dedicated themselves for years, even decades trying to win it.The 2017-18 edition of the Volvo Ocean Race sets sail around the globe. The challenge is full on, and now they are all going rogue.

programme.title: Julbo Sail Session
programme.desc: The mythical, legendary Cape Horn towers high in the imagination of all sailors. Located in the southern part of the Patagonia, sailors will travel from Usuaïa to Cap Horn. Passing it is always a feat so you can imagine the adventure two men set out for themselves when they dreamed of being the ﬁrst to pass it in a Nacra.Aboard a flying catamaran, the Julbo Session is a unique event that requires constant attention. The situation at the Julbo Sail season is tense and things become serious as the sailors have to push forward whatever happens, as the weather window is very brief and they have little time to succeed in their adventure.Embark on this journey across la Tierra del Fuego, a mystical place with extraordinary landscapes and incredible shifts in weather that allowed sailors in the Nacra to achieve a lifetime dream: pass Cape Horn aboard a flying catamaran.

programme.title: Skagerrak
programme.desc: SKAGERRAK follows the preparation and mental development of the Danish professional stand up paddle athlete Casper Steinfath in his attempt to be the first person in the world to paddle from Denmark to Norway.In his journey, brotherhood and friendship come to play an essential part making a dream and project like the crossing of an entire ocean come true. SKAGERRAK will take you behind the scenes of mainstream media and portrays the Northern and secluded region of Denmark called Thy, where Casper grew up.A region, where a pioneer spirit and desire for independence prevails despite adversity and isolation. SKAGERRAK is an inspirational story that touches upon the dreams, aspirations, and desires that live inside all of us. A film about the courage to reach for the horizon.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 1 - Rolex China Sea Race
programme.desc: Rolex China Sea Race.First contested in 1962, the biennial Rolex China Sea race is now one of the most anticipated Asian blue-water events. Starting in Victoria Harbour, Hong Kong, and traversing the Southern China Sea to finish in Subic Bay, in the Philippines, the race measures 565 nautical miles. With huge challenges awaiting the international fleet, the race demands skill, determination, and stamina.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 2 - Giraglia Rolex Cup
programme.desc: Giraglia Rolex Cup.2018 celebrates the 66th edition of the Giraglia Rolex Cup. Created to promote friendship between France and Italy after the end of World War 2, the event starts in the historic port of St Tropez with three days of in-shore racing. Then follows the main event, a charge to Genoa, Italy, passing the iconic Giraglia Rock on the way.

programme.title: Tour De France à La Voile - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome back to Dunkirk for the 40th edition of the Tour de France à la Voile! Some of the top sailors in the world have come to northern France for the start of this unique event that brings together specialists from all disciplines. This is the perfect blend of professionals, youngsters and amateurs.

programme.title: San Borondón
programme.desc: The popular legend claims San Borondón is an island that appears and disappears, normally under a heavy veil of fog. programme.title: Undercurrents
programme.desc: Undercurrents explores connection and compassion through the eyes of two female surfers as they share their motivation time after time to go back to the water despite cold waves, fears and little reward. Bringing in ideas from the Blue Mind movement and science of mindfulness, get ready to flow with the blue ocean as we explore the relationship with the sea to find out what happens when we pursue what we love.Arlene Maltman is one of first British & European female surfing champions. Natalie Fox is a Yogi, Surf instructor and marine activist. Throughout the film, they share their experiences and relationship with the sea.Neuroscientist & Mindfulness innovator Dr Tamara Russell & Blue Health Coach / Blue Mind Advocate, Lizzi Larbalestier provide expertise on how our minds and bodies are connected to the ocean and how this can have a benefit to our health and wellbeing.Awards:New Talent Award – Adventure Uncovered Film Festival 2020. Best Adventure Film – Shexreme Film Festival 2019.

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 8: Senj, Cres, Losinj
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: EcoFin Documentary
programme.desc: “We’re just two surfers that decided we could no longer ignore plastic pollution in our oceans.” –Luise Grossmann.Two young innovators created the first sustainable surfboard fin based on ocean-recycled plastics. The founders of FiveOceans give ocean rubbish a new life, using plastic collected from the Indian Ocean, proving it is possible to close the cycle with ocean waste and high quality surf gear.In this stunning documentary, they prove their mission and reveal a transparent value chain of the waste material to design a performance product for surfers. With their background in engineering, the unrivalled story is underlined by surfing, adventure and great personalities as the two friends battle their way to achieve a much higher goal: reducing the plastic that ends up in the oceans they surf.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 14
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Meet me in Madeira
programme.desc: Welcome to Madeira!The main island of the volcanic Portuguese archipelago is home to a wide sea life and rich ecosystem. With its subtropical climate, Madeira is a chosen destination for nautical sports enthusiasts that enjoy the paradisiac conditions of the island.From diving to surfing, sailing to coasteering, Madeira offers a wide variety of nautical activities for the avid sportsmen or just the visiting tourist. Join Andi van Zyl on an experience that only this Portuguese archipelago has to offer, from stand-up paddling to wine tasting.Discover the secrets of Madeira and get to know the heart-warming locals of the beautiful archipelago in an exclusive show on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Kayaking Kerala - Episode 1 - Part One
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 1 - Rolex China Sea Race
programme.desc: Rolex China Sea Race.First contested in 1962, the biennial Rolex China Sea race is now one of the most anticipated Asian blue-water events. Starting in Victoria Harbour, Hong Kong, and traversing the Southern China Sea to finish in Subic Bay, in the Philippines, the race measures 565 nautical miles. With huge challenges awaiting the international fleet, the race demands skill, determination, and stamina.

programme.title: Kayaking Kerala - Episode 2 - Part Two
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 2 - Giraglia Rolex Cup
programme.desc: Giraglia Rolex Cup.2018 celebrates the 66th edition of the Giraglia Rolex Cup. Created to promote friendship between France and Italy after the end of World War 2, the event starts in the historic port of St Tropez with three days of in-shore racing. Then follows the main event, a charge to Genoa, Italy, passing the iconic Giraglia Rock on the way.

programme.title: Tour De France à La Voile - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome back to Dunkirk for the 40th edition of the Tour de France à la Voile! Some of the top sailors in the world have come to northern France for the start of this unique event that brings together specialists from all disciplines. This is the perfect blend of professionals, youngsters and amateurs.

programme.title: Sailing to the Games - Episode 2
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Undercurrents
programme.desc: Undercurrents explores connection and compassion through the eyes of two female surfers as they share their motivation time after time to go back to the water despite cold waves, fears and little reward. Bringing in ideas from the Blue Mind movement and science of mindfulness, get ready to flow with the blue ocean as we explore the relationship with the sea to find out what happens when we pursue what we love.Arlene Maltman is one of first British & European female surfing champions. Natalie Fox is a Yogi, Surf instructor and marine activist. Throughout the film, they share their experiences and relationship with the sea.Neuroscientist & Mindfulness innovator Dr Tamara Russell & Blue Health Coach / Blue Mind Advocate, Lizzi Larbalestier provide expertise on how our minds and bodies are connected to the ocean and how this can have a benefit to our health and wellbeing.Awards:New Talent Award – Adventure Uncovered Film Festival 2020. Best Adventure Film – Shexreme Film Festival 2019.

programme.title: Torrevieja Euromarina Optimist International Trophy - XV Trofeo Euromarina Optimist Torrevieja
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: EcoFin Documentary
programme.desc: “We’re just two surfers that decided we could no longer ignore plastic pollution in our oceans.” –Luise Grossmann.Two young innovators created the first sustainable surfboard fin based on ocean-recycled plastics. The founders of FiveOceans give ocean rubbish a new life, using plastic collected from the Indian Ocean, proving it is possible to close the cycle with ocean waste and high quality surf gear.In this stunning documentary, they prove their mission and reveal a transparent value chain of the waste material to design a performance product for surfers. With their background in engineering, the unrivalled story is underlined by surfing, adventure and great personalities as the two friends battle their way to achieve a much higher goal: reducing the plastic that ends up in the oceans they surf.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the sunny French Riviera for the 2016 Cannes Yachting Festival, a gathering in the name of luxury and excellence. In this year's edition, more than 200 models will be shown for the first time ever in the world. Let's find out the highlights of this incredible boat show.

programme.title: Meet me in Madeira
programme.desc: Welcome to Madeira!The main island of the volcanic Portuguese archipelago is home to a wide sea life and rich ecosystem. With its subtropical climate, Madeira is a chosen destination for nautical sports enthusiasts that enjoy the paradisiac conditions of the island.From diving to surfing, sailing to coasteering, Madeira offers a wide variety of nautical activities for the avid sportsmen or just the visiting tourist. Join Andi van Zyl on an experience that only this Portuguese archipelago has to offer, from stand-up paddling to wine tasting.Discover the secrets of Madeira and get to know the heart-warming locals of the beautiful archipelago in an exclusive show on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the sunny French Riviera for the 2016 Cannes Yachting Festival, a gathering in the name of luxury and excellence. In this year's edition, more than 200 models will be shown for the first time ever in the world. Let's find out the highlights of this incredible boat show.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 1 - Rolex China Sea Race
programme.desc: Rolex China Sea Race.First contested in 1962, the biennial Rolex China Sea race is now one of the most anticipated Asian blue-water events. Starting in Victoria Harbour, Hong Kong, and traversing the Southern China Sea to finish in Subic Bay, in the Philippines, the race measures 565 nautical miles. With huge challenges awaiting the international fleet, the race demands skill, determination, and stamina.

programme.title: San Borondón
programme.desc: The popular legend claims San Borondón is an island that appears and disappears, normally under a heavy veil of fog. As adventurers departed on missions to be the first to locate it, not all returned from the depths of the ocean.Now, San Borondón is the name many local and international surfers have given to a dangerous wave spot on the Canary Islands. The film producer Rayco Cano, his team and five big wave riders embrace us in their story about these huge waves. The film features windsurfing pro Daniel Bruch, German big wave surfer Alexander Zirke, Manuel Lezcano, Ayoze Fernandea and David Rodal Santiago Vilayta.San Borondón stands for big wave surfing and adrenalin driven surfers, who risk a lot on their surfing boards and SUPs. The jet ski is a necessary safety tool. Discover hidden places with beautiful nature in the Canary Islands as this team of adventurers dive into action on the water, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 2 - Giraglia Rolex Cup
programme.desc: Giraglia Rolex Cup.2018 celebrates the 66th edition of the Giraglia Rolex Cup. Created to promote friendship between France and Italy after the end of World War 2, the event starts in the historic port of St Tropez with three days of in-shore racing. Then follows the main event, a charge to Genoa, Italy, passing the iconic Giraglia Rock on the way.

programme.title: The South To Sian Journals
programme.desc: While filming South To Sian, a pair of adventurers dived into what began as a three-month trip and turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration.On boards, bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, Harrison Roach and Zye Norris discovered if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.South to Sian Journals is a collection of stories documenting the people, places & adventures that occurred during the 2 years making “South To Sian” - the challenges, the surfers, riders, shapers, bike builders, filmmakers and photographers.Extremely entertaining and insightful, “Journals” documents the travels, the hardships, the spectacular locations, the personalities and the thoughts of the characters, both in front of and behind the lens.

Bringing in ideas from the Blue Mind movement and science of mindfulness, get ready to flow with the blue ocean as we explore the relationship with the sea to find out what happens when we pursue what we love.Arlene Maltman is one of first British & European female surfing champions. Natalie Fox is a Yogi, Surf instructor and marine activist. Throughout the film, they share their experiences and relationship with the sea.Neuroscientist & Mindfulness innovator Dr Tamara Russell & Blue Health Coach / Blue Mind Advocate, Lizzi Larbalestier provide expertise on how our minds and bodies are connected to the ocean and how this can have a benefit to our health and wellbeing.Awards:New Talent Award – Adventure Uncovered Film Festival 2020. programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we will visit the Sicilian archipelago: the Aeolian islands. We dive into its beautiful landsdcape, villages of small white buildings and lush vegetation. These seven small islands are home to two active volcanos, Vulcano and Stromboli, and the reefs testify the many geological upheavals they have suffered. Enjoy the breathtaking sunrise as we leave the island of Stromboli.
