programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1977, the Cannes Yachting Festival takes place every September in elegant, luxurious surroundings in the sparkling bay of Cannes. We are ready for the 2018 edition that promises the latest trends in the nautical industry. Jump on board the 2018 Cannes Yachting Festival to discover superyachts, equipment, regattas, competitions and more.

programme.title: Kayaking Kerala - Episode 2 - Part Two
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Irish Gathering
programme.desc: The Nautical Channel team travels to Ireland to meet up with the Gathering Cruise at Kinsale. We will be discovering the sailing and culture of the West Coast as we meet up the gathering cruise, visit a classic boat regatta and sample some delicious Irish gourmet meals. However, the trip will take a turn as rough seas and strong wind turn their leisure cruise into a rescue operation. Will our crew be okay in the Irish cold waters? Let's find out in The Irish Gathering!

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 1 - Rolex China Sea Race
programme.desc: Rolex China Sea Race.First contested in 1962, the biennial Rolex China Sea race is now one of the most anticipated Asian blue-water events. Starting in Victoria Harbour, Hong Kong, and traversing the Southern China Sea to finish in Subic Bay, in the Philippines, the race measures 565 nautical miles. With huge challenges awaiting the international fleet, the race demands skill, determination, and stamina.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 1
programme.desc: In this episode we will visit the old town and the palace of the grand master, before we refresh ourselves in the Kallithea Springs, and discover why Rhodes is considered as the sailing Mecca of the Dodecanese. We’ll take a trip to the beautiful Stegna beach to dive in the immaculate crystal blue waters, before venturing out on a SUP, a stand-up paddle board, to experience the unique and ever-growing practice of SUP Yoga. Finally, we’ll visit Panagia Tsambika, a hilltop monastery considered by some to be miracle-working.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 2 - Giraglia Rolex Cup
programme.desc: Giraglia Rolex Cup.2018 celebrates the 66th edition of the Giraglia Rolex Cup. Created to promote friendship between France and Italy after the end of World War 2, the event starts in the historic port of St Tropez with three days of in-shore racing. Then follows the main event, a charge to Genoa, Italy, passing the iconic Giraglia Rock on the way.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 2
programme.desc: In this second episode, we will visit the historic and picturesque Mandraki Harbour before exploring the natural attractions of Butterfly Valley and Seven Springs. Rhodes is often known as the paradise island for windsurfers, so we will not miss the chance to see how it feels to be on a board out on the open water. Finally, we will visit the must-see archaeological sites that aren’t to be missed before leaving the island, the town and the Acropolis of Lindos.

programme.title: Discovering Watersports On Terceira
programme.desc: Terceira, on the Azores Islands, is a nautical sporting paradise for many. From pro surfers to passionate sailors, we dive into the lives of local athletes that are fortunate to call this island home.Discovering Watersports On Terceira joins athletes from different categories on their nautical challenges on their way to excellence. However, it also centers on the human aspect, checking on secret spots used by these water enthusiasts as well as lifestyle in the Azores Islands.Join us in their adventure, here on Nautical Channel.

We will be discovering the sailing and culture of the West Coast as we meet up the gathering cruise, visit a classic boat regatta and sample some delicious Irish gourmet meals. However, the trip will take a turn as rough seas and strong wind turn their leisure cruise into a rescue operation. Will our crew be okay in the Irish cold waters? Let's find out in The Irish Gathering!

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 3
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 1
programme.desc: In this episode we will visit the old town and the palace of the grand master, before we refresh ourselves in the Kallithea Springs, and discover why Rhodes is considered as the sailing Mecca of the Dodecanese. We’ll take a trip to the beautiful Stegna beach to dive in the immaculate crystal blue waters, before venturing out on a SUP, a stand-up paddle board, to experience the unique and ever-growing practice of SUP Yoga. Finally, we’ll visit Panagia Tsambika, a hilltop monastery considered by some to be miracle-working.

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 4
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 2
programme.desc: In this second episode, we will visit the historic and picturesque Mandraki Harbour before exploring the natural attractions of Butterfly Valley and Seven Springs. Rhodes is often known as the paradise island for windsurfers, so we will not miss the chance to see how it feels to be on a board out on the open water. Finally, we will visit the must-see archaeological sites that aren’t to be missed before leaving the island, the town and the Acropolis of Lindos.

programme.title: Undercurrents
programme.desc: Undercurrents explores connection and compassion through the eyes of two female surfers as they share their motivation time after time to go back to the water despite cold waves, fears and little reward. Bringing in ideas from the Blue Mind movement and science of mindfulness, get ready to flow with the blue ocean as we explore the relationship with the sea to find out what happens when we pursue what we love.Arlene Maltman is one of first British & European female surfing champions. Natalie Fox is a Yogi, Surf instructor and marine activist. Throughout the film, they share their experiences and relationship with the sea.Neuroscientist & Mindfulness innovator Dr Tamara Russell & Blue Health Coach / Blue Mind Advocate, Lizzi Larbalestier provide expertise on how our minds and bodies are connected to the ocean and how this can have a benefit to our health and wellbeing.Awards:New Talent Award – Adventure Uncovered Film Festival 2020. Best Adventure Film – Shexreme Film Festival 2019.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we will visit the Sicilian archipelago: the Aeolian islands. We dive into its beautiful landsdcape, villages of small white buildings and lush vegetation. These seven small islands are home to two active volcanos, Vulcano and Stromboli, and the reefs testify the many geological upheavals they have suffered. Enjoy the breathtaking sunrise as we leave the island of Stromboli.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 2 - Giraglia Rolex Cup
programme.desc: Giraglia Rolex Cup.2018 celebrates the 66th edition of the Giraglia Rolex Cup. Created to promote friendship between France and Italy after the end of World War 2, the event starts in the historic port of St Tropez with three days of in-shore racing. Then follows the main event, a charge to Genoa, Italy, passing the iconic Giraglia Rock on the way.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: The glamorous city of Cannes hosts the luxury Yachting Festival par excellence for the 40th time this year and a new Luxury Gallery has been opened in the Palais de Festivals to celebrate this landmark anniversary. programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1977, the Cannes Yachting Festival takes place every September in elegant, luxurious surroundings in the sparkling bay of Cannes. We are ready for the 2018 edition that promises the latest trends in the nautical industry. Jump on board the 2018 Cannes Yachting Festival to discover superyachts, equipment, regattas, competitions and more.

programme.title: The South To Sian Journals
programme.desc: While filming South To Sian, a pair of adventurers dived into what began as a three-month trip and turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration.On boards, bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, Harrison Roach and Zye Norris discovered if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.South to Sian Journals is a collection of stories documenting the people, places & adventures that occurred during the 2 years making “South To Sian” - the challenges, the surfers, riders, shapers, bike builders, filmmakers and photographers.Extremely entertaining and insightful, “Journals” documents the travels, the hardships, the spectacular locations, the personalities and the thoughts of the characters, both in front of and behind the lens.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 3
programme.desc: We have left the island of Stromboli and headed towards the Strait of Messina, the famous stretch that separates Calabria from Sicily. This strait is also famous for the strange games that locals play, sparked by the imagination of ancient sea creatures like Scylla and Charybdis, the monsters that Ullyses had to fight to get back home. Sea monsters, beautiful landscapes and original dishes await us in this episode on board the Ghibellina.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 1 - Rolex China Sea Race
programme.desc: Rolex China Sea Race.First contested in 1962, the biennial Rolex China Sea race is now one of the most anticipated Asian blue-water events. Starting in Victoria Harbour, Hong Kong, and traversing the Southern China Sea to finish in Subic Bay, in the Philippines, the race measures 565 nautical miles. With huge challenges awaiting the international fleet, the race demands skill, determination, and stamina.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 2 - Giraglia Rolex Cup
programme.desc: Giraglia Rolex Cup.2018 celebrates the 66th edition of the Giraglia Rolex Cup. Created to promote friendship between France and Italy after the end of World War 2, the event starts in the historic port of St Tropez with three days of in-shore racing. Then follows the main event, a charge to Genoa, Italy, passing the iconic Giraglia Rock on the way.

programme.title: Rios Patagonicos
programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 11
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 7 - Kornati – Dugi Otok
programme.desc: Kornati Islands are a National park and one of the most amazing creation of nature (or God) and sailing here is a real rest for heart and soul. Dugi Otok with its natural beauty, interesting places and amazing gastronomy is a real paradise for sailors.

programme.title: Inside Sailing - Episode 6
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 8 - Ugljan – Ist – Silba
programme.desc: The island of Ugljan, right across the town of Zadar, is known for its olives and olive produce. Beautiful sandy beaches and crystal clear sea will take your breath away. Smaller island of the Zadar archipelago like Ist and Silba looks like frozen in time and are really great for escaping from civilization.

programme.title: What Sup - Episode 5
programme.desc: On this week's episode we have comedian and viral video sensation, Megan Mackay. She is best known for her comedic YouTube makeup tutorial videos, and her videos have been seen by more than 4.5 million people worldwide. Will she have the skills to jump on our paddleboard and take on our challenges?

programme.title: Rios Patagonicos
programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

programme.title: What Sup - Episode 6
programme.desc: Welcome to What SUP! On this week's episode we have the proclaimed Canadian singer-songwriter Royal Wood. This band has been nominated for their Juno song as songwriter of the year by iTunes in 2008, and his music has been featured in shows slike Greys Anatomy or Private Practice. But, singing won't save them from our paddleboard challenges, is he ready?

programme.title: Inside Sailing - Episode 6
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 7 - Kornati – Dugi Otok
programme.desc: Kornati Islands are a National park and one of the most amazing creation of nature (or God) and sailing here is a real rest for heart and soul. Dugi Otok with its natural beauty, interesting places and amazing gastronomy is a real paradise for sailors.

programme.title: Discovering Watersports On Terceira
programme.desc: Terceira, on the Azores Islands, is a nautical sporting paradise for many. From pro surfers to passionate sailors, we dive into the lives of local athletes that are fortunate to call this island home.Discovering Watersports On Terceira joins athletes from different categories on their nautical challenges on their way to excellence. However, it also centers on the human aspect, checking on secret spots used by these water enthusiasts as well as lifestyle in the Azores Islands.Join us in their adventure, here on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 8 - Ugljan – Ist – Silba
programme.desc: The island of Ugljan, right across the town of Zadar, is known for its olives and olive produce. Beautiful sandy beaches and crystal clear sea will take your breath away. Smaller island of the Zadar archipelago like Ist and Silba looks like frozen in time and are really great for escaping from civilization.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 11
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 9: Rijeka, Opatija, Lika
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The South To Sian Journals
programme.desc: While filming South To Sian, a pair of adventurers dived into what began as a three-month trip and turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration.On boards, bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, Harrison Roach and Zye Norris discovered if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.South to Sian Journals is a collection of stories documenting the people, places & adventures that occurred during the 2 years making “South To Sian” - the challenges, the surfers, riders, shapers, bike builders, filmmakers and photographers.Extremely entertaining and insightful, “Journals” documents the travels, the hardships, the spectacular locations, the personalities and the thoughts of the characters, both in front of and behind the lens.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 15
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Undercurrents
programme.desc: Undercurrents explores connection and compassion through the eyes of two female surfers as they share their motivation time after time to go back to the water despite cold waves, fears and little reward. Bringing in ideas from the Blue Mind movement and science of mindfulness, get ready to flow with the blue ocean as we explore the relationship with the sea to find out what happens when we pursue what we love.Arlene Maltman is one of first British & European female surfing champions. Natalie Fox is a Yogi, Surf instructor and marine activist. Throughout the film, they share their experiences and relationship with the sea.Neuroscientist & Mindfulness innovator Dr Tamara Russell & Blue Health Coach / Blue Mind Advocate, Lizzi Larbalestier provide expertise on how our minds and bodies are connected to the ocean and how this can have a benefit to our health and wellbeing.Awards:New Talent Award – Adventure Uncovered Film Festival 2020. Best Adventure Film – Shexreme Film Festival 2019.

programme.title: What Sup - Episode 5
programme.desc: On this week's episode we have comedian and viral video sensation, Megan Mackay. She is best known for her comedic YouTube makeup tutorial videos, and her videos have been seen by more than 4.5 million people worldwide. Will she have the skills to jump on our paddleboard and take on our challenges?

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 1 - Rolex China Sea Race
programme.desc: Rolex China Sea Race.First contested in 1962, the biennial Rolex China Sea race is now one of the most anticipated Asian blue-water events. Starting in Victoria Harbour, Hong Kong, and traversing the Southern China Sea to finish in Subic Bay, in the Philippines, the race measures 565 nautical miles. With huge challenges awaiting the international fleet, the race demands skill, determination, and stamina.

programme.title: What Sup - Episode 6
programme.desc: Welcome to What SUP! On this week's episode we have the proclaimed Canadian singer-songwriter Royal Wood. This band has been nominated for their Juno song as songwriter of the year by iTunes in 2008, and his music has been featured in shows slike Greys Anatomy or Private Practice. But, singing won't save them from our paddleboard challenges, is he ready?

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 2 - Giraglia Rolex Cup
programme.desc: Giraglia Rolex Cup.2018 celebrates the 66th edition of the Giraglia Rolex Cup. Created to promote friendship between France and Italy after the end of World War 2, the event starts in the historic port of St Tropez with three days of in-shore racing. Then follows the main event, a charge to Genoa, Italy, passing the iconic Giraglia Rock on the way.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1977, the Cannes Yachting Festival takes place every September in elegant, luxurious surroundings in the sparkling bay of Cannes. We are ready for the 2018 edition that promises the latest trends in the nautical industry. Jump on board the 2018 Cannes Yachting Festival to discover superyachts, equipment, regattas, competitions and more.

programme.title: The Irish Gathering
programme.desc: The Nautical Channel team travels to Ireland to meet up with the Gathering Cruise at Kinsale. We will be discovering the sailing and culture of the West Coast as we meet up the gathering cruise, visit a classic boat regatta and sample some delicious Irish gourmet meals. However, the trip will take a turn as rough seas and strong wind turn their leisure cruise into a rescue operation. Will our crew be okay in the Irish cold waters? Let's find out in The Irish Gathering!

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 3
programme.desc: We have left the island of Stromboli and headed towards the Strait of Messina, the famous stretch that separates Calabria from Sicily. This strait is also famous for the strange games that locals play, sparked by the imagination of ancient sea creatures like Scylla and Charybdis, the monsters that Ullyses had to fight to get back home. Sea monsters, beautiful landscapes and original dishes await us in this episode on board the Ghibellina.

programme.desc: While filming South To Sian, a pair of adventurers dived into what began as a three-month trip and turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration.On boards, bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, Harrison Roach and Zye Norris discovered if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.South to Sian Journals is a collection of stories documenting the people, places & adventures that occurred during the 2 years making “South To Sian” - the challenges, the surfers, riders, shapers, bike builders, filmmakers and photographers.Extremely entertaining and insightful, “Journals” documents the travels, the hardships, the spectacular locations, the personalities and the thoughts of the characters, both in front of and behind the lens.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 1 - Rolex China Sea Race
programme.desc: Rolex China Sea Race.First contested in 1962, the biennial Rolex China Sea race is now one of the most anticipated Asian blue-water events. Starting in Victoria Harbour, Hong Kong, and traversing the Southern China Sea to finish in Subic Bay, in the Philippines, the race measures 565 nautical miles. With huge challenges awaiting the international fleet, the race demands skill, determination, and stamina.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 3
programme.desc: We have left the island of Stromboli and headed towards the Strait of Messina, the famous stretch that separates Calabria from Sicily. This strait is also famous for the strange games that locals play, sparked by the imagination of ancient sea creatures like Scylla and Charybdis, the monsters that Ullyses had to fight to get back home. Sea monsters, beautiful landscapes and original dishes await us in this episode on board the Ghibellina.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 2 - Giraglia Rolex Cup
programme.desc: Giraglia Rolex Cup.2018 celebrates the 66th edition of the Giraglia Rolex Cup. Created to promote friendship between France and Italy after the end of World War 2, the event starts in the historic port of St Tropez with three days of in-shore racing. Then follows the main event, a charge to Genoa, Italy, passing the iconic Giraglia Rock on the way.

programme.title: Rios Patagonicos
programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

Sea monsters, beautiful landscapes and original dishes await us in this episode on board the Ghibellina.

programme.title: Undercurrents
programme.desc: Undercurrents explores connection and compassion through the eyes of two female surfers as they share their motivation time after time to go back to the water despite cold waves, fears and little reward. Bringing in ideas from the Blue Mind movement and science of mindfulness, get ready to flow with the blue ocean as we explore the relationship with the sea to find out what happens when we pursue what we love.Arlene Maltman is one of first British & European female surfing champions. Natalie Fox is a Yogi, Surf instructor and marine activist. Throughout the film, they share their experiences and relationship with the sea.Neuroscientist & Mindfulness innovator Dr Tamara Russell & Blue Health Coach / Blue Mind Advocate, Lizzi Larbalestier provide expertise on how our minds and bodies are connected to the ocean and how this can have a benefit to our health and wellbeing.Awards:New Talent Award – Adventure Uncovered Film Festival 2020. Best Adventure Film – Shexreme Film Festival 2019.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1977, the Cannes Yachting Festival takes place every September in elegant, luxurious surroundings in the sparkling bay of Cannes. We are ready for the 2018 edition that promises the latest trends in the nautical industry. Jump on board the 2018 Cannes Yachting Festival to discover superyachts, equipment, regattas, competitions and more.

programme.title: Discovering Watersports On Terceira
programme.desc: Terceira, on the Azores Islands, is a nautical sporting paradise for many. From pro surfers to passionate sailors, we dive into the lives of local athletes that are fortunate to call this island home.Discovering Watersports On Terceira joins athletes from different categories on their nautical challenges on their way to excellence. programme.title: The Irish Gathering
programme.desc: The Nautical Channel team travels to Ireland to meet up with the Gathering Cruise at Kinsale. We will be discovering the sailing and culture of the West Coast as we meet up the gathering cruise, visit a classic boat regatta and sample some delicious Irish gourmet meals. However, the trip will take a turn as rough seas and strong wind turn their leisure cruise into a rescue operation. Will our crew be okay in the Irish cold waters? Let's find out in The Irish Gathering!

Natalie Fox is a Yogi, Surf instructor and marine activist. Throughout the film, they share their experiences and relationship with the sea.Neuroscientist & Mindfulness innovator Dr Tamara Russell & Blue Health Coach / Blue Mind Advocate, Lizzi Larbalestier provide expertise on how our minds and bodies are connected to the ocean and how this can have a benefit to our health and wellbeing.Awards:New Talent Award – Adventure Uncovered Film Festival 2020. Best Adventure Film – Shexreme Film Festival 2019.

programme.title: Discovering Watersports On Terceira
programme.desc: Terceira, on the Azores Islands, is a nautical sporting paradise for many. From pro surfers to passionate sailors, we dive into the lives of local athletes that are fortunate to call this island home.Discovering Watersports On Terceira joins athletes from different categories on their nautical challenges on their way to excellence. However, it also centers on the human aspect, checking on secret spots used by these water enthusiasts as well as lifestyle in the Azores Islands.Join us in their adventure, here on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 3
programme.desc: We have left the island of Stromboli and headed towards the Strait of Messina, the famous stretch that separates Calabria from Sicily. This strait is also famous for the strange games that locals play, sparked by the imagination of ancient sea creatures like Scylla and Charybdis, the monsters that Ullyses had to fight to get back home. Sea monsters, beautiful landscapes and original dishes await us in this episode on board the Ghibellina.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1977, the Cannes Yachting Festival takes place every September in elegant, luxurious surroundings in the sparkling bay of Cannes. We are ready for the 2018 edition that promises the latest trends in the nautical industry. Jump on board the 2018 Cannes Yachting Festival to discover superyachts, equipment, regattas, competitions and more.

programme.title: Rios Patagonicos
programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

programme.title: The Irish Gathering
programme.desc: The Nautical Channel team travels to Ireland to meet up with the Gathering Cruise at Kinsale. We will be discovering the sailing and culture of the West Coast as we meet up the gathering cruise, visit a classic boat regatta and sample some delicious Irish gourmet meals. However, the trip will take a turn as rough seas and strong wind turn their leisure cruise into a rescue operation. Will our crew be okay in the Irish cold waters? Let's find out in The Irish Gathering!

programme.title: The South To Sian Journals
programme.desc: While filming South To Sian, a pair of adventurers dived into what began as a three-month trip and turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration.On boards, bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, Harrison Roach and Zye Norris discovered if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.South to Sian Journals is a collection of stories documenting the people, places & adventures that occurred during the 2 years making “South To Sian” - the challenges, the surfers, riders, shapers, bike builders, filmmakers and photographers.Extremely entertaining and insightful, “Journals” documents the travels, the hardships, the spectacular locations, the personalities and the thoughts of the characters, both in front of and behind the lens.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 3
programme.desc: We have left the island of Stromboli and headed towards the Strait of Messina, the famous stretch that separates Calabria from Sicily. This strait is also famous for the strange games that locals play, sparked by the imagination of ancient sea creatures like Scylla and Charybdis, the monsters that Ullyses had to fight to get back home. Sea monsters, beautiful landscapes and original dishes await us in this episode on board the Ghibellina.

programme.title: Discovering Watersports On Terceira
programme.desc: Terceira, on the Azores Islands, is a nautical sporting paradise for many. From pro surfers to passionate sailors, we dive into the lives of local athletes that are fortunate to call this island home.Discovering Watersports On Terceira joins athletes from different categories on their nautical challenges on their way to excellence. However, it also centers on the human aspect, checking on secret spots used by these water enthusiasts as well as lifestyle in the Azores Islands.Join us in their adventure, here on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 3
programme.desc: We have left the island of Stromboli and headed towards the Strait of Messina, the famous stretch that separates Calabria from Sicily. This strait is also famous for the strange games that locals play, sparked by the imagination of ancient sea creatures like Scylla and Charybdis, the monsters that Ullyses had to fight to get back home. Sea monsters, beautiful landscapes and original dishes await us in this episode on board the Ghibellina.

programme.title: Rios Patagonicos
programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1977, the Cannes Yachting Festival takes place every September in elegant, luxurious surroundings in the sparkling bay of Cannes. We are ready for the 2018 edition that promises the latest trends in the nautical industry. Jump on board the 2018 Cannes Yachting Festival to discover superyachts, equipment, regattas, competitions and more.

programme.title: Kayaking Kerala - Episode 1 - Part One
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Irish Gathering
programme.desc: The Nautical Channel team travels to Ireland to meet up with the Gathering Cruise at Kinsale. We will be discovering the sailing and culture of the West Coast as we meet up the gathering cruise, visit a classic boat regatta and sample some delicious Irish gourmet meals. However, the trip will take a turn as rough seas and strong wind turn their leisure cruise into a rescue operation. Will our crew be okay in the Irish cold waters? Let's find out in The Irish Gathering!

programme.title: The Irish Gathering
programme.desc: The Nautical Channel team travels to Ireland to meet up with the Gathering Cruise at Kinsale. We will be discovering the sailing and culture of the West Coast as we meet up the gathering cruise, visit a classic boat regatta and sample some delicious Irish gourmet meals. However, the trip will take a turn as rough seas and strong wind turn their leisure cruise into a rescue operation. Will our crew be okay in the Irish cold waters? Let's find out in The Irish Gathering!

programme.title: Undercurrents
programme.desc: Undercurrents explores connection and compassion through the eyes of two female surfers as they share their motivation time after time to go back to the water despite cold waves, fears and little reward. Bringing in ideas from the Blue Mind movement and science of mindfulness, get ready to flow with the blue ocean as we explore the relationship with the sea to find out what happens when we pursue what we love.Arlene Maltman is one of first British & European female surfing champions. Natalie Fox is a Yogi, Surf instructor and marine activist. Throughout the film, they share their experiences and relationship with the sea.Neuroscientist & Mindfulness innovator Dr Tamara Russell & Blue Health Coach / Blue Mind Advocate, Lizzi Larbalestier provide expertise on how our minds and bodies are connected to the ocean and how this can have a benefit to our health and wellbeing.Awards:New Talent Award – Adventure Uncovered Film Festival 2020. Best Adventure Film – Shexreme Film Festival 2019.

programme.title: The Irish Gathering
programme.desc: The Nautical Channel team travels to Ireland to meet up with the Gathering Cruise at Kinsale. We will be discovering the sailing and culture of the West Coast as we meet up the gathering cruise, visit a classic boat regatta and sample some delicious Irish gourmet meals. However, the trip will take a turn as rough seas and strong wind turn their leisure cruise into a rescue operation. Will our crew be okay in the Irish cold waters? Let's find out in The Irish Gathering!

programme.title: Undercurrents
programme.desc: Undercurrents explores connection and compassion through the eyes of two female surfers as they share their motivation time after time to go back to the water despite cold waves, fears and little reward. Bringing in ideas from the Blue Mind movement and science of mindfulness, get ready to flow with the blue ocean as we explore the relationship with the sea to find out what happens when we pursue what we love.Arlene Maltman is one of first British & European female surfing champions. Natalie Fox is a Yogi, Surf instructor and marine activist. Throughout the film, they share their experiences and relationship with the sea.Neuroscientist & Mindfulness innovator Dr Tamara Russell & Blue Health Coach / Blue Mind Advocate, Lizzi Larbalestier provide expertise on how our minds and bodies are connected to the ocean and how this can have a benefit to our health and wellbeing.Awards:New Talent Award – Adventure Uncovered Film Festival 2020. Best Adventure Film – Shexreme Film Festival 2019.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 3
programme.desc: We have left the island of Stromboli and headed towards the Strait of Messina, the famous stretch that separates Calabria from Sicily. This strait is also famous for the strange games that locals play, sparked by the imagination of ancient sea creatures like Scylla and Charybdis, the monsters that Ullyses had to fight to get back home. Sea monsters, beautiful landscapes and original dishes await us in this episode on board the Ghibellina.

programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 9: Rijeka, Opatija, Lika
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 15
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 3
programme.desc: We have left the island of Stromboli and headed towards the Strait of Messina, the famous stretch that separates Calabria from Sicily. This strait is also famous for the strange games that locals play, sparked by the imagination of ancient sea creatures like Scylla and Charybdis, the monsters that Ullyses had to fight to get back home. Sea monsters, beautiful landscapes and original dishes await us in this episode on board the Ghibellina.

programme.title: Moose at Besaw's Outfitters part 1
programme.desc: Our goal is to discover exceptional wild places with unspoiled riches, where you can feel the full power of nature. Our series has an adventurous side as well as a funny and accessible side--all while being visually riveting. We are passionate; we want everyone to go on an adventure! programme.title: Saltwater Species Galore!
programme.desc: Real people. Real drama. Real fishing. Amateur anglers test their skills to try to catch as many species as possible while earning points for the biggest fish. Teams are not permitted to use gas powered boats but can fish using canoes, kayaks, inflatables or from shore. The team with the most points earns money to donate to the charity of their choice.

programme.title: November Brings on the Rut!
programme.desc: Pursue the Hunt is on a mission to encompass the all the aspects of a hunt. Gear, scouting, travel, physical preparedness, and survival are all aspect that can and do occur during hunting. Pursue the Hunt in mainly focused on the diversity of hunting available in British Columbia, with the exception of hunting game outside of BC when given the opportunity for unique hunts.

programme.title: Saltwater Species Galore!
programme.desc: Real people. Real drama. Real fishing. Amateur anglers test their skills to try to catch as many species as possible while earning points for the biggest fish. Teams are not permitted to use gas powered boats but can fish using canoes, kayaks, inflatables or from shore. The team with the most points earns money to donate to the charity of their choice.

programme.title: November Brings on the Rut!
programme.desc: Pursue the Hunt is on a mission to encompass the all the aspects of a hunt. Gear, scouting, travel, physical preparedness, and survival are all aspect that can and do occur during hunting. Pursue the Hunt in mainly focused on the diversity of hunting available in British Columbia, with the exception of hunting game outside of BC when given the opportunity for unique hunts.

We will live from the stalk to the preparation of the trophy, taking you through paths unknown until now, but always enjoying every moment of the hand of these great professionals who are passionate about the world of hunting.

programme.title: A Boy And His Dog
programme.desc: Vic (Don Johnson) is a libidinous 18-year-old traversing the post-apocalyptic desert of 2024, in the company of his telepathic dog, Blood. When the pair encounter an underground community, the leader's daughter, Quilla Holmes (Susanne Benton), seduces Vic into their fold, separating him from Blood, who's left to survive on his own. But once Vic discovers he's been lured there solely for mechanized procreation, he realizes he's doomed unless he can escape and rejoin Blood.

programme.title: Alice Sweet Alice
programme.desc: Favorite daughter Karen (Brooke Shields) is viciously strangled and set afire in church on the day of her First Communion, and suspicion falls on her jealous and emotionally unstable sister, Alice (Paula E. Sheppard). When the girls' aunt, Annie (Jane Lowry), is later stabbed on an apartment complex stairway, Alice is sent away. But the attacks continue, prompting priest Father Tom (Rudolph Willrich) and Alice's dad, Dominick (Niles McMaster), to go in search of the real killer.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After pulling a bank heist in Mexico, the outlaw Rio (Marlon Brando) and his partner, Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), make a run for it, but Dad has bigger plans than freedom. He betrays Rio and absconds with the loot, and Rio ends up in prison.

programme.title: Not Another Black Movie
programme.desc:
Not Another Black Movie stars Damon Williams (Bad Boys of Comedy, Comic View, BET LIVE, The Tom Joyner Morning Show), Janet Hubert (The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air), Rodney Perry (The Monique Show, Who's Got Jokes) Jay Davis (Not Another Zombie Movie, Shots Fired), and Leon Rogers (WGCI, Comic View, Bad Boys of Comedy).
Not Another Black Movie is not only a spoof of a genre often associated with Tyler Perry films, but a satirical look at family dysfunction as well. Written by Jay Davis and Directed by Donte "Diesel" Williams, Not Another Black Movie addresses issues that effect many families whether they be rich or poor, black or white. Although we poke fun at some of the stereotypical roles portrayed in this genre, we hope to shed some light on problems that plague many families while giving you a good laugh.

programme.title: Not Another Black Movie
programme.desc:
Not Another Black Movie stars Damon Williams (Bad Boys of Comedy, Comic View, BET LIVE, The Tom Joyner Morning Show), Janet Hubert (The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air), Rodney Perry (The Monique Show, Who's Got Jokes) Jay Davis (Not Another Zombie Movie, Shots Fired), and Leon Rogers (WGCI, Comic View, Bad Boys of Comedy).
Not Another Black Movie is not only a spoof of a genre often associated with Tyler Perry films, but a satirical look at family dysfunction as well. Written by Jay Davis and Directed by Donte "Diesel" Williams, Not Another Black Movie addresses issues that effect many families whether they be rich or poor, black or white. Although we poke fun at some of the stereotypical roles portrayed in this genre, we hope to shed some light on problems that plague many families while giving you a good laugh.

programme.title: Take a Seat Ep 01
programme.desc: The tandem bicycle project by Dominic Gill, ' Take A Seat Sharing a Ride Across America' demonstrates his proven platform of using tandem bicycles as a way to include people who would not otherwise be able to in the sort of once-in-a-lifetime adventure rarely undertaken. This 9 part mini-series follows Dom’s second adventure where he takes 10 persons with varying physical disabilities on specially designed recumbent tandem bicycle in a relay across the United States. This awe inspiring journey is a joy to watch as Dom’s companions, which vary from persons with muscular dystrophy, to parkinsons, to multiple sclerosis and visual impairment, do an incredible job of making the rest of us feel like underachievers. Since this is the first time that Dom had a crew to do the heavy-lifting, he made sure to retain authenticity throughout the journey by turning the cameras on the crew itself. Official Selection All Sports LA Film Festival 2011. John Muir Award Yosemite International Film Festival 2011. Winner Best Sports Series Cablefax Awards 2011. Best Documentary Feature NYLA International Film Festival 2011. Silver Screen Award Nevada International Film Festival 2011.

This awe inspiring journey is a joy to watch as Dom’s companions, which vary from persons with muscular dystrophy, to parkinsons, to multiple sclerosis and visual impairment, do an incredible job of making the rest of us feel like underachievers. Since this is the first time that Dom had a crew to do the heavy-lifting, he made sure to retain authenticity throughout the journey by turning the cameras on the crew itself. Official Selection All Sports LA Film Festival 2011. John Muir Award Yosemite International Film Festival 2011. Winner Best Sports Series Cablefax Awards 2011. Best Documentary Feature NYLA International Film Festival 2011. Silver Screen Award Nevada International Film Festival 2011.

programme.title: Shoot the Pier
programme.desc: Shoot the Pier, a true Main surf story. A story about a generation of surfers that needs to be told. The film takes us to a time and place were the waves were undiscovered and a culture was misunderstood.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: 12 Hours to Live
programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.title: 12 Hours to Live
programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Devon thought that his share of difficulties were over after a difficult divorce but on the road to rebuilding his life, tragedy strikes leaving him in a fight for his freedom and his innocence.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: Captive Hearts

programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Devon thought that his share of difficulties were over after a difficult divorce but on the road to rebuilding his life, tragedy strikes leaving him in a fight for his freedom and his innocence.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: 12 Hours to Live
programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Freedom and Peace
programme.desc: This meditation for manifestation begins with a few moments of intentional presence. Begin by noticing the feeling of the breath and let this be your gateway to practice. You will also develop an awareness of sensations in the body and the movements of the mind. Kino will guide you into the sense of freedom that can arise from the watching of consciousness that is the act of mindfulness. Planting seeds of peace amidst a stream of anxiety and stress is the heart of today's practice.

programme.title: Seated Position for Meditation
programme.desc: Find the meditation position, (legs crossed, seated in a chair or laying down) that is accessible for you.

programme.title: Yoga Is Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Yoga Is Harmony
programme.desc: Invite the mind into harmony as you take it nice and easy with today’s posture, Janu Sirsasana. Join Kino as she warms up your body with some slow and steady movements. Hold on to that ease and flow as you practice Janu Sirsasana, moving into external rotation of the hips and a nice stretch through the hamstrings. As you practice allow the mind to drop its antagonism towards the body, and instead allow the mind and body move into unity and a sense of welcome wholeness.

programme.title: Yoga Is Discipline
programme.desc: Don’t be intimidated, but today’s lesson is on discipline. This class is all about how to get on your mat with discipline and enjoy it. To find comfort and determination in Navasana Kino will guide you towards just the right amount of front body engagement as well as a helpful awareness in the deep core. Mix your discipline with a fun loving attitude and feel that energy that comes when you rise up to a challenge. Tap into a place of infinite strength within, a place of spiritual fortitude, a strength rooted in the beyond

programme.title: One Hour Yoga Drills - Miami Heat Fire Session

programme.title: Meditation Now - Release Judgment
programme.desc: Join Kino for a seaside meditation along the shores of the beautiful, Tulum, Mexico. Quite the mind and release all judgement so you can rest in the blissful awareness of all that is.

programme.title: Meditation Now - The Breath
programme.desc: Join Kino for a gentle meditation on the beach by the beautiful shores of Tulum, Mexico. Let go of your thoughts, and experiences as you use the breath to anchor you to the present moment.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Channel Id 3
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Morning Routine
programme.desc: One of Mark’s favorite morning routines, this is a slow-moving practice featuring static holds.

programme.title: Yoga Is Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Yoga Is Kindness
programme.desc: Invite kindness into your body, using Marichasana A as a framework for integrating tenderness into your practice. Let Kino guide you through a series of mindful, preparatory postures that bring awareness into the legs, hips and shoulders. This increased awareness will aid you as you move into the forward fold that today's practice revolves around. Use props where needed so that you can cultivate a kind and friendly attitude towards your body.

programme.title: Yoga Is Acceptance
programme.desc: Venture deep into the realm of body and mind in this sequence focused on an experience of santosha, the yogic notion of contentment. Join Kino as she skillfully uses upward facing dog as a tool for understanding this radical acceptance. Start with a short meditation on the breath and a feeling of being ok with the sensations in the body. Then begin the physical practice by awakening the central axis of the spine, extending and twisting your way through some warm up positions. Detail your alignment in the updog backbend with nuanced alignment work, making use of blocks where needed.

programme.title: Handstands

programme.title: Kino in Seattle
programme.desc: I don’t think we’re in Florida anymore! Follow along with Kino during her trip to Seattle, Washington as she adjusts to the colder weather, sets off in search of a hot cup of chai, tours historic areas like the Gas Works Park, supports local businesses, and shares the Ashtanga Yoga method with a group of excited yogis at the Yoga Lab Northwest.

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Light the Fire – Downward Dog
programme.desc: If you're feeling not so flexible, this course is where you should be! This class is focused on understanding shoulder mobility in the fundamental yoga asana called downdog,

programme.title: Parsvottanasana
programme.desc: This 20 minute practice starts with the basics, building a connection to breath and body. Flow through standing poses that build up to a prop supported variation of Parsvottanasana.

programme.title: Bridge
programme.desc: This practice takes you on a journey through the fundamentals of yoga and culminates in a gentle backbend, the bridge pose

programme.title: Breathe - Freedom
programme.desc: In the 40-minute practice, Kino leads you through a journey with the breath. Move into the inner space of the body by reconnecting with the power and the vehicle of the breath. Discover the child-like innocence of your body as you engage in this breath focused practice with awareness and intention.

programme.title: Healing and Happiness
programme.desc: Begin practice with a few minutes of mindfulness, feeling the breath and sensation in the body as a way of cultivating inward focus. Shift into a contemplative state, settling the mind below the frequency of thought. Learn to label inner processes in a way that will help you understand the nature of thought and emotion. As the quality of your awareness shifts deeper, Kino will skillfully guide you into a state of contemplation. This practice will help you process emotion and move towards healing and happiness.

programme.title: Everyday Essentials Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Intro to Everyday Essentials
programme.desc: Sit down with Mark Robberds to discover what this Movement Essentials course is all about.

programme.title: Breathwork
programme.desc: Use this practice to work with improving your 3-dimensional breathing.

programme.title: Standing Postures
programme.desc: Follow Mark as he walks your through techniques that will help you improve your function in standing poses.

programme.title: Yoga Is Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Yoga Is Happiness
programme.desc: You can be happy for no reason at all… Happiness can be our natural state. Start today with attention at the heart center and the recollection of an uplifting memory. Holding on to that feeling, move into practice with a warm up rooted in backbending and sun salutations. Next, follow Kino through through a hip opening sequence. As we approach today’s pinnacle pose, Baddha Konasana, remember that there is no need for the body to be in any particular place. Practice acceptance and happiness here and now.

programme.title: Yoga Is Patience
programme.desc: For many of us, patience does not come naturally. this class brings us an opportunity to understand patience through the twisting posture Marichasana C. Join Kino as she guides you into embodiment through breath awareness and gentle movement. Be patient and kind with your body as you move into the practice and a deeper twist through the spinal axis.

programme.title: Kino and Yuko Talk about the Vegan Diet, Yoga and Japanese Food
programme.desc: Learn know more about Yuko, including when and how she got into yoga after sustaining a major back injury.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Discover Your Dosha
programme.desc: Why does Ayurveda matter and how can it help you understand yourself and the world around you? In this episode, Sahara will briefly discuss each of the three doshas and what they have to do with you and the foods you eat? Learn about how your digestion can be affected by the doshas, and how the doshas might be affecting you through this brief intro to Ayurveda with Sahara Rose. Less that 20 minutes.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meditation for Pitta
programme.desc: Since Ayurveda recommends different yoga and meditation practices for the each of the different Doshas, in today’s episode, Sahara Rose is offering a specific meditation practice that’s designed for Pitta type people. About 10 minutes.

programme.title: Pigeon
programme.desc: Come explore supported hip opening with Kino. This class incorporates yoga fundamentals and builds up to Pigeon Pose.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Yoga Drills Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Everyday Drill
programme.desc: When it comes to building strength and flexibility for a more well-rounded yoga practice, yoga drills can help you expedite the process! Join Kino for a set of yoga drills that offer a little mix of everything. Stretch out and strengthen the core, legs, arms, shoulders, and everything in between. Just over 20 minutes.

programme.title: Plank
programme.desc: Join Kino for one of her favorite daily yoga drills, plank! Kino takes you through a quick warm up before diving into the challenging world of plank pose. Get ready to tone your core and strengthen your shoulders!

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Kino in San Francisco
programme.desc: In the latest episode of Global Yogi, Kino climbs the hills of San Fran! Join her as she explores this great town, one of the oldest cities on the United States west coast. Tag along as we venture through the famous micro climates of the city. Cross the Golden Gate Bridge, learn about escapes from Alcatraz, see the Gardens of Lombard Street and so much more! After all those handstands and asanas in front of scenic views, we stop for some of local food and to enjoy the local color. Kino's signature sense of humor and storytelling take center stage in this episode, as she delights in sharing San Francisco with you!

programme.title: Utthita Hasta Padangusthasana
programme.desc: This practice starts with breath awareness before moving into a prop supported physical practice. Use a chair to make the challenge of balance work more accessible.

programme.title: Seated Position for Meditation
programme.desc: Find the meditation position, (legs crossed, seated in a chair or laying down) that is accessible for you.

programme.title: Hips - Love
programme.desc: The journey of awakening the hips is very much a journey of self-love and self-discovery. Join Kino for a 30-minute practice that’s all about learning to love your hips. Avoid the temptation to judge and manipulate or force your flexibility by training the mind to be present amidst what may be the murky territory of the inner body around the hips.

programme.title: Everyday Strength - Shoulders and core
programme.desc: Give your strength and confidence a boost when you do this class with Kino. Challenge yourself with floating plank and dolphin plank. Build integrity in the core as you practice navasana (boat pose).

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Positive Reinforcement
programme.desc: Join Kino for a focus on calm and equanimity as your meditation begins today. Bring your attention to the quality of the breath and let this awareness be a bridge into the field of presence. From this place learn to listen for inner guidance and to be receptive to signs that you're on the right path. Anchor yourself in your own inner goodness and let this be a powerful positive reinforcement in your life.

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Something for Everyone – Half Moon
programme.desc: Today for yoga for inflexible people is a chair based practice that will help you stretch and strengthen in a supported way. Join Kino as she starts with a mindful moment and then flows through a sequence that includes lots of forward folds and side stretches.

programme.title: Yoga Is Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Yoga Is Compassion
programme.desc: This class is centered around a quality that is perhaps the very essence of being a yogi: Compassion. We’ll use the posture Shalabhasana, which is a heart opening backbend, to help you find that compassionate center within yourself. Begin with a moment of loving kindness meditation followed by some physical warm up focused on spinal extension. Follow Kino through a series of backbends that will be a little challenging, but also connect you to the breath and the space around the heart.

programme.title: Yoga Is Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Yoga Is Strength
programme.desc: So much of Kino's personal journey through yoga has been about learning to be strong. That's why shes so excited to share this class that uses plank pose as a bridge to connecting with your own inner reserves. Tune in and learn alignment and articulation in the body that will help you tap into new levels of strength. This sequence will teach you to feel and engage the back body and deep core in ways that support your yoga journey. You’ll finish this practice with a growing sense of stability and strength in both the body and mind.

programme.title: Finding Good Health, Success & Abundance with Ayurveda
programme.desc: Join Kino for a sit-down conversation with best-selling Ayurveda author, Sahara Rose.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Meet Alexa
programme.desc: Alexa Soto turned her passion for cooking into a way of life.

programme.title: Apple Pie Pancakes
programme.desc: These Apple Pie Pancakes are gluten-free, vegan and very simple to make.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Chakra Balancing
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that’s designed to promote Chakra balancing.

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer Budapest
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Kino in Budapest
programme.desc: One of Kino’s favorite hobbies is learning how to say ‘Thank You’ in different languages. In this episode of Global Yoga, she's learning that special phrase in Hungarian, as she travels to Budapest. Travel to St Stephen's cathedral, one of the biggest structures in the country, stroll the Danube River and visit Heroes Square, a World Heritage Site. Join Kino as she explores the rich history of this ancient country while on her journey of sharing yoga with the world.

programme.title: Ustrasana
programme.desc: A practice that explores the fundamentals of yoga and backbending. The class builds up to Ustrasana, the camel pose.

programme.title: Bridge
programme.desc: This practice takes you on a journey through the fundamentals of yoga and culminates in a gentle backbend, the bridge pose

programme.title: Natural Beauty
programme.desc: Ready to take your veganism to the next level? This episode of Kino’s Closet is all about Makeup! Tune in as Kino tries a new brand of vegan makeup with help from her makeup artist, Nanda Quero. In this episode, you’ll find out, not only why it’s important to choose ethically sourced brands, but also whether or not Kino gives this brand a thumbs up.

programme.title: Invert - Awaken
programme.desc: Join Kino for a class that’s all about inversions and the mindset of awakening. This 30-minute practice invites you to seize the opportunity to remain present and awake in the challenge of the practice. Begin the journey of turning yourself upside down to awaken the sleeper within.

programme.title: Downward Facing Dog
programme.desc: Dive into the fundamentals of yoga with this sequence that builds up to downward facing dog.
