In this episode of Global Yoga, she's learning that special phrase in Hungarian, as she travels to Budapest. Travel to St Stephen's cathedral, one of the biggest structures in the country, stroll the Danube River and visit Heroes Square, a World Heritage Site. Join Kino as she explores the rich history of this ancient country while on her journey of sharing yoga with the world.

programme.title: Ustrasana
programme.desc: A practice that explores the fundamentals of yoga and backbending. The class builds up to Ustrasana, the camel pose.

programme.title: Bridge
programme.desc: This practice takes you on a journey through the fundamentals of yoga and culminates in a gentle backbend, the bridge pose

programme.title: Natural Beauty
programme.desc: Ready to take your veganism to the next level? This episode of Kino’s Closet is all about Makeup! Tune in as Kino tries a new brand of vegan makeup with help from her makeup artist, Nanda Quero. In this episode, you’ll find out, not only why it’s important to choose ethically sourced brands, but also whether or not Kino gives this brand a thumbs up.

programme.title: Invert - Awaken
programme.desc: Join Kino for a class that’s all about inversions and the mindset of awakening. This 30-minute practice invites you to seize the opportunity to remain present and awake in the challenge of the practice. Begin the journey of turning yourself upside down to awaken the sleeper within.

programme.title: Downward Facing Dog
programme.desc: Dive into the fundamentals of yoga with this sequence that builds up to downward facing dog.

programme.title: TWOFASTSLF1HSpanish
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Meditation Now - Sharpen the Mind
programme.desc: Find a comfortable seat, close your eyes and imagine yourself sitting in the warm sand on a beautiful beach as you join Kino for today’s meditation. Sharpen the edge of the mind as you bring your awareness to a single point of focus.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meditation for Kapha
programme.desc: As you’ve learned, Ayurveda recommends different yoga and meditation practices for each of the doshas. In this episode, Sahara Rose will guide you through a meditation that’s designed specifically for Kapha type people.

programme.title: Breathwork
programme.desc: Use this practice to work with improving your 3-dimensional breathing.

programme.title: Standing Postures
programme.desc: Follow Mark as he walks your through techniques that will help you improve your function in standing poses.

programme.title: Yoga Is Patience
programme.desc: For many of us, patience does not come naturally. this class brings us an opportunity to understand patience through the twisting posture Marichasana C. Join Kino as she guides you into embodiment through breath awareness and gentle movement. Be patient and kind with your body as you move into the practice and a deeper twist through the spinal axis.

programme.title: Yoga Is Stillness
programme.desc: One of the key lessons of yoga is stillness, known as Nirodaha in Sanskrit. We will use the headstand position to practice approaching situations with calm and serenity. This class will help you build a strong base and increase awareness in the parts of your body that will support this inversion, especially the core. Don’t be afraid as we approach this challenge, Kino will offer variations so that all levels can experience the meditative stillness of headstand.

programme.title: Yoga, Money & Conscious Living With Sandy Fernandez
programme.desc: Join Kino for a sit-down conversation with Sandy Fernandez, founder of Karmic Currency.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Course Intro
programme.desc: This course is focused on merging Ayurveda with modern nutritional science and a dedicated yoga practice so that you can work toward becoming your highest self. But what exactly is Ayurveda? Tune in to find out and discover what this course is all about.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Breakfast for Your Dosha
programme.desc: Today you are going to learn how to start your day in the most effective way according to Ayurveda. Find out why it’s important to have a nourishing breakfast that’s designed for your specific mind-body type. Plus, this episode offers three Smoothie Bowl recipes – one for each of the doshas – that will nourish your body and set the tone for a great day. Less than 40 minutes. Complete Recipes Here - https://bit.ly/2xUOMEQ

programme.title: Channel Id 3
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Opening the Hips
programme.desc: Join Kino for some yoga drills that will help you work on opening the hips with some external hip rotation. With this video, you will gain a greater understanding of the movement mechanics involved in the action of external hip rotation. Build strength in all the muscles that are involved in opening the hips through this 40-minute practice.

programme.title: Facing Injury in the Practice
programme.desc: When it comes to yoga practice, there's nothing more difficult that facing an injury.

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Kino in Berlin
programme.desc: Dive into the rich culture, historic wonder and alternative lifestyle of the amazing city of Berlin. If you’ve spent any significant amount of time traveling, you know it can be hard on both your mind and your body. In this episode, you’ll get an inside look at Kino’s morning ritual, which she insists is part of what keeps her grounded amidst all the traveling. Follow Kino around the beautiful city as she teaches to a group of dedicated yogis and gives you an inside look at the city’s tourist sights through the eyes of yoga. Brush up on your Berlin Art and History knowledge as Kino visits the famous TV Tower, The Berlin Wall, one of the city’s last remaining Occupy Buildings, the Berlin Eastside Galleries and more. This episode is just over 20 minutes long.

programme.title: Yoga Is Love
programme.desc: Today's practice is all about love. Start practice by tuning into breath and body, bringing a special attention to the heartspace. Take a moment for feeling into the vibration of the heart, welcoming a feeling of receptivity. Warm yourself up as Kino brings extra attention to opening the chest and front body. Next we segue into finding and loving your particular expression of Gomukhasana, the cow facing posture. Remember that the cow is a sacred symbol of giving and love as you feel into the postures heart opening effects.

programme.title: Utthita Hasta Padangusthasana
programme.desc: This practice starts with breath awareness before moving into a prop supported physical practice. Use a chair to make the challenge of balance work more accessible.

programme.title: Lolasana
programme.desc: This flow uses a chair supported sun salutation to get you started then flows through standing poses before finishing up with some accessible work in the arm balance Lolasana

programme.title: The Pelvic Floor - Forgive
programme.desc: The journey of yoga is a journey of deep intimacy with the body. In this class you will begin to explore the pelvic floor and the concept of forgiveness. Allow the natural intelligence of the inner body to shine cultivate of deep awareness of the intimate, inner space of the body in this 30 minute practice.

programme.title: Plank
programme.desc: Join Kino for a short, gentle practice that is centered around core engagement and the plank pose

programme.title: Channel Id 3

programme.title: TWOFASTSLF1HSpanish
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Emotions
programme.desc: Welcome to Meditations for Manifesting, how to bring yourself back into alignment with the greater good and pray from a place of wholeness and true faith. Episode one is all about the emotions. Begin with breath awareness, establishing a calm and steady mind. Cultivate a judgment free attitude as you explore the inner world of your thoughts and feelings.

programme.title: Everyday Strength - Build it up
programme.desc: Build up your strength by building a powerful core. Kino guides you through a plank-focused practice that includes side planks, floating planks, and chaturanga (four-limbed staff pose). You'll ignite your inner fire in this short effective class.

programme.title: Everyday Strength - The L-sit
programme.desc: Continue your strength progression with Kino. Work on the key elements for L-sits by practicing forward folds, core strengthening drills, and lift ups. End the class by putting all the pieces together to practice the movements required to lift up into L-sits.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - True wealth story
programme.desc: In this last video, Rob shares a story that will help remind you of everything you’ve learned through this course. This story offers up one more practice that you can apply to your life to truly become a rich yogi.

programme.title: Yoga Is Gratitude
programme.desc: A grateful heart is a yogis heart! Today the lesson is built around the standing posture Parsvakonasana A. Begin with a moment of meditation and then flow through a warm up sequence that will calm the mind and guide you towards appreciation of the gifts of breath and life. Cultivate a sense of open, thankful awareness as we approach the extended side angle position, stretching the psoas and creating a sense of openness in the hips.

programme.title: Everyday Drill
programme.desc: When it comes to building strength and flexibility for a more well-rounded yoga practice, yoga drills can help you expedite the process! Join Kino for a set of yoga drills that offer a little mix of everything. Stretch out and strengthen the core, legs, arms, shoulders, and everything in between. Just over 20 minutes.

programme.title: Kino and Joseph Armstrong - A Story of Addiction
programme.desc: Get to know Joseph Armstrong, where he’s from and how he came to yoga.

programme.title: Naturally Bliss Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Meet Alexa
programme.desc: Alexa Soto turned her passion for cooking into a way of life.

programme.title: BBQ Cauliﬂower Ranch Salad
programme.desc: This super simple salad is easy to make and perfect to take with you on the go.

programme.title: Yoga Is Mindfulness
programme.desc: Today we go deeper into understanding what yoga is as we explore mindfulness and the pose Trikonasana. Join Kino as she guides you through a physical practice with a focus on remaining present and judgement free. Use triangle pose as an opportunity to be present with and accepting towards whatever arises in the body and mind as you practice.

programme.title: Shoulders
programme.desc: Build power and foundation with Kino as you join her for more Yoga Drills. This is perfect for those who are looking to build strength and learn strength building techniques. It's a great practice for those who are interested in becoming stronger both inside and out. Get ready to sweat and have some fun!

programme.title: Bakasana
programme.desc: A gentle flow that incorporates the fundamentals of yoga and builds up to the arm balance Bakasana, the crane pose.

programme.title: Kino in Bali
programme.desc: Come with Kino as she explores magical Bali in the latest installment of Global Yogi. This place is a mecca for yoga, healing, surfing and is known for its welcoming and peaceful Balinese culture. Here it’s common to discover a feeling of being safe and sound, and that was certainly the case for Kino. Green juice, island sand, coconuts and temples… the intoxicating energy of the island spirit can be found around every corner. Days are easily spent relaxing and and enjoying waves and sunsets. Check in for a massage, roll out your mat for practice, chat with the charming locals and find the perfect spot for a quiet meditation… All this and more as Kino continues to bring her message of insight and transformation to the world.

programme.title: Jackfruit Green Enchiladas with Cashew Crema v2
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Virabhadrasana A
programme.desc: This short class guides you towards increased awareness of the breath and body before flowing into a gentle asana sequence. The practice will use props to support the practice and will focus on the fundamental asana, Warrior One.

programme.title: Shalabhasana
programme.desc: A flow that thoroughly warms up the spine and builds up to the laying backbend called Shalabhasana.

programme.desc: This session is all about sitting with the hamstrings and forward bends in a state of equanimity. Join Kino as she leads you on a journey to healing. Learn to sit with your discomfort and begin to uncover and understand the intelligent messages that come from within. 25 minutes

programme.title: The Sunday Story Tellers Series- Highlight of Best Guests PART 2!
programme.desc: Pat McGee Band Corey Glover

programme.title: Duxbury Beach & The Powderpoint Bridge- Above Massachusetts
programme.desc: Aside from Duxbury Beach being one of the most beautiful New England beaches, imagine getting there by one of the longest wooden suspension bridges in the world...well the Powderpoint Bridge WAS ONCE the longest bridge of its kind until an unfortunate fire took it out. It has since been repaired and is the gateway for thousands to head out for a day by the sea! Captured by Drone Artist Chuck Nilosek from New England Drone Services.

programme.title: Colonial Williamsburg - Beyond Your Backyard
programme.desc: Beyond Your Backyard goes back in time and learns about American life in Colonial Williamsburg. Erik The Travel Guy steps into the shoes of an early American settler in this historic triangle where he takes up arms and learns all about the proper way to fire a musket, ax-throwing, the honest slave story, and how to make delicious ginger biscuits.

programme.title: Edgartown Light- Martha's Vineyard- Above Massachusetts
programme.desc: Fly above the Cape Cod Canal and see the bridges and sights from our camera in the sky! Witness the action on the Sagamore & Bourne Bridges as workers, tourist and regular people, travel back and forth from the mainland to the Cape. Then get ready to see the Scusset Beach State Park and Beach area on the East end of the Canal.

programme.title: Fort Stark- Above New Hampshire
programme.desc: Fly with Jason Kennedy from Baystate Aerials as he takes us on a flight of a lifetime where we get to enjoy Ft Stark, Whaleback Light and Wood Island from the lens of his drone.

programme.title: Visit Buzzards Bay- Life is Great New England
programme.desc: Life is Great New England headed to Buzzards Bay to dine at the Mezza Luna, with owner Emilio Cubelis, then met up with the Commander of the Mass Maritime Academy for a look at that historic institution. We also got a behind the scenes look at how the Cape Cod Canal Rail Road Bridge operates from the Army Corp of Engineers.

programme.title: In the Kitchen(R)
programme.desc: See how easy it is to create delicious dishes when you have the right tools and techniques during In the Kitchen®. Shop from the top brand names in cookware and appliances, the latest cookbooks, and gourmet treats, plus expert guests share secrets behind their favorite recipes. It's a cooking lesson to suit every taste when you're In the Kitchen with us!

programme.title: Tastes Like Tradition - Creamy Cajun Chicken with Lorna Maseko
programme.desc: Dishes that remind us of where we come from and who we have become. Meals that Taste Like Tradition. Create traditions of your own as our guests share their delicious recipes, simple how-tos, and inspiring stories that are sure to be passed down to your family as well.

programme.title: Tastes Like Tradition - Grandma Harriet's Collard Greens & Flapjacks with Marlo Smith
programme.desc: Dishes that remind us of where we come from and who we have become. Meals that Taste Like Tradition. Create traditions of your own as our guests share their delicious recipes, simple how-tos, and inspiring stories that are sure to be passed down to your family as well.

programme.title: Vitamix - More Than a Blender
programme.desc: The first Vitamix machine revolutionized small appliances and made "blender" a household word with the first-ever direct response commercial in 1949. Today, Vitamix blenders perform kitchen tasks that ordinary blenders can't. With its powerful motor, this all-purpose kitchen machine helps to ensure that you get the maximum benefit from your fruits and vegetables, for healthier eating in no time at all.

programme.title: In the Kitchen with David - Holiday Edition
programme.desc: QVC's Resident Foodie and Best Selling Cookbook Author shares his enthusiasm for food, fun, and everything a home cook needs to create great meals and memories.

programme.title: David's Recipe Corner - Peppermint Hot Chocolate Icebox Pie
programme.desc: If you’re a fan of the recipes on In the Kitchen with David® or an avid reader of Program Host David Venable’s best-selling cookbooks, David’s Recipe Corner is the place for you! Every month, grab your apron and watch, shop, and cook along with QVC's Resident Foodie as he guides you through step-by-step recipes that are as easy to make as they are delicious—PLUS the brands that make preparing them a breeze. And it’s all streaming free, only on QVC+.

programme.title: Getting Grilled with Curtis Stone - Natalie Morales
programme.desc: Things are heating up on Getting Grilled with Curtis Stone – an original video podcast show that will give you something to chew on. Join award-winning chef and the man behind one of the top-rated brands on HSN®, Curtis Stone, as he puts his guests from the worlds of film, music, sports, and beyond in the hot seat. Together, they’re cooking up flavorful convos—and foods—and digging into everything from current events to personal stories, to meals that left their mark. Whether you consider yourself a foodie, a pop culture expert, or somewhere in between, there’s sure to be a (sound) bite for you – streaming free, only on HSN+.

programme.title: Chef Curtis Stone
programme.desc: Discover Chef Curtis Stone's collection of kitchenware that simplifies prep and makes cooking fun

programme.title: Getting Grilled with Curtis Stone - Debbie Gibson
programme.desc: Things are heating up on Getting Grilled with Curtis Stone – an original video podcast show that will give you something to chew on. Join award-winning chef and the man behind one of the top-rated brands on HSN®, Curtis Stone, as he puts his guests from the worlds of film, music, sports, and beyond in the hot seat. Together, they’re cooking up flavorful convos—and foods—and digging into everything from current events to personal stories, to meals that left their mark. Whether you consider yourself a foodie, a pop culture expert, or somewhere in between, there’s sure to be a (sound) bite for you – streaming free, only on HSN+.
